hibernate-mapping.sql-query: SELECT NA.FIRST_NAME FROM PS_NAMES NA WHERE NA.EMPLID = :emplId AND NA.NAME_TYPE = 'PRI' AND NA.EFFDT = ( SELECT MAX(EFFDT) FROM PS_NAMES N1 WHERE N1.EMPLID = NA.EMPLID And N1.Name_Type = Na.Name_Type AND N1.EFFDT <= SYSDATE )

SELECT NA.LAST_NAME FROM PS_NAMES NA WHERE NA.EMPLID = :emplId AND NA.NAME_TYPE = 'PRI' AND NA.EFFDT = ( SELECT MAX(EFFDT) FROM PS_NAMES N1 WHERE N1.EMPLID = NA.EMPLID And N1.Name_Type = Na.Name_Type AND N1.EFFDT <= SYSDATE )

SELECT PSNA.EMPLID, TRIM(TRIM(PSNA.FIRST_NAME || ' ' || PSNA.MIDDLE_NAME) || ' ' || PSNA.LAST_NAME) FROM PS_NAMES PSNA WHERE PSNA.EMPLID IN (:emplIds) AND PSNA.NAME_TYPE = 'PRI' AND PSNA.EFFDT = (SELECT MAX(PSNA1.EFFDT) FROM PS_NAMES PSNA1 WHERE PSNA1.EMPLID = PSNA.EMPLID AND PSNA1.Name_Type = PSNA.Name_Type AND PSNA1.EFFDT <= SYSDATE )

WITH LATEST_CLIENT_OPTN AS ( SELECT OP2.COMPANY, OP2.PF_CLIENT, OP2.BENEFIT_PROGRAM, OP2.EFFDT, ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( PARTITION BY OP2.COMPANY, OP2.PF_CLIENT ORDER BY OP2.EFFDT DESC ) AS RN FROM PS_T2_CLIENT_OPTN2 OP2 LEFT JOIN PS_T2_CLIENT_OPT2A OP2A ON OP2.COMPANY = OP2A.COMPANY AND OP2.PF_CLIENT = OP2A.PF_CLIENT AND OP2.EFFDT = OP2A.EFFDT AND OP2.BENEFIT_PROGRAM = OP2A.BENEFIT_PROGRAM WHERE OP2.COMPANY = :company AND OP2A.T2_DEF_BEN_PROG = 'Y' OR NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM PS_T2_CLIENT_OPT2A OP2A2 WHERE OP2A2.COMPANY = OP2.COMPANY AND OP2A2.PF_CLIENT = OP2.PF_CLIENT AND OP2A2.EFFDT = OP2.EFFDT AND OP2A2.T2_DEF_BEN_PROG = 'Y' ) )
SELECT OP.PF_CLIENT, TO_CHAR(OP.T2_COMP_LIVE_DT, 'DD-MON-YYYY') AS T2_COMP_LIVE_DT, CASE WHEN ( SELECT MAX(STEP.STATUS) FROM OLP_PROCESS_TBL@HPDB_HRDB STEP WHERE STEP.OLP_ID = ( SELECT OL.OLP_ID FROM OLP_COMPANY_MAPPING_TBL@HPDB_HRDB OL WHERE OL.COMPANY = OP.COMPANY AND OL.PF_CLIENT = OP.PF_CLIENT ) ) < 35 THEN ( SELECT TO_CHAR(PROGRAMS_EFFDT, 'DD-MON-YYYY') FROM BD_COMPANIES@HPDB_HRDB WHERE COMPANY = OP.COMPANY AND STAGE = 'NEW' AND ROWNUM = 1 ) ELSE NVL( TO_CHAR(OP.T2_PLAN_DT_START, 'DD-MON-YYYY'), TO_CHAR(OP.T2_COMP_LIVE_DT, 'DD-MON-YYYY') ) END AS T2_PLAN_DT_START, OP.T2_OE_QUARTER, OP.T2_PEO_ID, OP.T2_K1_FLAG, LC.BENEFIT_PROGRAM AS DFLT_BEN_PROGRAM FROM PS_T2_CLOPTN_EFFDT OP LEFT JOIN LATEST_CLIENT_OPTN LC ON LC.COMPANY = OP.COMPANY AND LC.PF_CLIENT = OP.PF_CLIENT AND LC.RN = 1 WHERE OP.COMPANY = :company AND OP.EFFDT = COALESCE( ( SELECT MAX(EFFDT) FROM PS_T2_CLOPTN_EFFDT OEF WHERE OEF.PF_CLIENT = OP.PF_CLIENT AND OEF.COMPANY = OP.COMPANY AND OEF.EFFDT <= SYSDATE ), ( SELECT MIN(EFFDT) FROM PS_T2_CLOPTN_EFFDT OE2 WHERE OE2.PF_CLIENT = OP.PF_CLIENT AND OE2.COMPANY = OP.COMPANY ) )

SELECT OP.PF_CLIENT , TO_CHAR(OP.T2_COMP_LIVE_DT, 'DD-MON-YYYY') T2_COMP_LIVE_DT , CASE WHEN ( SELECT MAX( STEP.STATUS ) FROM OLP_PROCESS_TBL@HPDB_HRDB STEP WHERE STEP.OLP_ID = ( SELECT OL.OLP_ID FROM OLP_COMPANY_MAPPING_TBL@HPDB_HRDB OL WHERE OL.COMPANY = OP.COMPANY AND OL.PF_CLIENT = OP.PF_CLIENT ) ) < 35 THEN ( SELECT TO_CHAR(PROGRAMS_EFFDT,'DD-MON-YYYY') FROM BD_COMPANIES@HPDB_HRDB WHERE COMPANY = OP.COMPANY AND STAGE = 'NEW' AND ROWNUM = 1 ) ELSE NVL( TO_CHAR(OP.T2_PLAN_DT_START, 'DD-MON-YYYY'), TO_CHAR(OP.T2_COMP_LIVE_DT, 'DD-MON-YYYY') ) END AS T2_PLAN_DT_START , OP.T2_OE_QUARTER , EST.NAICS AS NAICS_CODE , COPTN.BENEFIT_PROGRAM AS DFLT_BEN_PROGRAM , HQ.STATE , COPTN.T2_KAISCA_BAND_CD , COPTN.T2_AETNA_BAND_CD , COPTN.T2_UHC_BAND_CD , COPTN.T2_BCBS_BAND_CD , COPTN.T2_BCBSNC_BAND_CD , COPTN.T2_KAISCO_BAND_CD , COPTN.T2_BSOFCA_BAND_CD , COPTN.T2_TUFTS_BAND_CD , COPTN.T2_LIFE_BAND_CD , COPTN.T2_DIS_BAND_CD , CMPY.DESCR , OP.T2_LEGAL_NAME AS LEGAL_NAME , HQ.CITY , OP.T2_ACA_LARGE_EMPLR , TO_CHAR(OP.T2_COMP_SETUP_DT, 'DD-MON-YYYY') T2_COMP_SETUP_DT , COPTN.T2_BCOFID_BAND_CD , COPTN.T2_BAND_CD , COPTN.T2_BCBSMN_BAND_CD , COPTN.T2_KAIMIDA_BAND_CD , COPTN.T2_KAISHI_BAND_CD , COPTN.T2_AET_HMO_BAND_CD , COPTN.T2_AET_PPO_BAND_CD , COPTN.T2_EMP_NY_BAND_CD , COPTN.T2_EXCL_MED_PLAN , HQ.POSTAL , OP.T2_PRODUCT_LINE , OP.T2_K1_FLAG , COPTN.T2_HARVARD_BAND_CD FROM ( SELECT * FROM PS_T2_CLOPTN_EFFDT Z1 WHERE Z1.COMPANY = :company AND Z1.EFFDT = ( SELECT MAX(EFFDT) FROM PS_T2_CLOPTN_EFFDT Z2 WHERE Z2.COMPANY = Z1.COMPANY AND Z2.PF_CLIENT = Z1.PF_CLIENT AND Z2.EFFDT <= :effdt ) ) OP LEFT OUTER JOIN PS_ESTAB_TBL_USA EST ON EST.ESTABID = OP.COMPANY , PS_COMPANY_TBL CMPY , PS_COMPANY_TBL HQ , ( SELECT OP2.*, OP2A.T2_EXCL_MED_PLAN FROM PS_T2_CLIENT_OPTN2 OP2 LEFT JOIN PS_T2_CLIENT_OPT2A OP2A ON OP2.COMPANY = OP2A.COMPANY AND OP2.PF_CLIENT = OP2A.PF_CLIENT AND OP2.EFFDT = OP2A.EFFDT AND OP2.BENEFIT_PROGRAM = OP2A.BENEFIT_PROGRAM WHERE OP2.EFFDT = ( SELECT MAX(EFFDT) FROM PS_T2_CL_OPTN_EFDT O2 WHERE O2.COMPANY = OP2.COMPANY AND O2.PF_CLIENT = OP2.PF_CLIENT AND O2.EFFDT <= :effdt ) AND ( OP2A.T2_DEF_BEN_PROG = 'Y' OR 1 = ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM PS_T2_CLIENT_OPTN2 OPC WHERE OPC.EFFDT = OP2.EFFDT AND OPC.COMPANY = OP2.COMPANY AND OPC.PF_CLIENT = OP2.PF_CLIENT ) ) ) COPTN WHERE OP.COMPANY = :company AND COPTN.COMPANY = OP.COMPANY AND CMPY.COMPANY = OP.COMPANY AND CMPY.EFFDT = ( SELECT MAX(EFFDT) FROM PS_COMPANY_TBL CMP1 WHERE CMP1.COMPANY = CMPY.COMPANY AND CMP1.EFFDT <= :effdt ) AND HQ.COMPANY = OP.COMPANY AND HQ.EFFDT = ( SELECT MAX(EFFDT) FROM PS_COMPANY_TBL HQ1 WHERE HQ1.COMPANY = HQ.COMPANY AND HQ1.EFFDT <= GREATEST( NVL( ( SELECT RPY.HQ_LOOKUP_DATE FROM XBSS_REALM_PLAN_YEAR@HPDB_HRDB RPY WHERE RPY.OE_QUARTER = OP.T2_OE_QUARTER AND :effdt BETWEEN RPY.PLAN_YEAR_START AND RPY.PLAN_YEAR_END ) , :effdt ) , ( SELECT MIN(EFFDT) FROM PS_COMPANY_TBL MINHQ WHERE MINHQ.COMPANY = HQ.COMPANY ) ) ) AND COPTN.COMPANY = OP.COMPANY AND ( EST.EFFDT IS NULL OR EST.EFFDT = ( SELECT MAX(EFFDT) FROM PS_ESTAB_TBL_USA E1 WHERE E1.ESTABID = EST.ESTABID AND E1.EFFDT <= :effdt ) )

MERGE INTO PS_T2_PRCL_BN_EFDT TGT USING ( SELECT :productCode T2_PEO_ID , :companyId COMPANY , :pfClient PF_CLIENT , TO_DATE(:startDate,'DD-MON-YYYY') EFFDT , :quarter T2_OE_QUARTER , :strategyName T2_BIS_STRATEGY , :acaFplOutOut T2_ACA_FPL_OPTOUT , :bundleId T2_BN_BUNDLE_ID , :bundleName T2_BN_BUNDLE_NAME , :riskType T2_RISK_TYPE FROM DUAL ) SRC ON ( TGT.T2_PEO_ID = SRC.T2_PEO_ID AND TGT.COMPANY = SRC.COMPANY AND TGT.PF_CLIENT = SRC.PF_CLIENT AND TGT.EFFDT = SRC.EFFDT ) WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT ( TGT.T2_PEO_ID, TGT.COMPANY, TGT.PF_CLIENT, TGT.EFFDT, TGT.T2_OE_QUARTER, TGT.T2_BIS_STRATEGY, TGT.T2_ACA_FPL_OPTOUT, TGT.T2_BN_BUNDLE_ID, TGT.T2_BN_BUNDLE_NAME, TGT.T2_RISK_TYPE ) VALUES ( SRC.T2_PEO_ID, SRC.COMPANY, SRC.PF_CLIENT, SRC.EFFDT, SRC.T2_OE_QUARTER, SRC.T2_BIS_STRATEGY, SRC.T2_ACA_FPL_OPTOUT, SRC.T2_BN_BUNDLE_ID, SRC.T2_BN_BUNDLE_NAME, SRC.T2_RISK_TYPE ) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET TGT.T2_OE_QUARTER = SRC.T2_OE_QUARTER , TGT.T2_BIS_STRATEGY = SRC.T2_BIS_STRATEGY , TGT.T2_ACA_FPL_OPTOUT = SRC.T2_ACA_FPL_OPTOUT , TGT.T2_BN_BUNDLE_ID = SRC.T2_BN_BUNDLE_ID , TGT.T2_BN_BUNDLE_NAME = SRC.T2_BN_BUNDLE_NAME , TGT.T2_RISK_TYPE = SRC.T2_RISK_TYPE
delete from PS_T2_PRCL_BN_PGM where T2_PEO_ID = :productCode and COMPANY = :companyId and PF_CLIENT = :pfClient and EFFDT = to_date(:startDate,'DD-MON-YYYY') and BENEFIT_PROGRAM = :benProgram

INSERT INTO PS_T2_PRCL_BN_PGM ( T2_PEO_ID, COMPANY, PF_CLIENT, EFFDT, BENEFIT_PROGRAM, EFF_STATUS , T2_SELECTED_PLANS, T2_BENSUPP_EE, T2_BENSUPP_SP, T2_BENSUPP_DEP, T2_BENSUPP_FAM, T2_BSS_MD_FUNDING , T2_WAIVE_ALLOWANCE, T2_LIMIT_PLAN_10, T2_LIMIT_COVRG_10, T2_ER_MD_CNTRB_PCT, T2_LIMIT_MED_DEP , T2_LIMIT_MED_EE, T2_LIMIT_MED_FAM, T2_LIMIT_MED_SP, T2_MED_MAX_EE, T2_MED_MAX_SP, T2_MED_MAX_DEP , T2_MED_MAX_FAM, T2_BSS_DN_FUNDING, T2_NOT_OFFERED_11, T2_LIMIT_PLAN_11, T2_LIMIT_COVRG_11 , T2_ER_DN_CNTRB_PCT, T2_LIMIT_DEN_DEP, T2_LIMIT_DEN_EE, T2_LIMIT_DEN_FAM, T2_LIMIT_DEN_SP , T2_DEN_MAX_EE, T2_DEN_MAX_SP, T2_DEN_MAX_DEP, T2_DEN_MAX_FAM, T2_BSS_VS_FUNDING, T2_NOT_OFFERED_14 , T2_LIMIT_PLAN_14, T2_LIMIT_COVRG_14, T2_ER_VS_CNTRB_PCT, T2_LIMIT_VIS_DEP, T2_LIMIT_VIS_EE , T2_LIMIT_VIS_FAM, T2_LIMIT_VIS_SP, T2_VIS_MAX_EE, T2_VIS_MAX_SP, T2_VIS_MAX_DEP, T2_VIS_MAX_FAM , T2_NOT_OFFERED_1D, T2_NOT_OFFERED_1U, T2_NOT_OFFERED_23, T2_NOT_OFFERED_30, T2_NOT_OFFERED_31 , T2_NOT_OFFERED_A3, T2_OFFER_EE_30, T2_OFFER_EE_31, T2_GROUP_TYPE, T2_GROUP_STATE ) VALUES ( :productCode, :companyId, :pfClient, TO_DATE ( :startDate, 'DD-MON-YYYY' ), :benProgram, 'A' , 'S', :benSuppEE, :benSuppSp, :benSuppDep, :benSuppFam, :mdFundingType , :waiverAllowance, NVL ( :mdBasePlan, ' ' ), :mdBaseCovrg, :mdBasePct, :mdDep , :mdEe, :mdFam, :mdSp, :mdFlatMaxEE, :mdFlatMaxSp, :mdFlatMaxDep , :mdFlatMaxFam, :dnFundingType, :dnNotOffered, NVL ( :dnBasePlan, ' ' ), :dnBaseCovrg , :dnBasePct, :dnDep, :dnEe, :dnFam, :dnSp , :dnFlatMaxEE, :dnFlatMaxSp, :dnFlatMaxDep, :dnFlatMaxFam, :vsFundingType, :vsNotOffered , NVL ( :vsBasePlan, ' ' ), :vsBaseCovrg, :vsBasePct, :vsDep, :vsEe , :vsFam, :vsSp, :vsFlatMaxEE, :vsFlatMaxSp, :vsFlatMaxDep, :vsFlatMaxFam , :odNotOffered, :ovNotOffered, :lfNotOffered, :sdNotOffered, :ldNotOffered , :cmNotOffered, :offerEESTD, :offerEELTD, :groupType, :groupState )

DELETE FROM PS_T2_PRCL_BN_PGM PG WHERE PG.T2_PEO_ID = :peoId AND PG.COMPANY = :company AND PG.PF_CLIENT = :pfClient AND PG.EFFDT > TO_DATE( :effdtStr, 'DD-MON-YYYY' ) AND PG.BENEFIT_PROGRAM = :benefitProgram

DELETE FROM PS_T2_PRCL_BN_EFDT EF WHERE EF.T2_PEO_ID = :peoId AND EF.COMPANY = :company AND EF.PF_CLIENT = :pfClient AND EF.EFFDT > TO_DATE( :effdtStr, 'DD-MON-YYYY' ) AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 'X' FROM PS_T2_PRCL_BN_PGM PG WHERE PG.T2_PEO_ID = EF.T2_PEO_ID AND PG.COMPANY = EF.COMPANY AND PG.PF_CLIENT = EF.PF_CLIENT AND PG.EFFDT = EF.EFFDT )

SELECT PL.PLAN_TYPE FROM PS_BEN_DEFN_PLAN PL WHERE PL.BENEFIT_PROGRAM = :cloneBenefitProgram AND PL.EFFDT = ( SELECT MAX(EFFDT) FROM PS_BEN_DEFN_PGM PG WHERE PG.BENEFIT_PROGRAM = PL.BENEFIT_PROGRAM AND PG.EFFDT <= TO_DATE( :effdtStr, 'DD-MON-YYYY' ) )

MERGE INTO PS_BEN_DEFN_PGM TGT USING ( SELECT :benefitProgram AS BENEFIT_PROGRAM , TO_DATE( :effdtStr, 'DD-MON-YYYY' ) AS EFFDT , SUBSTR( :groupDescr, 1, 30 ) AS DESCR , :pfClient AS PF_CLIENT , SUBSTR( :shortDescr, 1, 10 ) AS DESCRSHORT , EFF_STATUS , PROGRAM_TYPE , FSA_RUN_ID , FSA_MAX_ANNL_PLDG , CURRENCY_CD , DFLT_EXPIRATION_DD , :excessCreditOption AS DFLT_CREDIT_RLLOVR , COBRA_SURCHARGE , COBRA_DISABL_SURCG , FMLA_PLAN_ID , SHOW_CREDIT , COST_FREQUENCY , HANDBOOK_URL_ID , INCLD_CNSLSTX , COBRA_CONTACT_ID , BAS_SHOW_ER_COSTS , BAS_SHOW_TAX_IMPCT FROM PS_BEN_DEFN_PGM PG WHERE PG.BENEFIT_PROGRAM = :cloneBenProgram AND PG.EFFDT = ( SELECT MAX(EFFDT) FROM PS_BEN_DEFN_PGM PG1 WHERE PG1.BENEFIT_PROGRAM = PG.BENEFIT_PROGRAM AND PG1.EFFDT <= TO_DATE( :planStartDate, 'DD-MON-YYYY' ) ) ) SRC
ON ( TGT.BENEFIT_PROGRAM = SRC.BENEFIT_PROGRAM AND TGT.EFFDT = SRC.EFFDT )
WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT ( TGT.BENEFIT_PROGRAM, TGT.EFFDT, TGT.DESCR, TGT.PF_CLIENT, TGT.DESCRSHORT , TGT.EFF_STATUS, TGT.PROGRAM_TYPE, TGT.FSA_RUN_ID, TGT.FSA_MAX_ANNL_PLDG , TGT.CURRENCY_CD, TGT.DFLT_EXPIRATION_DD, TGT.DFLT_CREDIT_RLLOVR, TGT.COBRA_SURCHARGE , TGT.COBRA_DISABL_SURCG, TGT.FMLA_PLAN_ID, TGT.SHOW_CREDIT, TGT.COST_FREQUENCY , TGT.HANDBOOK_URL_ID, TGT.INCLD_CNSLSTX, TGT.COBRA_CONTACT_ID, TGT.BAS_SHOW_ER_COSTS , TGT.BAS_SHOW_TAX_IMPCT ) VALUES ( SRC.BENEFIT_PROGRAM, SRC.EFFDT, SRC.DESCR, SRC.PF_CLIENT, SRC.DESCRSHORT , SRC.EFF_STATUS, SRC.PROGRAM_TYPE, SRC.FSA_RUN_ID, SRC.FSA_MAX_ANNL_PLDG , SRC.CURRENCY_CD, SRC.DFLT_EXPIRATION_DD, SRC.DFLT_CREDIT_RLLOVR, SRC.COBRA_SURCHARGE , SRC.COBRA_DISABL_SURCG, SRC.FMLA_PLAN_ID, SRC.SHOW_CREDIT, SRC.COST_FREQUENCY , SRC.HANDBOOK_URL_ID, SRC.INCLD_CNSLSTX, SRC.COBRA_CONTACT_ID, SRC.BAS_SHOW_ER_COSTS , SRC.BAS_SHOW_TAX_IMPCT )
WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET TGT.DESCR = SRC.DESCR , TGT.PF_CLIENT = SRC.PF_CLIENT , TGT.DESCRSHORT = SRC.DESCRSHORT , TGT.DFLT_CREDIT_RLLOVR = SRC.DFLT_CREDIT_RLLOVR

MERGE INTO PS_BEN_DEFN_PLAN TGT USING ( SELECT :benefitProgram AS BENEFIT_PROGRAM , TO_DATE( :effdtStr, 'DD-MON-YYYY' ) AS EFFDT , PLAN_TYPE , DISPLAY_PLN_SEQ , MIN_ANNUAL_CONTRIB , MAX_ANNUAL_CONTRIB , WAIVE_COVERAGE , RESTRICT_ENTRY_MM , EVENT_RULES_ID , COBRA_PLAN , HIPAA_PLAN , COLLECT_DEPBEN , COLLECT_FUNDS , SHOW_PLAN_TYPE , HANDBOOK_URL_ID , DEP_RULE_ID FROM PS_BEN_DEFN_PLAN PL WHERE PL.BENEFIT_PROGRAM = :cloneBenProgram AND PL.EFFDT = ( SELECT MAX(EFFDT) FROM PS_BEN_DEFN_PGM PG WHERE PG.BENEFIT_PROGRAM = PL.BENEFIT_PROGRAM AND PG.EFFDT <= TO_DATE( :planStartDate, 'DD-MON-YYYY' ) ) AND PL.PLAN_TYPE = '01' ) SRC
ON ( TGT.BENEFIT_PROGRAM = SRC.BENEFIT_PROGRAM AND TGT.EFFDT = SRC.EFFDT AND TGT.PLAN_TYPE = SRC.PLAN_TYPE )
WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT ( TGT.BENEFIT_PROGRAM, TGT.EFFDT, TGT.PLAN_TYPE, TGT.DISPLAY_PLN_SEQ, TGT.MIN_ANNUAL_CONTRIB , TGT.MAX_ANNUAL_CONTRIB, TGT.WAIVE_COVERAGE, TGT.RESTRICT_ENTRY_MM, TGT.EVENT_RULES_ID , TGT.COBRA_PLAN, TGT.HIPAA_PLAN, TGT.COLLECT_DEPBEN, TGT.COLLECT_FUNDS, TGT.SHOW_PLAN_TYPE , TGT.HANDBOOK_URL_ID, TGT.DEP_RULE_ID ) VALUES ( SRC.BENEFIT_PROGRAM, SRC.EFFDT, SRC.PLAN_TYPE, SRC.DISPLAY_PLN_SEQ, SRC.MIN_ANNUAL_CONTRIB , SRC.MAX_ANNUAL_CONTRIB, SRC.WAIVE_COVERAGE, SRC.RESTRICT_ENTRY_MM, SRC.EVENT_RULES_ID , SRC.COBRA_PLAN, SRC.HIPAA_PLAN, SRC.COLLECT_DEPBEN, SRC.COLLECT_FUNDS, SRC.SHOW_PLAN_TYPE , SRC.HANDBOOK_URL_ID, SRC.DEP_RULE_ID )

MERGE INTO PS_BEN_DEFN_OPTN TGT USING ( SELECT :benefitProgram AS BENEFIT_PROGRAM , TO_DATE( :companySetupDate, 'DD-MON-YYYY' ) AS EFFDT , PLAN_TYPE , OPTION_ID , DISPLAY_OPT_SEQ , OPTION_TYPE , BENEFIT_PLAN , COVRG_CD , OPTION_CD , OPTION_LVL , DEDCD , DFLT_OPTION_IND , :eligRulesId AS ELIG_RULES_ID , LOCATION_TBL_ID , CROSS_PLAN_TYPE , CROSS_BENEF_PLAN , COVERAGE_LIMIT_PCT , CROSS_PLN_DPND_CHK FROM PS_BEN_DEFN_OPTN OP WHERE OP.BENEFIT_PROGRAM = :cloneBenProgram AND OP.EFFDT = ( SELECT MAX(EFFDT) FROM PS_BEN_DEFN_PGM PG WHERE PG.BENEFIT_PROGRAM = OP.BENEFIT_PROGRAM AND PG.EFFDT <= TO_DATE( :planStartDate, 'DD-MON-YYYY' ) ) AND OP.PLAN_TYPE = '01' ) SRC
ON ( TGT.BENEFIT_PROGRAM = SRC.BENEFIT_PROGRAM AND TGT.EFFDT = SRC.EFFDT AND TGT.PLAN_TYPE = SRC.PLAN_TYPE )
WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT ( TGT.BENEFIT_PROGRAM, TGT.EFFDT, TGT.PLAN_TYPE, TGT.OPTION_ID, TGT.DISPLAY_OPT_SEQ , TGT.OPTION_TYPE, TGT.BENEFIT_PLAN, TGT.COVRG_CD, TGT.OPTION_CD, TGT.OPTION_LVL, TGT.DEDCD , TGT.DFLT_OPTION_IND, TGT.ELIG_RULES_ID, TGT.LOCATION_TBL_ID, TGT.CROSS_PLAN_TYPE , TGT.CROSS_BENEF_PLAN, TGT.COVERAGE_LIMIT_PCT, TGT.CROSS_PLN_DPND_CHK ) VALUES ( SRC.BENEFIT_PROGRAM, SRC.EFFDT, SRC.PLAN_TYPE, SRC.OPTION_ID, SRC.DISPLAY_OPT_SEQ , SRC.OPTION_TYPE, SRC.BENEFIT_PLAN, SRC.COVRG_CD, SRC.OPTION_CD, SRC.OPTION_LVL, SRC.DEDCD , SRC.DFLT_OPTION_IND, SRC.ELIG_RULES_ID, SRC.LOCATION_TBL_ID, SRC.CROSS_PLAN_TYPE , SRC.CROSS_BENEF_PLAN, SRC.COVERAGE_LIMIT_PCT, SRC.CROSS_PLN_DPND_CHK )
WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET TGT.ELIG_RULES_ID = SRC.ELIG_RULES_ID

INSERT INTO PS_BEN_DEFN_PLAN SELECT :benefitProgram AS BENEFIT_PROGRAM , TO_DATE( :effdtStr, 'DD-MON-YYYY' ) AS EFFDT , PLAN_TYPE , DISPLAY_PLN_SEQ , MIN_ANNUAL_CONTRIB , MAX_ANNUAL_CONTRIB , WAIVE_COVERAGE , RESTRICT_ENTRY_MM , EVENT_RULES_ID , COBRA_PLAN , HIPAA_PLAN , COLLECT_DEPBEN , COLLECT_FUNDS , SHOW_PLAN_TYPE , HANDBOOK_URL_ID , DEP_RULE_ID FROM PS_BEN_DEFN_PLAN PL WHERE PL.BENEFIT_PROGRAM = :cloneBenProgram AND PL.EFFDT = ( SELECT MAX(EFFDT) FROM PS_BEN_DEFN_PGM PG WHERE PG.BENEFIT_PROGRAM = PL.BENEFIT_PROGRAM AND PG.EFFDT <= TO_DATE( :planStartDate, 'DD-MON-YYYY' ) ) AND PL.PLAN_TYPE IN ( :planTypes )

INSERT INTO PS_BEN_DEFN_OPTN SELECT :benefitProgram AS BENEFIT_PROGRAM , TO_DATE( :effdtStr, 'DD-MON-YYYY' ) AS EFFDT , PLAN_TYPE , OPTION_ID , DISPLAY_OPT_SEQ , OPTION_TYPE , BENEFIT_PLAN , COVRG_CD , OPTION_CD , OPTION_LVL , DEDCD , DFLT_OPTION_IND , ELIG_RULES_ID , LOCATION_TBL_ID , CROSS_PLAN_TYPE , CROSS_BENEF_PLAN , COVERAGE_LIMIT_PCT , CROSS_PLN_DPND_CHK FROM PS_BEN_DEFN_OPTN OP WHERE OP.BENEFIT_PROGRAM = :cloneBenProgram AND OP.EFFDT = ( SELECT MAX(EFFDT) FROM PS_BEN_DEFN_PGM PG WHERE PG.BENEFIT_PROGRAM = OP.BENEFIT_PROGRAM AND PG.EFFDT <= TO_DATE( :planStartDate, 'DD-MON-YYYY' ) ) AND OP.PLAN_TYPE IN ( :planTypes )
DELETE FROM PS_BEN_DEFN_COST WHERE BENEFIT_PROGRAM = :benefitProgram AND EFFDT = TO_DATE( :effdtStr, 'DD-MON-YYYY' ) AND PLAN_TYPE IN ( :planTypes )

INSERT INTO PS_BEN_DEFN_COST SELECT :benefitProgram AS BENEFIT_PROGRAM , TO_DATE( :effdtStr, 'DD-MON-YYYY' ) AS EFFDT , PLAN_TYPE , OPTION_ID , COST_ID , COST_TYPE , ERNCD , RATE_TYPE , RATE_TBL_ID , CALC_RULES_ID FROM PS_BEN_DEFN_COST CS WHERE CS.BENEFIT_PROGRAM = :cloneBenProgram AND CS.EFFDT = ( SELECT MAX(EFFDT) FROM PS_BEN_DEFN_PGM PG WHERE PG.BENEFIT_PROGRAM = CS.BENEFIT_PROGRAM AND PG.EFFDT <= TO_DATE( :planStartDate, 'DD-MON-YYYY' ) ) AND CS.PLAN_TYPE IN ( :planTypes )

MERGE INTO PS_T2_CL_OPTN_EFDT A USING ( SELECT :company AS COMPANY , ( SELECT PF_CLIENT FROM PS_T2_CLIENTOPTION WHERE COMPANY = :company ) AS PF_CLIENT , TO_DATE( :effdtStr, 'DD-MON-YYYY' ) AS EFFDT , 'B' AS T2_HAS_125_PLAN FROM DUAL ) B ON ( A.COMPANY = B.COMPANY AND A.PF_CLIENT = B.PF_CLIENT AND A.EFFDT = B.EFFDT ) WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT ( A.COMPANY, A.PF_CLIENT, A.EFFDT, A.T2_HAS_125_PLAN ) VALUES ( B.COMPANY, B.PF_CLIENT, B.EFFDT, B.T2_HAS_125_PLAN )

MERGE INTO PS_T2_CLIENT_OPTN2 TGT USING ( SELECT COMPANY , PF_CLIENT , TO_DATE( :effdtStr, 'DD-MON-YYYY' ) AS NEW_EFFDT , :benefitProgram AS NEW_BENEFIT_PROGRAM , EFF_STATUS , T2_FUNDING_OPTN , T2_EE_PCT , T2_DEP_PCT , T2_EE_PCT_D , T2_DEP_PCT_D , T2_EE_PCT_V , T2_DEP_PCT_V , T2_RATE_UPDATE , T2_BAND_CHG , T2_FUNDING_CHG , T2_BENSUPP_EE , T2_BENSUPP_SP , T2_BENSUPP_DEP , T2_BENSUPP_FAM , T2_BENSUPP_ALL , T2_BENSUPP_NB , T2_LIFE_PLAN , T2_LTD_PLAN , T2_STD_PLAN , T2_FORFEIT_EXC_CR , T2_SPONS_MDV , T2_MED_EE , T2_MED_SP , T2_MED_DEP , T2_MED_FAM , T2_DENT_EE , T2_DENT_SP , T2_DENT_DEP , T2_DENT_FAM , T2_VIS_EE , T2_VIS_SP , T2_VIS_DEP , T2_VIS_FAM , T2_LIMIT_PLAN_10 , T2_LIMIT_PLAN_15 , T2_LIMIT_MED_EE , T2_LIMIT_MED_SP , T2_LIMIT_MED_DEP , T2_LIMIT_MED_FAM , T2_ER_HSA_LVL , T2_ER_HSA_FRT_EE , T2_ER_HSA_FRT_FAM , T2_HSA_FRT_PAYOUT , T2_ER_HSA_MON_EE , T2_ER_HSA_MON_FAM , CASE WHEN :riskType = 'DIFFERENTIALS' THEN ' ' ELSE T2_BAND_CD END AS T2_BAND_CD , CASE WHEN :riskType = 'DIFFERENTIALS' THEN :lifeBandCode ELSE T2_LIFE_BAND_CD END AS T2_LIFE_BAND_CD , CASE WHEN :riskType = 'DIFFERENTIALS' THEN :disBandCode ELSE T2_DIS_BAND_CD END AS T2_DIS_BAND_CD , T2_LIMIT_PLAN_11 , T2_LIMIT_DEN_EE , T2_LIMIT_DEN_SP , T2_LIMIT_DEN_DEP , T2_LIMIT_DEN_FAM , T2_LIMIT_PLAN_14 , T2_LIMIT_VIS_EE , T2_LIMIT_VIS_SP , T2_LIMIT_VIS_DEP , T2_LIMIT_VIS_FAM , CASE WHEN :riskType = 'DIFFERENTIALS' THEN ' ' ELSE T2_BCBS_BAND_CD END AS T2_BCBS_BAND_CD , CASE WHEN :riskType = 'DIFFERENTIALS' THEN ' ' ELSE T2_BCBSNC_BAND_CD END AS T2_BCBSNC_BAND_CD , CASE WHEN :riskType = 'DIFFERENTIALS' THEN ' ' ELSE T2_KAISCA_BAND_CD END AS T2_KAISCA_BAND_CD , CASE WHEN :riskType = 'DIFFERENTIALS' THEN ' ' ELSE T2_KAISCO_BAND_CD END AS T2_KAISCO_BAND_CD , CASE WHEN :riskType = 'DIFFERENTIALS' THEN ' ' ELSE T2_BSOFCA_BAND_CD END AS T2_BSOFCA_BAND_CD , CASE WHEN :riskType = 'DIFFERENTIALS' THEN ' ' ELSE T2_AETNA_BAND_CD END AS T2_AETNA_BAND_CD , CASE WHEN :riskType = 'DIFFERENTIALS' THEN ' ' ELSE T2_TUFTS_BAND_CD END AS T2_TUFTS_BAND_CD , CASE WHEN :riskType = 'DIFFERENTIALS' THEN ' ' ELSE T2_UHC_BAND_CD END AS T2_UHC_BAND_CD , CASE WHEN :riskType = 'DIFFERENTIALS' THEN ' ' ELSE T2_BCOFID_BAND_CD END AS T2_BCOFID_BAND_CD , CASE WHEN :riskType = 'DIFFERENTIALS' THEN ' ' ELSE T2_BCBSMN_BAND_CD END AS T2_BCBSMN_BAND_CD , CASE WHEN :riskType = 'DIFFERENTIALS' THEN ' ' ELSE T2_KAIMIDA_BAND_CD END AS T2_KAIMIDA_BAND_CD , CASE WHEN :riskType = 'DIFFERENTIALS' THEN ' ' ELSE T2_KAISHI_BAND_CD END AS T2_KAISHI_BAND_CD , CASE WHEN :riskType = 'DIFFERENTIALS' THEN ' ' ELSE T2_AET_HMO_BAND_CD END AS T2_AET_HMO_BAND_CD , CASE WHEN :riskType = 'DIFFERENTIALS' THEN ' ' ELSE T2_AET_PPO_BAND_CD END AS T2_AET_PPO_BAND_CD , CASE WHEN :riskType = 'DIFFERENTIALS' THEN ' ' ELSE T2_EMP_NY_BAND_CD END AS T2_EMP_NY_BAND_CD , T2_HSA_CNTB_FRQ , T2_HSA_FRNT_FRQ , T2_HSA_FRTMNTH_Q1 , T2_HSA_FRTMNTH_Q2 , T2_HSA_FRTMNTH_Q3 , T2_HSA_FRTMNTH_Q4 , CASE WHEN :riskType = 'DIFFERENTIALS' THEN ' ' ELSE T2_HARVARD_BAND_CD END AS T2_HARVARD_BAND_CD FROM PS_T2_CLIENT_OPTN2 O2 WHERE O2.COMPANY = :company AND O2.EFFDT = ( SELECT MAX(EFFDT) FROM PS_T2_CLIENT_OPTN2 ED WHERE ED.COMPANY = O2.COMPANY AND ED.PF_CLIENT = O2.PF_CLIENT AND ED.EFFDT <= TO_DATE( :effdtStr, 'DD-MON-YYYY' ) ) AND O2.BENEFIT_PROGRAM = COALESCE( ( SELECT BPG.BENEFIT_PROGRAM FROM PS_T2_CLIENT_OPTN2 BPG WHERE BPG.COMPANY = O2.COMPANY AND BPG.PF_CLIENT = O2.PF_CLIENT AND BPG.EFFDT = O2.EFFDT AND BPG.BENEFIT_PROGRAM = :benefitProgram ) , ( SELECT MAX(BENEFIT_PROGRAM) FROM PS_T2_CLIENT_OPTN2 BPG WHERE BPG.COMPANY = O2.COMPANY AND BPG.PF_CLIENT = O2.PF_CLIENT AND BPG.EFFDT = O2.EFFDT AND BPG.EFF_STATUS = 'A' ) , ( SELECT MAX(BENEFIT_PROGRAM) FROM PS_T2_CLIENT_OPTN2 BPG WHERE BPG.COMPANY = O2.COMPANY AND BPG.PF_CLIENT = O2.PF_CLIENT AND BPG.EFFDT = O2.EFFDT ) ) ) SRC
ON ( TGT.COMPANY = SRC.COMPANY AND TGT.PF_CLIENT = SRC.PF_CLIENT AND TGT.EFFDT = SRC.NEW_EFFDT AND TGT.BENEFIT_PROGRAM = SRC.NEW_BENEFIT_PROGRAM )
WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT ( TGT.COMPANY, TGT.PF_CLIENT, TGT.EFFDT, TGT.BENEFIT_PROGRAM, TGT.EFF_STATUS, TGT.T2_FUNDING_OPTN , TGT.T2_EE_PCT, TGT.T2_DEP_PCT, TGT.T2_EE_PCT_D, TGT.T2_DEP_PCT_D, TGT.T2_EE_PCT_V, TGT.T2_DEP_PCT_V , TGT.T2_RATE_UPDATE, TGT.T2_BAND_CHG, TGT.T2_FUNDING_CHG, TGT.T2_BENSUPP_EE, TGT.T2_BENSUPP_SP , TGT.T2_BENSUPP_DEP, TGT.T2_BENSUPP_FAM, TGT.T2_BENSUPP_ALL, TGT.T2_BENSUPP_NB, TGT.T2_LIFE_PLAN , TGT.T2_LTD_PLAN, TGT.T2_STD_PLAN, TGT.T2_FORFEIT_EXC_CR, TGT.T2_SPONS_MDV, TGT.T2_MED_EE, TGT.T2_MED_SP , TGT.T2_MED_DEP, TGT.T2_MED_FAM, TGT.T2_DENT_EE, TGT.T2_DENT_SP, TGT.T2_DENT_DEP, TGT.T2_DENT_FAM , TGT.T2_VIS_EE, TGT.T2_VIS_SP, TGT.T2_VIS_DEP, TGT.T2_VIS_FAM, TGT.T2_LIMIT_PLAN_10, TGT.T2_LIMIT_PLAN_15 , TGT.T2_LIMIT_MED_EE, TGT.T2_LIMIT_MED_SP, TGT.T2_LIMIT_MED_DEP, TGT.T2_LIMIT_MED_FAM, TGT.T2_ER_HSA_LVL , TGT.T2_ER_HSA_FRT_EE, TGT.T2_ER_HSA_FRT_FAM, TGT.T2_HSA_FRT_PAYOUT, TGT.T2_ER_HSA_MON_EE, TGT.T2_ER_HSA_MON_FAM , TGT.T2_BAND_CD, TGT.T2_LIFE_BAND_CD, TGT.T2_DIS_BAND_CD, TGT.T2_LIMIT_PLAN_11, TGT.T2_LIMIT_DEN_EE , TGT.T2_LIMIT_DEN_SP, TGT.T2_LIMIT_DEN_DEP, TGT.T2_LIMIT_DEN_FAM, TGT.T2_LIMIT_PLAN_14, TGT.T2_LIMIT_VIS_EE , TGT.T2_LIMIT_VIS_SP, TGT.T2_LIMIT_VIS_DEP, TGT.T2_LIMIT_VIS_FAM, TGT.T2_BCBS_BAND_CD, TGT.T2_BCBSNC_BAND_CD , TGT.T2_KAISCA_BAND_CD, TGT.T2_KAISCO_BAND_CD, TGT.T2_BSOFCA_BAND_CD, TGT.T2_AETNA_BAND_CD , TGT.T2_TUFTS_BAND_CD, TGT.T2_UHC_BAND_CD, TGT.T2_BCOFID_BAND_CD, TGT.T2_BCBSMN_BAND_CD, TGT.T2_KAIMIDA_BAND_CD , TGT.T2_KAISHI_BAND_CD, TGT.T2_AET_HMO_BAND_CD, TGT.T2_AET_PPO_BAND_CD, TGT.T2_EMP_NY_BAND_CD , TGT.T2_HSA_CNTB_FRQ, TGT.T2_HSA_FRNT_FRQ, TGT.T2_HSA_FRTMNTH_Q1, TGT.T2_HSA_FRTMNTH_Q2, TGT.T2_HSA_FRTMNTH_Q3 , TGT.T2_HSA_FRTMNTH_Q4, TGT.T2_HARVARD_BAND_CD ) VALUES ( SRC.COMPANY, SRC.PF_CLIENT, SRC.NEW_EFFDT, SRC.NEW_BENEFIT_PROGRAM, SRC.EFF_STATUS, SRC.T2_FUNDING_OPTN , SRC.T2_EE_PCT, SRC.T2_DEP_PCT, SRC.T2_EE_PCT_D, SRC.T2_DEP_PCT_D, SRC.T2_EE_PCT_V, SRC.T2_DEP_PCT_V , SRC.T2_RATE_UPDATE, SRC.T2_BAND_CHG, SRC.T2_FUNDING_CHG, SRC.T2_BENSUPP_EE, SRC.T2_BENSUPP_SP , SRC.T2_BENSUPP_DEP, SRC.T2_BENSUPP_FAM, SRC.T2_BENSUPP_ALL, SRC.T2_BENSUPP_NB, SRC.T2_LIFE_PLAN , SRC.T2_LTD_PLAN, SRC.T2_STD_PLAN, SRC.T2_FORFEIT_EXC_CR, SRC.T2_SPONS_MDV, SRC.T2_MED_EE, SRC.T2_MED_SP , SRC.T2_MED_DEP, SRC.T2_MED_FAM, SRC.T2_DENT_EE, SRC.T2_DENT_SP, SRC.T2_DENT_DEP, SRC.T2_DENT_FAM , SRC.T2_VIS_EE, SRC.T2_VIS_SP, SRC.T2_VIS_DEP, SRC.T2_VIS_FAM, SRC.T2_LIMIT_PLAN_10, SRC.T2_LIMIT_PLAN_15 , SRC.T2_LIMIT_MED_EE, SRC.T2_LIMIT_MED_SP, SRC.T2_LIMIT_MED_DEP, SRC.T2_LIMIT_MED_FAM, SRC.T2_ER_HSA_LVL , SRC.T2_ER_HSA_FRT_EE, SRC.T2_ER_HSA_FRT_FAM, SRC.T2_HSA_FRT_PAYOUT, SRC.T2_ER_HSA_MON_EE, SRC.T2_ER_HSA_MON_FAM , SRC.T2_BAND_CD, SRC.T2_LIFE_BAND_CD, SRC.T2_DIS_BAND_CD, SRC.T2_LIMIT_PLAN_11, SRC.T2_LIMIT_DEN_EE , SRC.T2_LIMIT_DEN_SP, SRC.T2_LIMIT_DEN_DEP, SRC.T2_LIMIT_DEN_FAM, SRC.T2_LIMIT_PLAN_14, SRC.T2_LIMIT_VIS_EE , SRC.T2_LIMIT_VIS_SP, SRC.T2_LIMIT_VIS_DEP, SRC.T2_LIMIT_VIS_FAM, SRC.T2_BCBS_BAND_CD, SRC.T2_BCBSNC_BAND_CD , SRC.T2_KAISCA_BAND_CD, SRC.T2_KAISCO_BAND_CD, SRC.T2_BSOFCA_BAND_CD, SRC.T2_AETNA_BAND_CD , SRC.T2_TUFTS_BAND_CD, SRC.T2_UHC_BAND_CD, SRC.T2_BCOFID_BAND_CD, SRC.T2_BCBSMN_BAND_CD, SRC.T2_KAIMIDA_BAND_CD , SRC.T2_KAISHI_BAND_CD, SRC.T2_AET_HMO_BAND_CD, SRC.T2_AET_PPO_BAND_CD, SRC.T2_EMP_NY_BAND_CD , SRC.T2_HSA_CNTB_FRQ, SRC.T2_HSA_FRNT_FRQ, SRC.T2_HSA_FRTMNTH_Q1, SRC.T2_HSA_FRTMNTH_Q2, SRC.T2_HSA_FRTMNTH_Q3 , SRC.T2_HSA_FRTMNTH_Q4, SRC.T2_HARVARD_BAND_CD )
WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET TGT.T2_LIFE_BAND_CD = SRC.T2_LIFE_BAND_CD , TGT.T2_DIS_BAND_CD = SRC.T2_DIS_BAND_CD

UPDATE PS_T2_CLIENT_OPTN2 SET T2_ER_HSA_LVL = :ErHsaLvl , T2_ER_HSA_FRT_EE = :ErHsaFrtEe , T2_ER_HSA_FRT_FAM = :ErHsaFrtFam , T2_HSA_FRT_PAYOUT = :HsaFrtPayout , T2_ER_HSA_MON_EE = :ErHsaMonEe , T2_ER_HSA_MON_FAM = :ErHsaMonFam , T2_HSA_CNTB_FRQ = :HsaCntbFrq , T2_HSA_FRNT_FRQ = :HsaFrntFrq , T2_HSA_FRTMNTH_Q1 = :HsaFrtmnthQ1 , T2_HSA_FRTMNTH_Q2 = :HsaFrtmnthQ2 , T2_HSA_FRTMNTH_Q3 = :HsaFrtmnthQ3 , T2_HSA_FRTMNTH_Q4 = :HsaFrtmnthQ4 WHERE COMPANY = :company AND PF_CLIENT = :pfClient AND EFFDT = TO_DATE( :effdtStr, 'DD-MON-YYYY' ) AND BENEFIT_PROGRAM = :benefitProgram

INSERT INTO PS_T2_CLIENT_OPT2A SELECT COMPANY , PF_CLIENT , TO_DATE( :effdtStr, 'DD-MON-YYYY' ) AS NEW_EFFDT , BENEFIT_PROGRAM , T2_CUST_PROG_NAME , T2_BEN_PROG_GROUP , T2_CLASS_CODE , T2_GEOLOC_TBL_CD , T2_DEF_BEN_PROG , T2_WAITING_PERIOD , T2_EXCL_MED_PLAN FROM PS_T2_CLIENT_OPT2A O2 WHERE O2.COMPANY = :company AND O2.BENEFIT_PROGRAM = :benefitProgram AND O2.EFFDT = ( SELECT MAX(EFFDT) FROM PS_T2_CLIENT_OPT2A ED WHERE ED.COMPANY = O2.COMPANY AND ED.PF_CLIENT = O2.PF_CLIENT AND ED.BENEFIT_PROGRAM = O2.BENEFIT_PROGRAM AND ED.EFFDT <= TO_DATE( :effdtStr, 'DD-MON-YYYY' ) ) AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 'X' FROM PS_T2_CLIENT_OPT2A NE WHERE NE.COMPANY = :company AND NE.EFFDT = TO_DATE( :effdtStr, 'DD-MON-YYYY' ) AND NE.BENEFIT_PROGRAM = :benefitProgram )

INSERT INTO PS_T2_CLIENT_OPT2A SELECT COMPANY , PF_CLIENT , TO_DATE( :effdtStr, 'DD-MON-YYYY' ) AS NEW_EFFDT , :benefitProgram AS NEW_BENEFIT_PROGRAM , T2_CUST_PROG_NAME , T2_BEN_PROG_GROUP , ' ' AS NEW_T2_CLASS_CODE , T2_GEOLOC_TBL_CD , 'N' AS NEW_T2_DEF_BEN_PROG , T2_WAITING_PERIOD , T2_EXCL_MED_PLAN FROM PS_T2_CLIENT_OPT2A O2 WHERE O2.COMPANY = :company AND O2.EFFDT = ( SELECT MAX(EFFDT) FROM PS_T2_CLIENT_OPT2A ED WHERE ED.COMPANY = O2.COMPANY AND ED.PF_CLIENT = O2.PF_CLIENT AND ED.EFFDT <= TO_DATE( :effdtStr, 'DD-MON-YYYY' ) ) AND O2.BENEFIT_PROGRAM = ( SELECT MAX(BENEFIT_PROGRAM) FROM PS_T2_CLIENT_OPT2A BPG WHERE BPG.COMPANY = O2.COMPANY AND BPG.EFFDT = O2.EFFDT ) AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 'X' FROM PS_T2_CLIENT_OPT2A NE WHERE NE.COMPANY = :company AND NE.EFFDT = TO_DATE( :effdtStr, 'DD-MON-YYYY' ) AND NE.BENEFIT_PROGRAM = :benefitProgram )

INSERT INTO PS_T2_CLIENT_OPT2A( COMPANY , PF_CLIENT , EFFDT , BENEFIT_PROGRAM , T2_CUST_PROG_NAME , T2_BEN_PROG_GROUP , T2_CLASS_CODE , T2_GEOLOC_TBL_CD , T2_DEF_BEN_PROG , T2_WAITING_PERIOD , T2_EXCL_MED_PLAN ) SELECT :company , :pfClient , TO_DATE( :effdtStr, 'DD-MON-YYYY' ) , :benefitProgram , 'new program' , 'ONE' , ' ' , ' ' , 'N' , 'NONE' , 'DFLT' FROM DUAL WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 'X' FROM PS_T2_CLIENT_OPT2A NE WHERE NE.COMPANY = :company AND NE.EFFDT = TO_DATE( :effdtStr, 'DD-MON-YYYY' ) AND NE.BENEFIT_PROGRAM = :benefitProgram )
UPDATE PS_T2_CLIENT_OPT2A SET T2_DEF_BEN_PROG = 'Y' WHERE COMPANY = :company AND EFFDT = TO_DATE( :effdtStr, 'DD-MON-YYYY' ) AND BENEFIT_PROGRAM = :benefitProgram

INSERT INTO PS_T2_CLIENT_OPTN3 SELECT COMPANY , PF_CLIENT , TO_DATE( :effdtStr, 'DD-MON-YYYY' ) AS NEW_EFFDT , BENEFIT_PROGRAM , PLAN_TYPE , BENEFIT_PLAN , CASE WHEN :riskType = 'DIFFERENTIALS' AND O2.PLAN_TYPE LIKE '2%' THEN :lifeBandCode WHEN :riskType = 'DIFFERENTIALS' AND O2.PLAN_TYPE LIKE '3%' THEN :disBandCode ELSE T2_BAND_CD END AS T2_BAND_CD FROM PS_T2_CLIENT_OPTN3 O2 WHERE O2.COMPANY = :company AND O2.BENEFIT_PROGRAM = :benefitProgram AND O2.EFFDT = ( SELECT MAX(EFFDT) FROM PS_T2_CLIENT_OPTN3 ED WHERE ED.COMPANY = O2.COMPANY AND ED.PF_CLIENT = O2.PF_CLIENT AND ED.BENEFIT_PROGRAM = O2.BENEFIT_PROGRAM AND ED.EFFDT <= TO_DATE( :effdtStr, 'DD-MON-YYYY' ) ) AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 'X' FROM PS_T2_CLIENT_OPTN3 NE WHERE NE.COMPANY = :company AND NE.EFFDT = TO_DATE( :effdtStr, 'DD-MON-YYYY' ) AND NE.BENEFIT_PROGRAM = :benefitProgram AND NE.PLAN_TYPE = O2.PLAN_TYPE AND NE.BENEFIT_PLAN = O2.BENEFIT_PLAN ) AND (:riskType = 'BANDS' OR O2.PLAN_TYPE IN ('23', '30', '31'))

INSERT INTO PS_T2_CLIENT_OPTN3 SELECT COMPANY , PF_CLIENT , TO_DATE( :effdtStr, 'DD-MON-YYYY' ) AS NEW_EFFDT , :benefitProgram AS NEW_BENEFIT_PROGRAM , PLAN_TYPE , BENEFIT_PLAN , CASE WHEN :riskType = 'DIFFERENTIALS' AND O2.PLAN_TYPE LIKE '2%' THEN :lifeBandCode WHEN :riskType = 'DIFFERENTIALS' AND O2.PLAN_TYPE LIKE '3%' THEN :disBandCode ELSE T2_BAND_CD END AS T2_BAND_CD FROM PS_T2_CLIENT_OPTN3 O2 WHERE O2.COMPANY = :company AND O2.EFFDT = ( SELECT MAX(EFFDT) FROM PS_T2_CLIENT_OPTN3 ED WHERE ED.COMPANY = O2.COMPANY AND ED.PF_CLIENT = O2.PF_CLIENT AND ED.EFFDT <= TO_DATE( :effdtStr, 'DD-MON-YYYY' ) ) AND O2.BENEFIT_PROGRAM = ( SELECT MAX(BENEFIT_PROGRAM) FROM PS_T2_CLIENT_OPTN3 BPG WHERE BPG.COMPANY = O2.COMPANY AND BPG.EFFDT = O2.EFFDT ) AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 'X' FROM PS_T2_CLIENT_OPTN3 NE WHERE NE.COMPANY = :company AND NE.EFFDT = TO_DATE( :effdtStr, 'DD-MON-YYYY' ) AND NE.BENEFIT_PROGRAM = :benefitProgram ) AND (:riskType = 'BANDS' OR O2.PLAN_TYPE IN ('23', '30', '31'))

INSERT INTO PS_T2_CLIENT_OPTN3 SELECT :company AS NEW_COMPANY , ( NVL(( SELECT PF_CLIENT FROM PS_T2_CLIENTOPTION WHERE COMPANY = :company ) , ' ' ) ) AS NEW_PF_CLIENT , TO_DATE( :effdtStr, 'DD-MON-YYYY' ) AS NEW_EFFDT , :benefitProgram AS NEW_BENEFIT_PROGRAM , PLAN_TYPE , BENEFIT_PLAN , CASE WHEN :riskType = 'DIFFERENTIALS' AND O2.PLAN_TYPE LIKE '2%' THEN :lifeBandCode WHEN :riskType = 'DIFFERENTIALS' AND O2.PLAN_TYPE LIKE '3%' THEN :disBandCode ELSE T2_BAND_CD END AS T2_BAND_CD FROM PS_T2_CLIENT_OPTN3 O2 WHERE O2.COMPANY = :cloneCompany AND O2.BENEFIT_PROGRAM = :cloneProgram AND O2.EFFDT = ( SELECT MAX(EFFDT) FROM PS_T2_CLIENT_OPTN3 ED WHERE ED.COMPANY = O2.COMPANY AND ED.PF_CLIENT = O2.PF_CLIENT AND ED.BENEFIT_PROGRAM = O2.BENEFIT_PROGRAM AND ED.EFFDT <= TO_DATE( :effdtStr, 'DD-MON-YYYY' ) ) AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 'X' FROM PS_T2_CLIENT_OPTN3 NE WHERE NE.COMPANY = :company AND NE.EFFDT = TO_DATE( :effdtStr, 'DD-MON-YYYY' ) AND NE.BENEFIT_PROGRAM = :benefitProgram ) AND (:riskType = 'BANDS' OR O2.PLAN_TYPE IN ('23', '30', '31'))

UPDATE PS_T2_CLIENT_OPTN3 O3 SET O3.T2_BAND_CD = CASE WHEN :riskType = 'DIFFERENTIALS' AND O3.PLAN_TYPE LIKE '2%' THEN COALESCE(:lifeBandCode, ' ') WHEN :riskType = 'DIFFERENTIALS' AND O3.PLAN_TYPE LIKE '3%' THEN COALESCE(:disBandCode, ' ') ELSE COALESCE ( (
SELECT CASE WHEN O3.PLAN_TYPE IN ('10','15') THEN COALESCE(
( SELECT CASE BND.T2_PLAN_TYPE_LOC WHEN '4' THEN O2.T2_KAISCA_BAND_CD WHEN '5' THEN O2.T2_KAISCO_BAND_CD WHEN '6' THEN O2.T2_BSOFCA_BAND_CD WHEN '7' THEN CASE BND.T2_HEALTH_PL_TYPE WHEN 'HMO' THEN COALESCE( TRIM( O2.T2_AET_HMO_BAND_CD ), O2.T2_AETNA_BAND_CD ) WHEN 'PPO' THEN COALESCE( TRIM( O2.T2_AET_PPO_BAND_CD ), O2.T2_AETNA_BAND_CD ) ELSE O2.T2_AETNA_BAND_CD END WHEN '8' THEN O2.T2_TUFTS_BAND_CD WHEN '9' THEN O2.T2_BAND_CD WHEN 'A' THEN O2.T2_BCBS_BAND_CD WHEN 'B' THEN O2.T2_BCBSNC_BAND_CD WHEN 'C' THEN O2.T2_UHC_BAND_CD WHEN 'D' THEN O2.T2_BCOFID_BAND_CD WHEN 'E' THEN O2.T2_KAIMIDA_BAND_CD WHEN 'F' THEN O2.T2_BCBSMN_BAND_CD WHEN 'G' THEN O2.T2_KAISHI_BAND_CD WHEN 'H' THEN O2.T2_AET_HMO_BAND_CD WHEN 'I' THEN O2.T2_AET_PPO_BAND_CD WHEN 'J' THEN O2.T2_EMP_NY_BAND_CD WHEN 'L' THEN O2.T2_HARVARD_BAND_CD WHEN 'M' THEN O2.T2_AET_HMO_BAND_CD END AS BAND_CODE FROM PS_T2_COWEB_BANDNG BND WHERE BND.COMPANY = ( SELECT CLN.CLONE_COMPANY FROM XBSS_REALM_CLONE_PGM@HPDB_HRDB CLN , XBSS_REALM_PLAN_YEAR@HPDB_HRDB RPY WHERE RPY.ID = :realmYearId AND CLN.OE_QUARTER = RPY.OE_QUARTER AND RPY.PLAN_YEAR_START BETWEEN CLN.EFFDT AND CLN.ENDDT ) AND BND.PLAN_TYPE = O3.PLAN_TYPE AND BND.BENEFIT_PLAN = O3.BENEFIT_PLAN AND BND.EFFDT = ( SELECT MAX(EFFDT) FROM PS_T2_COWEB_BANDNG B1 WHERE B1.COMPANY = BND.COMPANY AND B1.PLAN_TYPE = BND.PLAN_TYPE AND B1.BENEFIT_PLAN = BND.BENEFIT_PLAN AND B1.EFFDT <= TO_DATE( :effdtStr, 'DD-MON-YYYY' ) ) ) , ' ' ) WHEN O3.PLAN_TYPE LIKE '2%' THEN O2.T2_LIFE_BAND_CD WHEN O3.PLAN_TYPE LIKE '3%' THEN O2.T2_DIS_BAND_CD END AS DERIVED_BAND_CD
FROM PS_T2_CLIENT_OPTN2 O2 WHERE O2.COMPANY = O3.COMPANY AND O2.PF_CLIENT = O3.PF_CLIENT AND O2.EFFDT = O3.EFFDT AND O2.BENEFIT_PROGRAM = O3.BENEFIT_PROGRAM ), ' ' ) END
WHERE O3.COMPANY = :company AND O3.EFFDT = TO_DATE( :effdtStr, 'DD-MON-YYYY' ) AND O3.BENEFIT_PROGRAM = :benefitProgram AND (:riskType = 'BANDS' OR O3.PLAN_TYPE IN ('23', '30', '31'))

SELECT DISTINCT PLAN_TYPE , PORTFOLIO_ID , T2_BAND_CD , T2_MIN_FLAT_AMT FROM ( SELECT LMIN.* , ( COALESCE( CASE BAND_LOCATOR WHEN '4' THEN BANDS.T2_KAISCA_BAND_CD WHEN '5' THEN BANDS.T2_KAISCO_BAND_CD WHEN '6' THEN BANDS.T2_BSOFCA_BAND_CD WHEN '7' THEN BANDS.T2_AETNA_BAND_CD WHEN '8' THEN BANDS.T2_TUFTS_BAND_CD WHEN '9' THEN BANDS.T2_BAND_CD WHEN 'A' THEN BANDS.T2_BCBS_BAND_CD WHEN 'B' THEN BANDS.T2_BCBSNC_BAND_CD WHEN 'C' THEN BANDS.T2_UHC_BAND_CD WHEN 'D' THEN BANDS.T2_BCOFID_BAND_CD WHEN 'E' THEN BANDS.T2_KAIMIDA_BAND_CD WHEN 'F' THEN BANDS.T2_BCBSMN_BAND_CD WHEN 'G' THEN BANDS.T2_KAISHI_BAND_CD WHEN 'H' THEN BANDS.T2_AET_HMO_BAND_CD WHEN 'I' THEN BANDS.T2_AET_PPO_BAND_CD WHEN 'J' THEN BANDS.T2_EMP_NY_BAND_CD WHEN 'L' THEN BANDS.T2_HARVARD_BAND_CD WHEN 'M' THEN BANDS.T2_AET_HMO_BAND_CD END , 'N' ) ) CLIENT_VENDOR_BAND
FROM ( SELECT MIN.* , ( SELECT BND.T2_PLAN_TYPE_LOC FROM PS_T2_COWEB_BANDNG BND WHERE BND.EFFDT = ( SELECT MAX(EFFDT) FROM PS_T2_COWEB_BANDNG BND1 WHERE BND1.PLAN_TYPE = BND.PLAN_TYPE AND BND1.BENEFIT_PLAN = BND.BENEFIT_PLAN AND BND1.EFFDT <= :ben_effdt ) AND BND.PLAN_TYPE = MIN.PLAN_TYPE AND BND.BENEFIT_PLAN = MIN.BENEFIT_PLAN AND ROWNUM = 1 ) BAND_LOCATOR
FROM ( SELECT PTNM.PLAN_TYPE, PTNM.BENEFIT_PLAN, PTNM.T2_BAND_CD, PTNM.T2_MIN_FLAT_AMT , XR.PORTFOLIO_ID FROM PS_T2_MIN_FUND_PLN MPLN , PS_T2_MIN_FUND PTNM , XBSS_REALM_PLYR_PLAN@HPDB_HRDB XR WHERE XR.REALM_YEAR_ID = :realmYrId AND MPLN.PLAN_TYPE = XR.PLAN_TYPE AND MPLN.EFFDT = ( SELECT MAX(EFFDT) FROM PS_T2_MIN_FUND_PLN MP1 WHERE MP1.PLAN_TYPE = MPLN.PLAN_TYPE AND MP1.EFFDT <= ( SELECT RPY.PLAN_YEAR_START FROM XBSS_REALM_PLAN_YEAR@HPDB_HRDB RPY WHERE RPY.ID = :realmYrId ) ) AND PTNM.PLAN_TYPE = MPLN.PLAN_TYPE AND PTNM.EFFDT = MPLN.EFFDT AND PTNM.STATE = :hqState AND PTNM.BENEFIT_PLAN = XR.BENEFIT_PLAN AND (XR.SITUS = :situs OR XR.SITUS IS NULL) UNION SELECT PTNM1.PLAN_TYPE, PTNM1.T2_ALT_BEN_PLAN, PTNM1.T2_BAND_CD, PTNM1.T2_ALT_MIN_AMT , XR1.PORTFOLIO_ID FROM PS_T2_MIN_FUND_PLN MPLN1 , PS_T2_MIN_FUND PTNM1 , XBSS_REALM_PLYR_PLAN@HPDB_HRDB XR1 WHERE :hqState = 'FL' AND XR1.REALM_YEAR_ID = :realmYrId AND MPLN1.PLAN_TYPE = XR1.PLAN_TYPE AND MPLN1.EFFDT = ( SELECT MAX(EFFDT) FROM PS_T2_MIN_FUND_PLN MP1 WHERE MP1.PLAN_TYPE = MPLN1.PLAN_TYPE AND MP1.EFFDT <= ( SELECT RPY.PLAN_YEAR_START FROM XBSS_REALM_PLAN_YEAR@HPDB_HRDB RPY WHERE RPY.ID = :realmYrId ) ) AND PTNM1.PLAN_TYPE = MPLN1.PLAN_TYPE AND PTNM1.EFFDT = MPLN1.EFFDT AND PTNM1.STATE = :hqState AND XR1.BENEFIT_PLAN = PTNM1.T2_ALT_BEN_PLAN AND (XR1.SITUS = :situs OR XR1.SITUS IS NULL) ) MIN ) LMIN
, ( WITH CLEAN_BAND_CODES ( COMPANY_ID, BAND_CODE_TYPE, BAND_CODE_VAL, EFFDT ) AS ( SELECT COMPANY_ID , BAND_CODE_TYPE , BAND_CODE_VAL , NVL( EFFECTIVE_DT, DATE '1901-01-01' ) FROM XBSS_BAND_CODES@HPDB_HRDB ) SELECT * FROM ( SELECT BND.COMPANY_ID, EFFDT, BAND_CODE_TYPE, BAND_CODE_VAL FROM CLEAN_BAND_CODES BND WHERE BND.COMPANY_ID = ( SELECT ID FROM XBSS_COMPANY@HPDB_HRDB WHERE CODE = :company AND REALM_YEAR_ID = :realmYrId ) AND BND.EFFDT = ( SELECT MAX(EFFDT) FROM CLEAN_BAND_CODES B1 WHERE B1.COMPANY_ID = BND.COMPANY_ID AND B1.BAND_CODE_TYPE = BND.BAND_CODE_TYPE AND B1.EFFDT <= :ben_effdt ) ) PIVOT ( MIN( BAND_CODE_VAL ) FOR BAND_CODE_TYPE IN ( 'AETNA' T2_AETNA_BAND_CD , 'HIGHMARK' T2_AET_HMO_BAND_CD , 'AETNAPPO' T2_AET_PPO_BAND_CD , 'BCBS' T2_BCBS_BAND_CD , 'BCBSCA' T2_BSOFCA_BAND_CD , 'BCBSID' T2_BCOFID_BAND_CD , 'BCBSMN' T2_BCBSMN_BAND_CD , 'BCBSNC' T2_BCBSNC_BAND_CD , 'EMPIRENY' T2_EMP_NY_BAND_CD , 'HARVARD' T2_HARVARD_BAND_CD , 'KAISER' T2_KAISCA_BAND_CD , 'KAISERCO' T2_KAISCO_BAND_CD , 'KAISERHI' T2_KAISHI_BAND_CD , 'KAISERMD' T2_KAIMIDA_BAND_CD , 'KAISERNW' T2_BAND_CD , 'TUFFS' T2_TUFTS_BAND_CD , 'UHC' T2_UHC_BAND_CD ) ) ) BANDS ) WHERE T2_BAND_CD = CLIENT_VENDOR_BAND

DELETE PS_T2_CL_OPTN_EFDT EF WHERE EF.COMPANY = :company AND EF.PF_CLIENT = :pfClient AND EF.EFFDT > TO_DATE( :effdtStr, 'DD-MON-YYYY' ) AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 'X' FROM PS_T2_CLIENT_OPTN2 O2 WHERE O2.COMPANY = EF.COMPANY AND O2.PF_CLIENT = EF.PF_CLIENT AND O2.EFFDT = EF.EFFDT ) AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 'X' FROM PS_T2_CLIENT_OPT2A O2A WHERE O2A.COMPANY = EF.COMPANY AND O2A.PF_CLIENT = EF.PF_CLIENT AND O2A.EFFDT = EF.EFFDT ) AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 'X' FROM PS_T2_CLIENT_OPTN3 O3 WHERE O3.COMPANY = EF.COMPANY AND O3.PF_CLIENT = EF.PF_CLIENT AND O3.EFFDT = EF.EFFDT )
DELETE FROM PS_T2_CLIENT_OPTN2 WHERE COMPANY = :company AND PF_CLIENT = :pfClient AND EFFDT > TO_DATE( :effdtStr, 'DD-MON-YYYY' ) AND BENEFIT_PROGRAM = :benefitProgram
DELETE FROM PS_T2_CLIENT_OPT2A WHERE COMPANY = :company AND PF_CLIENT = :pfClient AND EFFDT > TO_DATE( :effdtStr, 'DD-MON-YYYY' ) AND BENEFIT_PROGRAM = :benefitProgram
DELETE FROM PS_T2_CLIENT_OPTN3 WHERE COMPANY = :company AND PF_CLIENT = :pfClient AND EFFDT > TO_DATE( :effdtStr, 'DD-MON-YYYY' ) AND BENEFIT_PROGRAM = :benefitProgram

SELECT CP.COMPANY AS CLONE_COMPANY FROM PS_T2_EXCHG_CORP CP , PS_T2_EXCHG_DEFN EXDF WHERE EXDF.EFFDT = (SELECT MAX( EFFDT ) FROM PS_T2_EXCHG_DEFN XED WHERE XED.T2_EXCHANGE = EXDF.T2_EXCHANGE AND XED.EFFDT <= TO_DATE( :effdtStr, 'DD-MON-YYYY' )) AND EXDF.T2_EXCHANGE = ( COALESCE( ( SELECT T2_ID_VALUE FROM PS_T2_CL_PRDT_OPTN PD WHERE PD.COMPANY = :company AND PD.EFFDT = ( SELECT MAX( EFFDT ) FROM PS_T2_CL_PRDT_OPTN PED WHERE PED.COMPANY = PD.COMPANY AND PED.PF_CLIENT = PD.PF_CLIENT AND PED.EFFDT <= TO_DATE( :effdtStr, 'DD-MON-YYYY' ) ) AND PD.T2_PRODUCT_ID = 'BN' ) , ( SELECT EXDF.T2_EXCHANGE FROM PS_T2_EXCHG_DEFN EXDF , PS_T2_CLIENTOPTION CLOP WHERE EXDF.T2_PEO_ID = CLOP.T2_PEO_ID AND EXDF.EFFDT = ( SELECT MAX( EFFDT ) FROM PS_T2_EXCHG_DEFN XED WHERE XED.T2_EXCHANGE = EXDF.T2_EXCHANGE AND XED.EFFDT <= TO_DATE( :effdtStr, 'DD-MON-YYYY' ) ) AND CLOP.COMPANY = :company ) , ' ' ) ) AND CP.T2_EXCHANGE = EXDF.T2_EXCHANGE AND CP.EFFDT = EXDF.EFFDT AND CP.PF_CORP = ( SELECT CL.PF_CORP FROM PS_T2_CLIENTOPTION CL WHERE CL.COMPANY = :company )
DELETE FROM PS_BAS_ELIG_PYGRP WHERE ELIG_RULES_ID = :eligRulesId AND EFFDT = TO_DATE( :effdtStr, 'DD-MON-YYYY' )
DELETE FROM PS_BAS_ELIG_BNSTAT WHERE ELIG_RULES_ID = :eligRulesId AND EFFDT = TO_DATE( :effdtStr, 'DD-MON-YYYY' )
DELETE FROM PS_BAS_ELIG_EECLAS WHERE ELIG_RULES_ID = :eligRulesId AND EFFDT = TO_DATE( :effdtStr, 'DD-MON-YYYY' )
DELETE FROM PS_BAS_ELIG_CNFIG1 WHERE ELIG_RULES_ID = :eligRulesId AND EFFDT = TO_DATE( :effdtStr, 'DD-MON-YYYY' )
DELETE FROM PS_BAS_ELIG_RULES WHERE ELIG_RULES_ID = :eligRulesId AND EFFDT = TO_DATE( :effdtStr, 'DD-MON-YYYY' )

SELECT T2_FIELD_VALUE FROM PS_T2_COWEB_SETUP WHERE COMPANY = ( CASE WHEN :peoId = 'PAS' THEN '020' WHEN :peoId = 'AMB' THEN 'E42' WHEN :peoId = 'SOI' THEN 'PAZ' WHEN :peoId = 'ALP' THEN 'NWH' WHEN :peoId = 'ACD' THEN 'DVP' ELSE '020' END ) AND REPORT_ID = 'T2COWEB2' AND FIELDNAME = 'ELIG_RULES_ID'

SELECT RL.ELIG_RULES_ID FROM PS_BAS_ELIG_RULES RL WHERE RL.ELIG_RULES_ID = :eligRulesId AND RL.EFFDT = ( SELECT MAX(EFFDT) FROM PS_BAS_ELIG_RULES R1 WHERE R1.ELIG_RULES_ID = RL.ELIG_RULES_ID AND R1.EFFDT < TO_DATE( :effdtStr, 'DD-MON-YYYY' ) )

ELIG.EVAL_ACTV_MEDICARE , ELIG.ELIG_USE_ACAELG FROM PS_BAS_ELIG_RULES ELIG WHERE ELIG.ELIG_RULES_ID = :cloneEligRule AND ELIG.EFFDT = ( SELECT MAX( EFFDT ) FROM PS_BAS_ELIG_RULES WHERE ELIG_RULES_ID = ELIG.ELIG_RULES_ID AND EFFDT <= sysdate )
UPDATE PS_BAS_ELIG_RULES SET ELIG_FLG_EECLAS = :flgEeClass WHERE ELIG_RULES_ID = :eligRulesId AND EFFDT = TO_DATE( :effdtStr, 'DD-MON-YYYY' )

INSERT INTO PS_BAS_ELIG_PYGRP( ELIG_RULES_ID , EFFDT , COMPANY , PAYGROUP ) SELECT :eligRulesId , TO_DATE( :effdtStr, 'DD-MON-YYYY' ) , :company , ELIG2.PAYGROUP FROM PS_BAS_ELIG_RULES EL , PS_BAS_ELIG_PYGRP ELIG2 WHERE EL.ELIG_RULES_ID = :cloneEligRule AND EL.EFFDT = ( SELECT MAX(EFFDT) FROM PS_BAS_ELIG_RULES E1 WHERE E1.ELIG_RULES_ID = EL.ELIG_RULES_ID AND E1.EFFDT <= TO_DATE( :effdtStr, 'DD-MON-YYYY' ) ) AND ELIG2.ELIG_RULES_ID = EL.ELIG_RULES_ID AND ELIG2.EFFDT = EL.EFFDT

INSERT INTO PS_BAS_ELIG_BNSTAT( ELIG_RULES_ID, EFFDT, BEN_STATUS ) SELECT :eligRulesId , TO_DATE( :effdtStr, 'DD-MON-YYYY' ) , ELIG3.BEN_STATUS FROM PS_BAS_ELIG_RULES EL , PS_BAS_ELIG_BNSTAT ELIG3 WHERE EL.ELIG_RULES_ID = :cloneEligRule AND EL.EFFDT = ( SELECT MAX(EFFDT) FROM PS_BAS_ELIG_RULES E1 WHERE E1.ELIG_RULES_ID = EL.ELIG_RULES_ID AND E1.EFFDT <= TO_DATE( :effdtStr, 'DD-MON-YYYY' ) ) AND ELIG3.ELIG_RULES_ID = EL.ELIG_RULES_ID AND ELIG3.EFFDT = EL.EFFDT

INSERT INTO PS_BAS_ELIG_EECLAS( ELIG_RULES_ID, EFFDT, EMPL_CLASS ) SELECT :eligRulesId , TO_DATE( :effdtStr, 'DD-MON-YYYY' ) , ELIG4.EMPL_CLASS FROM PS_BAS_ELIG_RULES EL , PS_BAS_ELIG_EECLAS ELIG4 WHERE EL.ELIG_RULES_ID = :cloneEligRule AND EL.EFFDT = ( SELECT MAX(EFFDT) FROM PS_BAS_ELIG_RULES E1 WHERE E1.ELIG_RULES_ID = EL.ELIG_RULES_ID AND E1.EFFDT <= TO_DATE( :effdtStr, 'DD-MON-YYYY' ) ) AND ELIG4.ELIG_RULES_ID = EL.ELIG_RULES_ID AND ELIG4.EFFDT = EL.EFFDT
UPDATE PS_BEN_DEFN_OPTN SET ELIG_RULES_ID = :eligRulesId WHERE BENEFIT_PROGRAM = :benefitProgram AND EFFDT = TO_DATE( :effdtStr, 'DD-MON-YYYY' ) AND PLAN_TYPE = '01'

SELECT RL.ELIG_FLG_CNFIG1 FROM PS_BAS_ELIG_RULES RL WHERE RL.ELIG_RULES_ID = :defaultEligRule AND RL.EFFDT = (SELECT MAX( EFFDT ) FROM PS_BAS_ELIG_RULES R1 WHERE R1.ELIG_RULES_ID = RL.ELIG_RULES_ID AND R1.EFFDT <= TO_DATE( :effdtStr, 'DD-MON-YYYY' ))
SELECT RL.ELIG_FLG_CNFIG1 FROM PS_BAS_ELIG_RULES RL WHERE RL.ELIG_RULES_ID = :defaultEligRule AND RL.EFFDT = TO_DATE( :effdtStr, 'DD-MON-YYYY' )
UPDATE PS_BAS_ELIG_RULES SET ELIG_USE_CNFIG1 = :yesNoFlag WHERE ELIG_RULES_ID = :eligRulesId AND EFFDT = TO_DATE( :effdtStr, 'DD-MON-YYYY' )
UPDATE PS_BAS_ELIG_RULES SET ELIG_FLG_CNFIG1 = :inelgEligFlag WHERE ELIG_RULES_ID = :eligRulesId AND EFFDT = TO_DATE( :effdtStr, 'DD-MON-YYYY' )

MERGE INTO PS_BAS_ELIG_CNFIG1 CFG1 USING ( SELECT :eligRulesId AS ELIG_RULES_ID , TO_DATE( :effdtStr, 'DD-MON-YYYY' ) AS EFFDT , :eligConfig1 AS ELIG_CONFIG1 FROM DUAL ) NW ON ( CFG1.ELIG_RULES_ID = NW.ELIG_RULES_ID AND CFG1.EFFDT = NW.EFFDT AND CFG1.ELIG_CONFIG1 = NW.ELIG_CONFIG1 ) WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT ( CFG1.ELIG_RULES_ID, CFG1.EFFDT, CFG1.ELIG_CONFIG1 ) VALUES ( NW.ELIG_RULES_ID, NW.EFFDT, NW.ELIG_CONFIG1 )

SELECT DISTINCT PLAN_TYPE , OPTION_TYPE , BENEFIT_PLAN , COVRG_CD , OPTION_CD , OPTION_LVL , DEDCD , DFLT_OPTION_IND , ELIG_RULES_ID , LOCATION_TBL_ID , CROSS_PLAN_TYPE , CROSS_BENEF_PLAN , COVERAGE_LIMIT_PCT , CROSS_PLN_DPND_CHK FROM PS_BEN_DEFN_OPTN OP WHERE OP.BENEFIT_PROGRAM = :benefitProgram AND OP.EFFDT = ( SELECT MAX(EFFDT) FROM PS_BEN_DEFN_PGM PG WHERE PG.BENEFIT_PROGRAM = OP.BENEFIT_PROGRAM AND PG.EFFDT <= TO_DATE( :effdtStr, 'DD-MON-YYYY' ) + 90 ) AND OP.PLAN_TYPE LIKE '5%' AND NOT ( OP.ELIG_RULES_ID IN ('2009','23GC','236Q') )

SELECT DISTINCT PLAN_TYPE , DISPLAY_PLN_SEQ , MIN_ANNUAL_CONTRIB , MAX_ANNUAL_CONTRIB , WAIVE_COVERAGE , RESTRICT_ENTRY_MM , EVENT_RULES_ID , COBRA_PLAN , HIPAA_PLAN , COLLECT_DEPBEN , COLLECT_FUNDS , SHOW_PLAN_TYPE , HANDBOOK_URL_ID , DEP_RULE_ID FROM PS_BEN_DEFN_PLAN PL WHERE PL.BENEFIT_PROGRAM = :benefitProgram AND PL.PLAN_TYPE LIKE '5%' AND PL.EFFDT = ( SELECT MAX(EFFDT) FROM PS_BEN_DEFN_PGM PG WHERE PG.BENEFIT_PROGRAM = PL.BENEFIT_PROGRAM AND PG.EFFDT <= TO_DATE( :effdtStr, 'DD-MON-YYYY' ) + 90 )

SELECT BENEFIT_PROGRAM , PLAN_TYPE , DISPLAY_PLN_SEQ , MIN_ANNUAL_CONTRIB , MAX_ANNUAL_CONTRIB , WAIVE_COVERAGE , RESTRICT_ENTRY_MM , EVENT_RULES_ID , COBRA_PLAN , HIPAA_PLAN , COLLECT_DEPBEN , COLLECT_FUNDS , SHOW_PLAN_TYPE , HANDBOOK_URL_ID , DEP_RULE_ID FROM PS_BEN_DEFN_PLAN PL WHERE PL.BENEFIT_PROGRAM = :benefitProgram AND PL.EFFDT = ( SELECT MAX(EFFDT) FROM PS_BEN_DEFN_PGM PG WHERE PG.BENEFIT_PROGRAM = PL.BENEFIT_PROGRAM AND PG.EFFDT <= TO_DATE( :effdtStr, 'DD-MON-YYYY' ) + 90 ) AND PL.PLAN_TYPE LIKE '4%'

SELECT OP.BENEFIT_PROGRAM , OP.PLAN_TYPE , OP.OPTION_ID , OP.DISPLAY_OPT_SEQ , OP.OPTION_TYPE , OP.BENEFIT_PLAN , OP.COVRG_CD , OP.OPTION_CD , OP.OPTION_LVL , OP.DEDCD , OP.DFLT_OPTION_IND , OP.ELIG_RULES_ID , OP.LOCATION_TBL_ID , OP.CROSS_PLAN_TYPE , OP.CROSS_BENEF_PLAN , OP.COVERAGE_LIMIT_PCT , OP.CROSS_PLN_DPND_CHK , CS.COST_ID , CS.COST_TYPE , CS.ERNCD , CS.RATE_TYPE , CS.RATE_TBL_ID , CS.CALC_RULES_ID FROM PS_BEN_DEFN_OPTN OP , PS_BEN_DEFN_COST CS WHERE OP.BENEFIT_PROGRAM = :benefitProgram AND OP.EFFDT = ( SELECT MAX(EFFDT) FROM PS_BEN_DEFN_PGM PG WHERE PG.BENEFIT_PROGRAM = OP.BENEFIT_PROGRAM AND PG.EFFDT <= TO_DATE( :effdtStr, 'DD-MON-YYYY' ) + 90 ) AND OP.PLAN_TYPE LIKE '4%' AND NOT ( OP.ELIG_RULES_ID IN ('2009','23GC','236Q') ) AND CS.BENEFIT_PROGRAM(+) = OP.BENEFIT_PROGRAM AND CS.EFFDT(+) = OP.EFFDT AND CS.PLAN_TYPE(+) = OP.PLAN_TYPE AND CS.OPTION_ID(+) = OP.OPTION_ID

SELECT BENEFIT_PROGRAM , PLAN_TYPE , DISPLAY_PLN_SEQ , MIN_ANNUAL_CONTRIB , MAX_ANNUAL_CONTRIB , WAIVE_COVERAGE , RESTRICT_ENTRY_MM , EVENT_RULES_ID , COBRA_PLAN , HIPAA_PLAN , COLLECT_DEPBEN , COLLECT_FUNDS , SHOW_PLAN_TYPE , HANDBOOK_URL_ID , DEP_RULE_ID FROM PS_BEN_DEFN_PLAN PL WHERE PL.BENEFIT_PROGRAM = :benefitProgram AND PL.EFFDT = ( SELECT MAX(EFFDT) FROM PS_BEN_DEFN_PGM PG WHERE PG.BENEFIT_PROGRAM = PL.BENEFIT_PROGRAM AND PG.EFFDT <= TO_DATE( :effdtStr, 'DD-MON-YYYY' ) + 90 ) AND PL.PLAN_TYPE IN ('60','61')

SELECT OP.BENEFIT_PROGRAM , OP.PLAN_TYPE , OP.OPTION_ID , OP.DISPLAY_OPT_SEQ , OP.OPTION_TYPE , OP.BENEFIT_PLAN , OP.COVRG_CD , OP.OPTION_CD , OP.OPTION_LVL , OP.DEDCD , OP.DFLT_OPTION_IND , OP.ELIG_RULES_ID , OP.LOCATION_TBL_ID , OP.CROSS_PLAN_TYPE , OP.CROSS_BENEF_PLAN , OP.COVERAGE_LIMIT_PCT , OP.CROSS_PLN_DPND_CHK , CS.COST_ID , CS.COST_TYPE , CS.ERNCD , CS.RATE_TYPE , CS.RATE_TBL_ID , CS.CALC_RULES_ID FROM PS_BEN_DEFN_OPTN OP , PS_BEN_DEFN_COST CS WHERE OP.BENEFIT_PROGRAM = :benefitProgram AND OP.EFFDT = ( SELECT MAX(EFFDT) FROM PS_BEN_DEFN_PGM PG WHERE PG.BENEFIT_PROGRAM = OP.BENEFIT_PROGRAM AND PG.EFFDT <= TO_DATE( :effdtStr, 'DD-MON-YYYY' ) + 90 ) AND OP.PLAN_TYPE IN ('60','61') AND NOT ( OP.ELIG_RULES_ID IN ('2009','23GC','236Q') ) AND CS.BENEFIT_PROGRAM(+) = OP.BENEFIT_PROGRAM AND CS.EFFDT(+) = OP.EFFDT AND CS.PLAN_TYPE(+) = OP.PLAN_TYPE AND CS.OPTION_ID(+) = OP.OPTION_ID

INSERT INTO PS_BEN_DEFN_PLAN ( BENEFIT_PROGRAM , EFFDT , PLAN_TYPE , DISPLAY_PLN_SEQ , MIN_ANNUAL_CONTRIB , MAX_ANNUAL_CONTRIB , WAIVE_COVERAGE , RESTRICT_ENTRY_MM , EVENT_RULES_ID , COBRA_PLAN , HIPAA_PLAN , COLLECT_DEPBEN , COLLECT_FUNDS , SHOW_PLAN_TYPE , HANDBOOK_URL_ID , DEP_RULE_ID ) VALUES ( :benefitProgram , :effdt , :planType , :displayPlnSeq , :minAnnualContrib , :maxAnnualContrib , :waiveCoverage , :restrictEntryMm , :eventRulesId , :cobraPlan , :hipaaPlan , :collectDepben , :collectFunds , :showPlanType , :handbookUrlId , :depRuleId )
DELETE FROM PS_BEN_DEFN_PGM WHERE BENEFIT_PROGRAM = :benefitProgram AND EFFDT > TO_DATE( :effdtStr, 'DD-MON-YYYY' )
DELETE FROM PS_BEN_DEFN_PLAN WHERE BENEFIT_PROGRAM = :benefitProgram AND EFFDT > TO_DATE( :effdtStr, 'DD-MON-YYYY' )
DELETE FROM PS_BEN_DEFN_OPTN WHERE BENEFIT_PROGRAM = :benefitProgram AND EFFDT > TO_DATE( :effdtStr, 'DD-MON-YYYY' )
DELETE FROM PS_BEN_DEFN_COST WHERE BENEFIT_PROGRAM = :benefitProgram AND EFFDT > TO_DATE( :effdtStr, 'DD-MON-YYYY' )
DELETE FROM PS_BEN_DEFN_PLAN WHERE BENEFIT_PROGRAM = :benefitProgram AND EFFDT = TO_DATE( :effdtStr, 'DD-MON-YYYY' )
DELETE FROM PS_BEN_DEFN_OPTN WHERE BENEFIT_PROGRAM = :benefitProgram AND EFFDT = TO_DATE( :effdtStr, 'DD-MON-YYYY' )
DELETE FROM PS_BEN_DEFN_COST WHERE BENEFIT_PROGRAM = :benefitProgram AND EFFDT = TO_DATE( :effdtStr, 'DD-MON-YYYY' )
DELETE FROM PS_BEN_DEFN_OPTN WHERE BENEFIT_PROGRAM = :benefitProgram AND EFFDT = TO_DATE( :effdtStr, 'DD-MON-YYYY' ) AND PLAN_TYPE IN ( :planTypes )
DELETE FROM PS_BEN_DEFN_COST WHERE BENEFIT_PROGRAM = :benefitProgram AND EFFDT = TO_DATE( :effdtStr, 'DD-MON-YYYY' ) AND PLAN_TYPE IN ( :planTypes )
DELETE FROM PS_BEN_DEFN_PLAN WHERE BENEFIT_PROGRAM = :benefitProgram AND EFFDT = TO_DATE( :effdtStr, 'DD-MON-YYYY' ) AND PLAN_TYPE IN ( :planTypes )
DELETE FROM PS_BEN_DEFN_OPTN WHERE BENEFIT_PROGRAM = :benefitProgram AND EFFDT = TO_DATE( :effdtStr, 'DD-MON-YYYY' ) AND REGEXP_LIKE( PLAN_TYPE, :planTypePattern )
DELETE FROM PS_BEN_DEFN_COST WHERE BENEFIT_PROGRAM = :benefitProgram AND EFFDT = TO_DATE( :effdtStr, 'DD-MON-YYYY' ) AND REGEXP_LIKE( PLAN_TYPE, :planTypePattern )
DELETE FROM PS_BEN_DEFN_PLAN WHERE BENEFIT_PROGRAM = :benefitProgram AND EFFDT = TO_DATE( :effdtStr, 'DD-MON-YYYY' ) AND REGEXP_LIKE( PLAN_TYPE, :planTypePattern )

SELECT NVL( ( SELECT MAX(OPTION_ID) FROM PS_BEN_DEFN_OPTN WHERE BENEFIT_PROGRAM = :benefitProgram AND EFFDT = TO_DATE( :effdtStr, 'DD-MON-YYYY' ) ), 0 ) AS MAX_OPTION_ID , NVL( ( SELECT MAX(COST_ID) FROM PS_BEN_DEFN_COST WHERE BENEFIT_PROGRAM = :benefitProgram AND EFFDT = TO_DATE( :effdtStr, 'DD-MON-YYYY' ) ), 0 ) AS MAX_COST_ID FROM DUAL

INSERT INTO PS_BEN_DEFN_OPTN ( BENEFIT_PROGRAM , EFFDT , PLAN_TYPE , OPTION_ID , DISPLAY_OPT_SEQ , OPTION_TYPE , BENEFIT_PLAN , COVRG_CD , OPTION_CD , OPTION_LVL , DEDCD , DFLT_OPTION_IND , ELIG_RULES_ID , LOCATION_TBL_ID , CROSS_PLAN_TYPE , CROSS_BENEF_PLAN , COVERAGE_LIMIT_PCT , CROSS_PLN_DPND_CHK ) VALUES ( :benefitProgram , TO_DATE( :effdtStr, 'DD-MON-YYYY' ) , :planType , :optionId , :displayOptSeq , :optionType , :benefitPlan , :covrgCd , :optionCd , :optionLvl , :dedcd , :dfltOptionInd , :eligRulesId , :locationTblId , :crossPlanType , :crossBenefPlan , :coverageLimitPct , :crossPlnDpndChk )

INSERT INTO PS_BEN_DEFN_COST ( BENEFIT_PROGRAM , EFFDT , PLAN_TYPE , OPTION_ID , COST_ID , COST_TYPE , ERNCD , RATE_TYPE , RATE_TBL_ID , CALC_RULES_ID ) VALUES ( :benefitProgram , TO_DATE( :effdtStr, 'DD-MON-YYYY' ) , :planType , :optionId , :costId , :costType , :erncd , :rateType , :rateTblId , :calcRulesId )

UPDATE PS_BEN_DEFN_OPTN O SET O.ELIG_RULES_ID = '236Q' WHERE O.BENEFIT_PROGRAM = :benefitProgram AND O.EFFDT = TO_DATE( :effdtStr, 'DD-MON-YYYY' ) AND O.OPTION_TYPE = 'O' AND ( ( :groupDental = '1' AND O.PLAN_TYPE IN ('11','16') ) OR ( :optionalDental = '1' AND O.PLAN_TYPE IN ('1D','1E') ) OR ( :groupVision = '1' AND O.PLAN_TYPE IN ('14','17') ) OR ( :optionalVision = '1' AND O.PLAN_TYPE IN ('1V','1U') ) ) AND O.ELIG_RULES_ID = '23GC'

UPDATE PS_BEN_DEFN_OPTN D SET D.ELIG_RULES_ID = '2009' WHERE (BENEFIT_PROGRAM, EFFDT, PLAN_TYPE, BENEFIT_PLAN, OPTION_ID) IN (SELECT O.BENEFIT_PROGRAM, O.EFFDT, O.PLAN_TYPE, O.BENEFIT_PLAN, O.OPTION_ID FROM PS_BEN_DEFN_OPTN O, PS_BEN_DEFN_PGM PGM WHERE O.BENEFIT_PROGRAM = PGM.BENEFIT_PROGRAM AND PGM.EFFDT = O.EFFDT AND PGM.BENEFIT_PROGRAM = :benefitProgram AND PGM.EFFDT = to_date(:effdt,'DD-MON-YYYY') AND O.OPTION_TYPE <> 'W' AND O.BENEFIT_PLAN NOT IN ( :list ) AND O.BENEFIT_PLAN NOT IN ( :dpPlans ) AND O.BENEFIT_PLAN NOT IN ( :autoSelectedPlans ) AND O.BENEFIT_PLAN NOT IN ( :autoSelectedDp ) AND O.BENEFIT_PLAN <> '0003M3' AND NOT ( O.ELIG_RULES_ID IN ('2009','236Q','23GC') ) AND O.PLAN_TYPE NOT IN ('30', '01', '1G', '1H', '60', '61', '67', 'A1', '31', '1X', '1A', '18', '1K', '1S', 'A6', '2A', '29') AND O.PLAN_TYPE not like '4%' AND O.PLAN_TYPE not like '5%')

UPDATE PS_BEN_DEFN_OPTN D SET D.ELIG_RULES_ID = '2009' WHERE (D.BENEFIT_PROGRAM, D.EFFDT, D.PLAN_TYPE, D.BENEFIT_PLAN, D.OPTION_ID) IN (SELECT O.BENEFIT_PROGRAM, O.EFFDT, O.PLAN_TYPE, O.BENEFIT_PLAN, O.OPTION_ID FROM PS_BEN_DEFN_OPTN O, PS_BEN_DEFN_PGM PGM WHERE O.BENEFIT_PROGRAM = PGM.BENEFIT_PROGRAM AND PGM.EFFDT = O.EFFDT AND PGM.BENEFIT_PROGRAM = :benefitProgram AND PGM.EFFDT = to_date(:effdt,'DD-MON-YYYY') AND NOT ( O.ELIG_RULES_ID IN ('2009','236Q','23GC') ) AND O.OPTION_TYPE <> 'W' AND O.BENEFIT_PLAN NOT IN ( :list ) AND O.PLAN_TYPE = '31')

UPDATE PS_BEN_DEFN_OPTN D SET D.ELIG_RULES_ID = '2009' WHERE (D.BENEFIT_PROGRAM, D.EFFDT, D.PLAN_TYPE, D.BENEFIT_PLAN, D.OPTION_ID) IN (SELECT O.BENEFIT_PROGRAM, O.EFFDT, O.PLAN_TYPE, O.BENEFIT_PLAN, O.OPTION_ID FROM PS_BEN_DEFN_OPTN O, PS_BEN_DEFN_PGM PGM WHERE O.BENEFIT_PROGRAM = PGM.BENEFIT_PROGRAM AND PGM.EFFDT = O.EFFDT AND PGM.BENEFIT_PROGRAM = :benefitProgram AND PGM.EFFDT = to_date(:effdt,'DD-MON-YYYY') AND NOT ( O.ELIG_RULES_ID IN ('2009','236Q','23GC') ) AND O.OPTION_TYPE <> 'W' AND O.BENEFIT_PLAN NOT IN ( :list ) AND O.PLAN_TYPE = '30')

UPDATE PS_BEN_DEFN_OPTN D SET D.ELIG_RULES_ID = '2009' WHERE (D.BENEFIT_PROGRAM, D.EFFDT, D.PLAN_TYPE, D.BENEFIT_PLAN, D.OPTION_ID) IN (SELECT O.BENEFIT_PROGRAM, O.EFFDT, O.PLAN_TYPE, O.BENEFIT_PLAN, O.OPTION_ID FROM PS_BEN_DEFN_OPTN O, PS_BEN_DEFN_PGM PGM WHERE O.BENEFIT_PROGRAM = PGM.BENEFIT_PROGRAM AND PGM.EFFDT = O.EFFDT AND PGM.BENEFIT_PROGRAM = :benefitProgram AND PGM.EFFDT = to_date(:effdt,'DD-MON-YYYY') AND NOT ( O.ELIG_RULES_ID IN ('2009','236Q','23GC') ) AND O.OPTION_TYPE <> 'W' AND O.BENEFIT_PLAN NOT IN ( :list ) AND O.PLAN_TYPE IN ('60','61'))
DELETE PS_BEN_DEFN_PLAN WHERE BENEFIT_PROGRAM = :benProg AND EFFDT = to_date(:effdt,'DD-MON-YYYY') AND PLAN_TYPE = 'A3'
DELETE PS_BEN_DEFN_OPTN WHERE BENEFIT_PROGRAM = :benProg AND EFFDT = to_date(:effdt,'DD-MON-YYYY') AND PLAN_TYPE = 'A3'
DELETE PS_BEN_DEFN_COST WHERE BENEFIT_PROGRAM = :benProg AND EFFDT = to_date(:effdt,'DD-MON-YYYY') AND PLAN_TYPE = 'A3'
UPDATE PS_BEN_DEFN_PLAN SET WAIVE_COVERAGE = 'X' WHERE BENEFIT_PROGRAM = :benProg AND EFFDT = to_date(:effdt,'DD-MON-YYYY') AND PLAN_TYPE in (:planTypes)
DELETE PS_BEN_DEFN_OPTN WHERE BENEFIT_PROGRAM = :benProg AND EFFDT = to_date(:effdt,'DD-MON-YYYY') AND PLAN_TYPE in (:planTypes) AND OPTION_TYPE = 'W'

UPDATE PS_BEN_DEFN_COST CST SET CST.RATE_TYPE = '7', CST.RATE_TBL_ID = :clientRateID WHERE CST.PLAN_TYPE IN ( :planTypes ) AND CST.BENEFIT_PROGRAM = :benProgram AND CST.EFFDT = to_date(:effdt,'DD-MON-YYYY') AND CST.COST_TYPE = 'P' AND ( CST.BENEFIT_PROGRAM, CST.EFFDT, CST.PLAN_TYPE, CST.OPTION_ID ) IN ( SELECT OPT.BENEFIT_PROGRAM, OPT.EFFDT, OPT.PLAN_TYPE, OPT.OPTION_ID FROM PS_BEN_DEFN_OPTN OPT WHERE OPT.BENEFIT_PROGRAM = CST.BENEFIT_PROGRAM AND OPT.EFFDT = CST.EFFDT AND OPT.BENEFIT_PLAN <> '0003M3' AND OPT.OPTION_TYPE = 'O' AND NOT OPT.ELIG_RULES_ID IN ('2009','236Q','23GC') )

INSERT INTO PS_BEN_DEFN_COST ( BENEFIT_PROGRAM, EFFDT, PLAN_TYPE, OPTION_ID, COST_ID , COST_TYPE, ERNCD, RATE_TYPE, RATE_TBL_ID, CALC_RULES_ID ) SELECT BENEFIT_PROGRAM, EFFDT, PLAN_TYPE, OPTION_ID, COST_ID, COST_TYPE , ERNCD, RATE_TYPE, RATE_TBL_ID, CALC_RULES_ID FROM ( SELECT OP.BENEFIT_PROGRAM , OP.EFFDT , OP.PLAN_TYPE , OP.OPTION_ID , ( ( SELECT NVL( MAX(COST_ID), 0 ) AS MAX_COST_ID FROM PS_BEN_DEFN_COST CS WHERE CS.BENEFIT_PROGRAM = OP.BENEFIT_PROGRAM AND CS.EFFDT = OP.EFFDT ) + ROWNUM ) AS COST_ID , 'C' AS COST_TYPE , :erncd AS ERNCD , '2' AS RATE_TYPE , CASE OP.COVRG_CD WHEN '1' THEN :rateId1 WHEN '2' THEN :rateId2 WHEN 'C' THEN :rateIdC WHEN '4' THEN :rateId4 WHEN '5' THEN :rateId5 WHEN '6' THEN :rateId6 WHEN '7' THEN :rateId7 WHEN '8' THEN :rateId8 END AS RATE_TBL_ID , 'PSX' AS CALC_RULES_ID FROM PS_BEN_DEFN_OPTN OP WHERE OP.BENEFIT_PROGRAM = :benefitProgram AND OP.EFFDT = TO_DATE( :effdtStr, 'DD-MON-YYYY' ) AND OP.PLAN_TYPE IN ('10','15') AND OP.BENEFIT_PLAN != '0003M3' AND OP.OPTION_TYPE = 'O' AND NOT ( OP.ELIG_RULES_ID IN ('2009','23GC','236Q') ) ) WHERE RATE_TBL_ID IS NOT NULL

MERGE INTO PS_BEN_DEFN_COST TGT USING ( SELECT OP.BENEFIT_PROGRAM, OP.EFFDT, OP.PLAN_TYPE, OP.OPTION_ID, OP.BENEFIT_PLAN, OP.COVRG_CD , CS.COST_ID, CS.COST_TYPE, CS.ERNCD, ? AS RATE_TYPE, ? AS RATE_TBL_ID, CS.CALC_RULES_ID FROM PS_BEN_DEFN_OPTN OP LEFT OUTER JOIN PS_BEN_DEFN_COST CS ON CS.BENEFIT_PROGRAM = OP.BENEFIT_PROGRAM AND CS.EFFDT = OP.EFFDT AND CS.PLAN_TYPE = OP.PLAN_TYPE AND CS.OPTION_ID = OP.OPTION_ID AND CS.COST_TYPE = 'C' AND CS.ERNCD = ? WHERE OP.BENEFIT_PROGRAM = ? AND OP.EFFDT = TO_DATE( ? , 'DD-MON-YYYY' ) AND OP.PLAN_TYPE = ? AND OP.BENEFIT_PLAN = ? AND OP.COVRG_CD = ? ) SRC
ON ( TGT.BENEFIT_PROGRAM = SRC.BENEFIT_PROGRAM AND TGT.EFFDT = SRC.EFFDT AND TGT.PLAN_TYPE = SRC.PLAN_TYPE AND TGT.OPTION_ID = SRC.OPTION_ID AND TGT.COST_ID = SRC.COST_ID )
WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT ( TGT.BENEFIT_PROGRAM, TGT.EFFDT, TGT.PLAN_TYPE, TGT.OPTION_ID , TGT.COST_ID , TGT.COST_TYPE, TGT.ERNCD, TGT.RATE_TYPE, TGT.RATE_TBL_ID, TGT.CALC_RULES_ID ) VALUES ( SRC.BENEFIT_PROGRAM, SRC.EFFDT, SRC.PLAN_TYPE, SRC.OPTION_ID , ( SELECT NVL( MAX(COST_ID) + 1, 1 ) FROM PS_BEN_DEFN_COST CS WHERE CS.BENEFIT_PROGRAM = SRC.BENEFIT_PROGRAM AND CS.EFFDT = SRC.EFFDT ) , 'C', ? , ? , ? , 'PSX' )
WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET TGT.RATE_TYPE = SRC.RATE_TYPE , TGT.RATE_TBL_ID = SRC.RATE_TBL_ID

MERGE INTO PS_BN_RATE_DATA A USING ( SELECT ? AS RATE_TBL_ID , TO_DATE( ? , 'DD-MON-YYYY' ) AS EFFDT , ? AS BN_RATE_KEY01 , ? AS BN_RATE_KEY02 , ' ' AS BN_RATE_KEY03 , ? AS BN_EMPL_RATE , ? AS BN_EMPLR_RATE , 0 AS BN_B_TAX_RATE , 0 AS BN_A_TAX_RATE , 0 AS BN_N_TAX_RATE , 0 AS BN_T_TAX_RATE , 0 AS BN_P_TAX_RATE , ' ' AS OTHER_RATES_EXIST , ? AS T2_PROV_COVRG_RATE , ? AS PF_CLIENT FROM DUAL ) B ON ( A.RATE_TBL_ID = B.RATE_TBL_ID AND A.EFFDT = B.EFFDT AND A.BN_RATE_KEY01 = B.BN_RATE_KEY01 AND A.BN_RATE_KEY02 = B.BN_RATE_KEY02 AND A.BN_RATE_KEY03 = B.BN_RATE_KEY03 )
WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT ( RATE_TBL_ID , EFFDT , BN_RATE_KEY01 , BN_RATE_KEY02 , BN_RATE_KEY03 , BN_EMPL_RATE , BN_EMPLR_RATE , BN_B_TAX_RATE , BN_A_TAX_RATE , BN_N_TAX_RATE , BN_T_TAX_RATE , BN_P_TAX_RATE , OTHER_RATES_EXIST , T2_PROV_COVRG_RATE , PF_CLIENT ) VALUES ( B.RATE_TBL_ID , B.EFFDT , B.BN_RATE_KEY01 , B.BN_RATE_KEY02 , B.BN_RATE_KEY03 , B.BN_EMPL_RATE , B.BN_EMPLR_RATE , B.BN_B_TAX_RATE , B.BN_A_TAX_RATE , B.BN_N_TAX_RATE , B.BN_T_TAX_RATE , B.BN_P_TAX_RATE , B.OTHER_RATES_EXIST , B.T2_PROV_COVRG_RATE , B.PF_CLIENT )
WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET A.BN_EMPL_RATE = B.BN_EMPL_RATE , A.BN_EMPLR_RATE = B.BN_EMPLR_RATE , A.BN_B_TAX_RATE = B.BN_B_TAX_RATE , A.BN_A_TAX_RATE = B.BN_A_TAX_RATE , A.BN_N_TAX_RATE = B.BN_N_TAX_RATE , A.BN_T_TAX_RATE = B.BN_T_TAX_RATE , A.BN_P_TAX_RATE = B.BN_P_TAX_RATE , A.OTHER_RATES_EXIST = B.OTHER_RATES_EXIST , A.T2_PROV_COVRG_RATE = B.T2_PROV_COVRG_RATE , A.PF_CLIENT = B.PF_CLIENT

INSERT INTO PS_BN_RATE_DATA ( RATE_TBL_ID, EFFDT, BN_RATE_KEY01, BN_RATE_KEY02, BN_RATE_KEY03, BN_EMPL_RATE, BN_EMPLR_RATE, BN_B_TAX_RATE, BN_A_TAX_RATE, BN_N_TAX_RATE, BN_T_TAX_RATE, BN_P_TAX_RATE, OTHER_RATES_EXIST, T2_PROV_COVRG_RATE, PF_CLIENT ) VALUES ( ? , to_date( ? , 'DD-MON-YYYY'), ? , ? , ' ', ? , ? , 0, 0, 0, 0, 0, ' ', ( SELECT CASE ? WHEN '1' THEN MST.T2_PROV_COVRG_AMT1 WHEN '2' THEN MST.T2_PROV_COVRG_AMT2 WHEN 'C' THEN MST.T2_PROV_COVRG_AMTC WHEN '4' THEN MST.T2_PROV_COVRG_AMT4 WHEN '81' THEN MST.T2_PROV_COVRG_AMT2 WHEN '82' THEN MST.T2_PROV_COVRG_AMTC WHEN '83' THEN MST.T2_PROV_COVRG_AMT5 WHEN '84' THEN MST.T2_PROV_COVRG_AMT6 WHEN '85' THEN MST.T2_PROV_COVRG_AMT7 WHEN '86' THEN MST.T2_PROV_COVRG_AMT8 WHEN '5' THEN MST.T2_PROV_COVRG_AMT5 WHEN '6' THEN MST.T2_PROV_COVRG_AMT6 WHEN '7' THEN MST.T2_PROV_COVRG_AMT7 WHEN '8' THEN MST.T2_PROV_COVRG_AMT8 ELSE 0 END AS PROVIDER_RATE FROM PS_T2_MTR_RATE_TBL MST WHERE MST.PLAN_TYPE = ? AND MST.BENEFIT_PLAN = ? AND MST.T2_OE_QUARTER = ? AND MST.EFFDT = ( SELECT MAX(EFFDT) FROM PS_T2_MTR_RATE_TBL M1 WHERE M1.PLAN_TYPE = MST.PLAN_TYPE AND M1.BENEFIT_PLAN = MST.BENEFIT_PLAN AND M1.T2_BAND_CD = MST.T2_BAND_CD AND M1.T2_OE_QUARTER = MST.T2_OE_QUARTER AND M1.EFFDT <= to_date( ? ,'DD-MON-YYYY') ) AND MST.T2_BAND_CD = ? ), ? )

INSERT INTO PS_BN_RATE_DATA ( RATE_TBL_ID, EFFDT, BN_RATE_KEY01, BN_RATE_KEY02, BN_RATE_KEY03, BN_EMPL_RATE, BN_EMPLR_RATE, BN_B_TAX_RATE, BN_A_TAX_RATE, BN_N_TAX_RATE, BN_T_TAX_RATE, BN_P_TAX_RATE, OTHER_RATES_EXIST, T2_PROV_COVRG_RATE, PF_CLIENT ) VALUES ( ? , to_date( ? , 'DD-MON-YYYY'), ? , ? , ' ', ? , ? , 0, 0, 0, 0, 0, ' ', ?, ?)

SELECT DISTINCT OP.CROSS_BENEF_PLAN AS Selected_Plan, OP.BENEFIT_PLAN AS DP_Plan FROM PS_BEN_DEFN_OPTN OP WHERE OP.BENEFIT_PROGRAM = ( SELECT CASE WHEN :benProgFlag = 'K1' THEN CP.CLONE_K1_BENPGM ELSE CP.CLONE_BENPGM END AS BENEFIT_PROGRAM FROM XBSS_REALM_CLONE_PGM@HPDB_HRDB CP , XBSS_REALM_PLAN_YEAR@HPDB_HRDB RPY WHERE RPY.ID = :realmYearId AND CP.OE_QUARTER = RPY.OE_QUARTER AND RPY.PLAN_YEAR_START BETWEEN CP.EFFDT AND CP.ENDDT ) AND OP.EFFDT = (SELECT MAX( EFFDT ) FROM PS_BEN_DEFN_OPTN O1 WHERE O1.BENEFIT_PROGRAM = OP.BENEFIT_PROGRAM AND O1.EFFDT <= TO_DATE( :effdt, 'DD-MON-YYYY' )) AND OP.OPTION_TYPE = 'O' AND OP.PLAN_TYPE IN ( '15', '16', '17', '1E', '1U' )

SELECT DISTINCT OP.CROSS_BENEF_PLAN AS HDHP_Plan, OP.BENEFIT_PLAN AS HSA_Plan FROM PS_BEN_DEFN_OPTN OP WHERE OP.BENEFIT_PROGRAM = ( SELECT CASE WHEN :benProgFlag = 'K1' THEN CP.CLONE_K1_BENPGM ELSE CP.CLONE_BENPGM END AS BENEFIT_PROGRAM FROM XBSS_REALM_CLONE_PGM@HPDB_HRDB CP , XBSS_REALM_PLAN_YEAR@HPDB_HRDB RPY WHERE RPY.ID = :realmYearId AND CP.OE_QUARTER = RPY.OE_QUARTER AND RPY.PLAN_YEAR_START BETWEEN CP.EFFDT AND CP.ENDDT ) AND OP.EFFDT = (SELECT MAX( EFFDT ) FROM PS_BEN_DEFN_OPTN O1 WHERE O1.BENEFIT_PROGRAM = OP.BENEFIT_PROGRAM AND O1.EFFDT <= TO_DATE( :effdt, 'DD-MON-YYYY' )) AND NOT ( OP.ELIG_RULES_ID IN ('2009','23GC','236Q') ) AND OP.OPTION_TYPE = 'O' AND OP.PLAN_TYPE = '67' AND OP.OPTION_CD LIKE '%0'

SELECT DISTINCT OP.CROSS_BENEF_PLAN AS HDHP_Plan, OP.BENEFIT_PLAN AS HSA_Plan FROM PS_BEN_DEFN_OPTN OP WHERE OP.BENEFIT_PROGRAM = ( SELECT CASE WHEN :benProgFlag = 'K1' THEN CP.CLONE_K1_BENPGM ELSE CP.CLONE_BENPGM END AS BENEFIT_PROGRAM FROM XBSS_REALM_CLONE_PGM@HPDB_HRDB CP , XBSS_REALM_PLAN_YEAR@HPDB_HRDB RPY WHERE RPY.ID = :realmYearId AND CP.OE_QUARTER = RPY.OE_QUARTER AND RPY.PLAN_YEAR_START BETWEEN CP.EFFDT AND CP.ENDDT ) AND OP.EFFDT = (SELECT MAX( EFFDT ) FROM PS_BEN_DEFN_OPTN O1 WHERE O1.BENEFIT_PROGRAM = OP.BENEFIT_PROGRAM AND O1.EFFDT <= TO_DATE( :effdt, 'DD-MON-YYYY' )) AND NOT ( OP.ELIG_RULES_ID IN ('2009','23GC','236Q') ) AND OP.OPTION_TYPE = 'O' AND OP.PLAN_TYPE = '67'
select count(*) from SYSADM.PS_BEN_DEFN_PLAN where BENEFIT_PROGRAM = :benProgram and PLAN_TYPE = 'A3' and EFFDT = to_date(:effdt,'DD-MON-YYYY')

INSERT INTO PS_BEN_DEFN_PLAN( BENEFIT_PROGRAM, EFFDT, PLAN_TYPE, DISPLAY_PLN_SEQ, MIN_ANNUAL_CONTRIB , MAX_ANNUAL_CONTRIB, WAIVE_COVERAGE, RESTRICT_ENTRY_MM, EVENT_RULES_ID, COBRA_PLAN, HIPAA_PLAN , COLLECT_DEPBEN, COLLECT_FUNDS, SHOW_PLAN_TYPE, HANDBOOK_URL_ID, DEP_RULE_ID ) ( SELECT :benProgram, TO_DATE( :effdt, 'DD-MON-YYYY' ), 'A3', A.DISPLAY_PLN_SEQ, A.MIN_ANNUAL_CONTRIB , A.MAX_ANNUAL_CONTRIB, A.WAIVE_COVERAGE, A.RESTRICT_ENTRY_MM, A.EVENT_RULES_ID, A.COBRA_PLAN, A.HIPAA_PLAN , A.COLLECT_DEPBEN, A.COLLECT_FUNDS, A.SHOW_PLAN_TYPE, A.HANDBOOK_URL_ID, A.DEP_RULE_ID FROM PS_BEN_DEFN_PLAN A WHERE A.BENEFIT_PROGRAM = ( SELECT CASE WHEN :benProgFlag = 'K1' THEN CP.CLONE_K1_BENPGM ELSE CP.CLONE_BENPGM END AS BENEFIT_PROGRAM FROM XBSS_REALM_CLONE_PGM@HPDB_HRDB CP , XBSS_REALM_PLAN_YEAR@HPDB_HRDB RPY WHERE RPY.ID = :realmYearId AND CP.OE_QUARTER = RPY.OE_QUARTER AND RPY.PLAN_YEAR_START BETWEEN CP.EFFDT AND CP.ENDDT ) AND A.PLAN_TYPE = 'A3' AND A.EFFDT = ( SELECT MAX(EFFDT) FROM PS_BEN_DEFN_PLAN A1 WHERE A1.BENEFIT_PROGRAM = A.BENEFIT_PROGRAM AND A1.PLAN_TYPE = A.PLAN_TYPE AND A1.EFFDT <= TO_DATE( :effdt, 'DD-MON-YYYY' ) ))

INSERT INTO PS_BEN_DEFN_COST( BENEFIT_PROGRAM, EFFDT, PLAN_TYPE, OPTION_ID, COST_ID, COST_TYPE , ERNCD, RATE_TYPE, RATE_TBL_ID, CALC_RULES_ID ) ( SELECT :benProgram, TO_DATE( :effdt, 'DD-MON-YYYY' ), 'A3', OPTION_ID, COST_ID, COST_TYPE , ERNCD, RATE_TYPE, RATE_TBL_ID, CALC_RULES_ID FROM PS_BEN_DEFN_COST A WHERE A.BENEFIT_PROGRAM = ( SELECT CASE WHEN :benProgFlag = 'K1' THEN CP.CLONE_K1_BENPGM ELSE CP.CLONE_BENPGM END AS BENEFIT_PROGRAM FROM XBSS_REALM_CLONE_PGM@HPDB_HRDB CP , XBSS_REALM_PLAN_YEAR@HPDB_HRDB RPY WHERE RPY.ID = :realmYearId AND CP.OE_QUARTER = RPY.OE_QUARTER AND RPY.PLAN_YEAR_START BETWEEN CP.EFFDT AND CP.ENDDT ) AND A.PLAN_TYPE = 'A3' AND A.EFFDT = ( SELECT MAX(EFFDT) FROM PS_BEN_DEFN_PLAN A1 WHERE A1.BENEFIT_PROGRAM = A.BENEFIT_PROGRAM AND A1.PLAN_TYPE = A.PLAN_TYPE AND A1.EFFDT <= TO_DATE( :effdt, 'DD-MON-YYYY' ) ))

INSERT INTO PS_BEN_DEFN_OPTN( BENEFIT_PROGRAM, EFFDT, PLAN_TYPE, OPTION_ID, DISPLAY_OPT_SEQ , OPTION_TYPE, BENEFIT_PLAN, COVRG_CD, OPTION_CD, OPTION_LVL, DEDCD, DFLT_OPTION_IND , ELIG_RULES_ID, LOCATION_TBL_ID, CROSS_PLAN_TYPE, CROSS_BENEF_PLAN, COVERAGE_LIMIT_PCT , CROSS_PLN_DPND_CHK ) ( SELECT :benProgram, TO_DATE( :effdt, 'DD-MON-YYYY' ), 'A3', OPTION_ID, DISPLAY_OPT_SEQ , OPTION_TYPE, BENEFIT_PLAN, COVRG_CD, OPTION_CD, OPTION_LVL, DEDCD, DFLT_OPTION_IND , ELIG_RULES_ID, LOCATION_TBL_ID, CROSS_PLAN_TYPE, CROSS_BENEF_PLAN, COVERAGE_LIMIT_PCT , CROSS_PLN_DPND_CHK FROM PS_BEN_DEFN_OPTN A WHERE A.BENEFIT_PROGRAM = ( SELECT CASE WHEN :benProgFlag = 'K1' THEN CP.CLONE_K1_BENPGM ELSE CP.CLONE_BENPGM END AS BENEFIT_PROGRAM FROM XBSS_REALM_CLONE_PGM@HPDB_HRDB CP , XBSS_REALM_PLAN_YEAR@HPDB_HRDB RPY WHERE RPY.ID = :realmYearId AND CP.OE_QUARTER = RPY.OE_QUARTER AND RPY.PLAN_YEAR_START BETWEEN CP.EFFDT AND CP.ENDDT ) AND A.PLAN_TYPE = 'A3' AND A.EFFDT = ( SELECT MAX(EFFDT) FROM PS_BEN_DEFN_PLAN A1 WHERE A1.BENEFIT_PROGRAM = A.BENEFIT_PROGRAM AND A1.PLAN_TYPE = A.PLAN_TYPE AND A1.EFFDT <= TO_DATE( :effdt, 'DD-MON-YYYY' ) ))

select op.benefit_plan from ps_ben_defn_optn op where op.benefit_program = :benProgram and op.plan_type in (:planTypes) and op.option_type = 'O' and op.effdt = (select max(op_ed.effdt) from ps_ben_defn_optn op_ed where op.benefit_program = op_ed.benefit_program and op_ed.effdt <= TO_DATE(:effdt, 'DD-MON-YYYY'))

MERGE INTO PS_BN_RATE_TBL TGT USING ( SELECT ? AS RATE_TBL_ID , TO_DATE( ? , 'DD-MON-YYYY' ) AS EFFDT , 'A' AS EFF_STATUS , ? AS RATE_TYPE , SUBSTR( ? , 1, 30 ) AS DESCR , SUBSTR( ? , 1, 10 ) AS DESCRSHORT , 'M' AS PAY_FREQUENCY , '1' AS RATE_UNIT , 'USD' AS CURRENCY_CD , 'N' AS RATE_LIMIT_CD , 0 AS FLAT_AMT_LIMIT , 0 AS PCT_RATE_LIMIT , ? AS PF_CLIENT FROM DUAL ) SRC
ON ( TGT.RATE_TBL_ID = SRC.RATE_TBL_ID AND TGT.EFFDT = SRC.EFFDT )
WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT( TGT.RATE_TBL_ID, TGT.EFFDT, TGT.EFF_STATUS, TGT.RATE_TYPE, TGT.DESCR , TGT.DESCRSHORT, TGT.PAY_FREQUENCY, TGT.RATE_UNIT, TGT.CURRENCY_CD , TGT.RATE_LIMIT_CD, TGT.FLAT_AMT_LIMIT, TGT.PCT_RATE_LIMIT, TGT.PF_CLIENT ) VALUES ( SRC.RATE_TBL_ID, SRC.EFFDT, SRC.EFF_STATUS, SRC.RATE_TYPE, SRC.DESCR , SRC.DESCRSHORT, SRC.PAY_FREQUENCY, SRC.RATE_UNIT, SRC.CURRENCY_CD , SRC.RATE_LIMIT_CD, SRC.FLAT_AMT_LIMIT, SRC.PCT_RATE_LIMIT, SRC.PF_CLIENT )
WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET TGT.EFF_STATUS = SRC.EFF_STATUS , TGT.RATE_TYPE = SRC.RATE_TYPE , TGT.DESCR = SRC.DESCR , TGT.DESCRSHORT = SRC.DESCRSHORT , TGT.PAY_FREQUENCY = SRC.PAY_FREQUENCY , TGT.RATE_UNIT = SRC.RATE_UNIT , TGT.CURRENCY_CD = SRC.CURRENCY_CD , TGT.RATE_LIMIT_CD = SRC.RATE_LIMIT_CD , TGT.FLAT_AMT_LIMIT = SRC.FLAT_AMT_LIMIT , TGT.PCT_RATE_LIMIT = SRC.PCT_RATE_LIMIT , TGT.PF_CLIENT = SRC.PF_CLIENT
Delete from ps_bn_rate_data where rate_tbl_id = :rateTblId and effdt = TO_DATE(:effdtStr, 'DD-MON-YYYY') and pf_client = :pfClient

DELETE FROM PS_BN_RATE_TBL RT WHERE RT.RATE_TBL_ID = :rateTblId AND RT.EFFDT > TO_DATE( :effdtStr, 'DD-MON-YYYY' ) AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 'X' FROM PS_BN_RATE_DATA RD WHERE RD.RATE_TBL_ID = RT.RATE_TBL_ID AND RD.EFFDT = RT.EFFDT )
DELETE FROM PS_BN_RATE_DATA WHERE RATE_TBL_ID = :rateTblId AND EFFDT > TO_DATE( :effdtStr, 'DD-MON-YYYY' )
UPDATE PS_BEN_DEFN_PLAN SET WAIVE_COVERAGE = 'Y' WHERE BENEFIT_PROGRAM = :benProgram AND EFFDT = TO_DATE(:effdt, 'DD-MON-YYYY') AND PLAN_TYPE NOT in ('23') AND PLAN_TYPE = :planType
UPDATE PS_BEN_DEFN_PLAN SET WAIVE_COVERAGE = 'N' WHERE BENEFIT_PROGRAM = :benProgram AND EFFDT = TO_DATE(:effdt, 'DD-MON-YYYY') AND PLAN_TYPE in ('23','30','31','A3')

INSERT INTO PS_BEN_DEFN_OPTN( BENEFIT_PROGRAM, EFFDT, PLAN_TYPE, OPTION_ID, DISPLAY_OPT_SEQ , OPTION_TYPE, BENEFIT_PLAN, COVRG_CD, OPTION_CD, OPTION_LVL, DEDCD, DFLT_OPTION_IND , ELIG_RULES_ID, LOCATION_TBL_ID, CROSS_PLAN_TYPE, CROSS_BENEF_PLAN, COVERAGE_LIMIT_PCT , CROSS_PLN_DPND_CHK ) ( SELECT :benProgram, TO_DATE( :effdt, 'DD-MON-YYYY' ), OP.PLAN_TYPE, ( SELECT MAX( OPTION_ID ) + 1 FROM PS_BEN_DEFN_OPTN OPID WHERE OPID.BENEFIT_PROGRAM = :benProgram AND OPID.PLAN_TYPE = :planType AND OPID.EFFDT = TO_DATE( :effdt, 'DD-MON-YYYY') ) , OP.DISPLAY_OPT_SEQ, OP.OPTION_TYPE, OP.BENEFIT_PLAN, OP.COVRG_CD, OP.OPTION_CD, OP.OPTION_LVL , OP.DEDCD, OP.DFLT_OPTION_IND, OP.ELIG_RULES_ID, OP.LOCATION_TBL_ID, OP.CROSS_PLAN_TYPE , OP.CROSS_BENEF_PLAN, OP.COVERAGE_LIMIT_PCT, OP.CROSS_PLN_DPND_CHK FROM PS_BEN_DEFN_OPTN OP WHERE OP.BENEFIT_PROGRAM = ( SELECT CASE WHEN :benProgFlag = 'K1' THEN CP.CLONE_K1_BENPGM ELSE CP.CLONE_BENPGM END AS BENEFIT_PROGRAM FROM XBSS_REALM_CLONE_PGM@HPDB_HRDB CP , XBSS_REALM_PLAN_YEAR@HPDB_HRDB RPY WHERE RPY.ID = :realmYearId AND CP.OE_QUARTER = RPY.OE_QUARTER AND RPY.PLAN_YEAR_START BETWEEN CP.EFFDT AND CP.ENDDT ) AND OP.PLAN_TYPE = :planType AND OP.OPTION_TYPE = 'W' AND OP.EFFDT = (SELECT MAX( EFFDT ) FROM PS_BEN_DEFN_PGM P1 WHERE P1.BENEFIT_PROGRAM = OP.BENEFIT_PROGRAM AND P1.EFFDT <= TO_DATE( :effdt, 'DD-MON-YYYY' )) )
select count(*) from PS_BEN_DEFN_OPTN OP WHERE OP.BENEFIT_PROGRAM = :benProgram AND OP.PLAN_TYPE = :planType AND OP.OPTION_TYPE = 'W' AND OP.EFFDT = TO_DATE(:effdt, 'DD-MON-YYYY')

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM PERSON_EMPLYMNT PE , ALLROLES_VW VW WHERE PE.COMPANY = :company AND PE.PERSONID IN ( SELECT PERSONID FROM PERSON_KEYS WHERE PERS_KEY = :personid ) AND PE.ENDDT = DATE '2099-12-31' AND PE.EMPLYMNT_STATUS = 'A' AND VW.PERSONID = PE.PERSONID AND VW.ORGID = PE.COMPANY AND VW.S_ROLE IN ('SPC_TA','CDM')

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ( SELECT 'exists' FROM PERSON_EMPLYMNT@HPDB_HRDB PE , ALLROLES_VW@HPDB_HRDB VW WHERE PE.COMPANY = '001' AND PE.PERSONID IN ( SELECT PERSONID FROM PERSON_KEYS@HPDB_HRDB WHERE PERS_KEY = :personid ) AND PE.ENDDT = DATE '2099-12-31' AND PE.EMPLYMNT_STATUS = 'A' AND VW.PERSONID = PE.PERSONID AND VW.ORGID = PE.COMPANY AND VW.S_ROLE IN ('AMB_HRADMIN','AMB_HRADMIN1','BSS_CLNT_EDT','BSS_ENG_SUP') UNION SELECT 'exists' FROM PS_JOB A, PS_T2_HRP_PS_XLAT B WHERE B.T2_HRP_PERSONID IN ( SELECT PERSONID FROM PERSON_KEYS@HPDB_HRDB WHERE PERS_KEY = :personid ) AND A.EMPLID = B.EMPLID AND A.EMPL_STATUS = 'A' AND A.EFFDT = ( SELECT MAX(A_ED.EFFDT) FROM PS_JOB A_ED WHERE A.EMPLID = A_ED.EMPLID AND A.EMPL_RCD = A_ED.EMPL_RCD AND A_ED.EFFDT <= SYSDATE ) AND A.EFFSEQ = ( SELECT MAX(A_EF.EFFSEQ) FROM PS_JOB A_EF WHERE A.EMPLID = A_EF.EMPLID AND A.EMPL_RCD = A_EF.EMPL_RCD AND A_EF.EFFDT = A.EFFDT ) AND A.DEPTID IN ( SELECT DEPARTMENT FROM XBSS_SEARCH_ACCESS_CONTROL@HPDB_HRDB WHERE REALM_ID = :realmYearId ) AND A.COMPANY = '001' )

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM PS_JOB J WHERE J.EMPLID = :emplid AND J.COMPANY = :company AND J.EMPL_STATUS = 'A' AND J.EFFDT = ( SELECT MAX(EFFDT) FROM PS_JOB J1 WHERE J1.EMPLID = J.EMPLID AND J1.EMPL_RCD = J.EMPL_RCD AND J1.EFFDT <= sysdate ) AND J.EFFSEQ = ( SELECT MAX(EFFSEQ) FROM PS_JOB J2 WHERE J2.EMPLID = J.EMPLID AND J2.EMPL_RCD = J.EMPL_RCD AND J2.EFFDT = J.EFFDT )

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM PERSON_EMPLYMNT PE , ALLROLES_VW VW WHERE PE.COMPANY = '001' AND PE.PERSONID IN ( SELECT PERSONID FROM PERSON_KEYS WHERE PERS_KEY = :personid ) AND PE.ENDDT = DATE '2099-12-31' AND PE.EMPLYMNT_STATUS = 'A' AND VW.PERSONID = PE.PERSONID AND VW.ORGID = PE.COMPANY AND VW.S_ROLE IN ('BMG', 'BSS_CLNT_VW')

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM PERSON_EMPLYMNT PE , ALLROLES_VW VW WHERE PE.COMPANY = '001' AND PE.PERSONID IN ( SELECT PERSONID FROM PERSON_KEYS WHERE PERS_KEY = :personid ) AND PE.ENDDT = DATE '2099-12-31' AND PE.EMPLYMNT_STATUS = 'A' AND VW.PERSONID = PE.PERSONID AND VW.ORGID = PE.COMPANY AND VW.S_ROLE IN ('TMT', 'BSS_CLNT_SUB')

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM PERSON_EMPLYMNT PE , ALLROLES_VW VW WHERE PE.COMPANY = '001' AND PE.PERSONID IN ( SELECT PERSONID FROM PERSON_KEYS WHERE PERS_KEY = :personid ) AND PE.ENDDT = DATE '2099-12-31' AND PE.EMPLYMNT_STATUS = 'A' AND VW.PERSONID = PE.PERSONID AND VW.ORGID = PE.COMPANY AND VW.S_ROLE = 'BEN_CORP_AD'

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM PERSON_EMPLYMNT PE , ALLROLES_VW VW WHERE PE.COMPANY = :company AND PE.PERSONID IN ( SELECT PERSONID FROM PERSON_KEYS WHERE PERS_KEY = :personid ) AND PE.ENDDT = DATE '2099-12-31' AND PE.EMPLYMNT_STATUS = 'A' AND VW.PERSONID = PE.PERSONID AND VW.ORGID = PE.COMPANY AND VW.S_ROLE = 'BEN_ADVISOR'

SELECT COUNT( * ) FROM PS_JOB A WHERE A.COMPANY = :company AND A.BEN_STATUS IN ('A', 'P', 'U') AND NOT ( A.EMPLID LIKE 'C%' ) AND NOT ( A.EMPL_CLASS = 'U' ) AND A.EFFDT = (SELECT MAX( EFFDT ) FROM PS_JOB A1 WHERE A1.EMPLID = A.EMPLID AND A1.EMPL_RCD = A.EMPL_RCD ) AND A.EFFSEQ = (SELECT MAX( EFFSEQ ) FROM PS_JOB A2 WHERE A2.EMPLID = A.EMPLID AND A2.EMPL_RCD = A.EMPL_RCD AND A2.EFFDT = A.EFFDT )

WITH ELIG_BY_BEN_PROG AS ( SELECT E.FUTURE_BENEFIT_PROGRAM AS BEN_PROG, LOC.STATE, COUNT(*) AS STATE_COUNT FROM PS_JOB J, PS_LOCATION_TBL LOC, XBSS_EMPL_STRATEGY_GROUP_VW@HPDB_HRDB E WHERE J.COMPANY = :company AND NOT ( J.EMPLID LIKE 'C%' ) AND J.EFFDT = ( SELECT MAX(EFFDT) FROM PS_JOB J1 WHERE J1.EMPLID = J.EMPLID AND J1.EMPL_RCD = J.EMPL_RCD AND J1.EFFDT <= :effdt ) AND J.EFFSEQ = ( SELECT MAX(EFFSEQ) FROM PS_JOB J2 WHERE J2.EMPLID = J.EMPLID AND J2.EMPL_RCD = J.EMPL_RCD AND J2.EFFDT = J.EFFDT ) AND J.BEN_STATUS IN ('A','P','U') AND J.FULL_PART_TIME = 'F' AND J.REG_TEMP = 'R'
AND LOC.SETID = J.SETID_LOCATION AND LOC.LOCATION = J.LOCATION AND LOC.EFFDT = ( SELECT MAX(EFFDT) FROM PS_LOCATION_TBL L1 WHERE L1.SETID = LOC.SETID AND L1.LOCATION = LOC.LOCATION AND L1.EFFDT <= :effdt ) AND E.STRATEGY_ID = :strategyId AND E.EMPLID = J.EMPLID AND E.EMPL_RCD = J.EMPL_RCD AND E.REALM_YEAR_ID = :realmYrId GROUP BY E.FUTURE_BENEFIT_PROGRAM, LOC.STATE)
SELECT BEN_PROG, 'IN' AS STATE_GROUP, SUM( STATE_COUNT ) AS ELIG_COUNT FROM ELIG_BY_BEN_PROG WHERE STATE IN (:sdiStates) GROUP BY BEN_PROG, 'IN'
UNION
SELECT BEN_PROG, 'OUT' AS STATE_GROUP, SUM( STATE_COUNT ) FROM ELIG_BY_BEN_PROG WHERE NOT ( STATE IN (:sdiStates) ) GROUP BY BEN_PROG, 'OUT'

WITH ELIG_BY_BEN_PROG AS ( SELECT BPP.BENEFIT_PROGRAM, LOC.STATE, COUNT(*) AS STATE_COUNT FROM PS_JOB J , PS_LOCATION_TBL LOC , PS_BEN_PROG_PARTIC BPP WHERE J.COMPANY = :company AND NOT ( J.EMPLID LIKE 'C%' ) AND J.EFFDT = ( SELECT MAX(EFFDT) FROM PS_JOB J1 WHERE J1.EMPLID = J.EMPLID AND J1.EMPL_RCD = J.EMPL_RCD AND J1.EFFDT <= :effdt ) AND J.EFFSEQ = ( SELECT MAX(EFFSEQ) FROM PS_JOB J2 WHERE J2.EMPLID = J.EMPLID AND J2.EMPL_RCD = J.EMPL_RCD AND J2.EFFDT = J.EFFDT ) AND J.BEN_STATUS IN ('A','P','U') AND J.FULL_PART_TIME = 'F' AND J.REG_TEMP = 'R'
AND LOC.SETID = J.SETID_LOCATION AND LOC.LOCATION = J.LOCATION AND LOC.EFFDT = ( SELECT MAX(EFFDT) FROM PS_LOCATION_TBL L1 WHERE L1.SETID = LOC.SETID AND L1.LOCATION = LOC.LOCATION AND L1.EFFDT <= :effdt )
AND BPP.EMPLID = J.EMPLID AND BPP.EMPL_RCD = J.EMPL_RCD AND BPP.COBRA_EVENT_ID = 0 AND BPP.EFFDT = ( SELECT MAX(EFFDT) FROM PS_BEN_PROG_PARTIC B1 WHERE B1.EMPLID = BPP.EMPLID AND B1.EMPL_RCD = BPP.EMPL_RCD AND B1.COBRA_EVENT_ID = BPP.COBRA_EVENT_ID AND B1.EFFDT <= :effdt ) GROUP BY BPP.BENEFIT_PROGRAM, LOC.STATE )
SELECT BENEFIT_PROGRAM, 'IN' AS STATE_GROUP, SUM( STATE_COUNT ) AS ELIG_COUNT FROM ELIG_BY_BEN_PROG WHERE STATE IN (:sdiStates) GROUP BY BENEFIT_PROGRAM, 'IN'
UNION
SELECT BENEFIT_PROGRAM, 'OUT' AS STATE_GROUP, SUM( STATE_COUNT ) FROM ELIG_BY_BEN_PROG WHERE NOT ( STATE IN (:sdiStates) ) GROUP BY BENEFIT_PROGRAM, 'OUT'

SELECT DISTINCT ADDR.STATE FROM PS_JOB J , PS_ADDRESSES ADDR WHERE J.COMPANY = :company AND J.BEN_STATUS IN ('A', 'P', 'U') AND NOT ( J.EMPLID LIKE 'C%' ) AND NOT ( J.EMPL_CLASS = 'U' ) AND J.EFFDT = ( SELECT MAX(EFFDT) FROM PS_JOB J1 WHERE J1.EMPLID = J.EMPLID AND J1.EMPL_RCD = J.EMPL_RCD ) AND J.EFFSEQ = ( SELECT MAX(EFFSEQ) FROM PS_JOB J2 WHERE J2.EMPLID = J.EMPLID AND J2.EMPL_RCD = J.EMPL_RCD AND J2.EFFDT = J.EFFDT ) AND ADDR.EMPLID = J.EMPLID AND ADDR.ADDRESS_TYPE = 'HOME' AND ADDR.EFFDT = ( SELECT MAX(EFFDT) FROM PS_ADDRESSES A1 WHERE A1.EMPLID = ADDR.EMPLID AND A1.ADDRESS_TYPE = ADDR.ADDRESS_TYPE )
select Descr from PS_BENEF_PLAN_TBL where plan_type = 10 and vendor_id = 'KAISERAM' and benefit_plan in (:list) and descr like 'Kaiser HMO % CA'
select benefit_plan from PS_BENEF_PLAN_TBL where plan_type = 10 and vendor_id = 'KAISERAM' and descr in (:list)

SELECT OP.T2_PAYROLL_COORD AS EMPLID , ( SELECT TRIM( EMAIL_ADDR ) FROM PS_EMAIL_ADDRESSES WHERE EMPLID = OP.T2_PAYROLL_COORD AND E_ADDR_TYPE = 'BUSN' ) AS CSA_EMAIL FROM PS_T2_CLIENTOPTION OP WHERE OP.COMPANY = :company UNION SELECT OP1.T2_BENEFIT_CONSULT AS EMPLID , ( SELECT TRIM( EMAIL_ADDR ) FROM PS_EMAIL_ADDRESSES WHERE EMPLID = OP1.T2_BENEFIT_CONSULT AND E_ADDR_TYPE = 'BUSN' ) AS CSA_EMAIL FROM PS_T2_CLIENTOPTION OP1 WHERE OP1.COMPANY = :company UNION SELECT OP2.T2_HR_MANAGER AS EMPLID , ( SELECT TRIM( EMAIL_ADDR ) FROM PS_EMAIL_ADDRESSES WHERE EMPLID = OP2.T2_HR_MANAGER AND E_ADDR_TYPE = 'BUSN' ) AS CSA_EMAIL FROM PS_T2_CLIENTOPTION OP2 WHERE OP2.COMPANY = :company
SELECT NAME FROM V$DATABASE

SELECT ( SELECT PERS_KEY FROM PERSON_KEYS@HPDB_HRDB WHERE PERSONID = S.T2_IMPL_CONSULTANT AND PERS_KEY_TYPE = 2 ) AS CSA_EMPLID ,(SELECT TRIM( EMAIL_ADDR ) FROM PS_EMAIL_ADDRESSES WHERE EMPLID = ( SELECT PERS_KEY FROM PERSON_KEYS@HPDB_HRDB WHERE PERSONID = S.T2_IMPL_CONSULTANT AND PERS_KEY_TYPE = 2 ) AND E_ADDR_TYPE = 'BUSN' ) AS CSA_EMAIL FROM OLP_NEWACCT_SUPPORT@HPDB_HRDB S WHERE OLP_ID IN ( SELECT OLP_ID FROM OLP_COMPANY_MAPPING_TBL@HPDB_HRDB WHERE COMPANY = :company ) UNION SELECT ( SELECT PERS_KEY FROM PERSON_KEYS@HPDB_HRDB WHERE PERSONID = S.T2_HR_MANAGER AND PERS_KEY_TYPE = 2 ) AS CSA_EMPLID ,(SELECT TRIM( EMAIL_ADDR ) FROM PS_EMAIL_ADDRESSES WHERE EMPLID = ( SELECT PERS_KEY FROM PERSON_KEYS@HPDB_HRDB WHERE PERSONID = S.T2_HR_MANAGER AND PERS_KEY_TYPE = 2 ) AND E_ADDR_TYPE = 'BUSN' ) AS CSA_EMAIL FROM OLP_NEWACCT_SUPPORT@HPDB_HRDB S WHERE OLP_ID IN ( SELECT OLP_ID FROM OLP_COMPANY_MAPPING_TBL@HPDB_HRDB WHERE COMPANY = :company ) UNION SELECT OP.T2_BENEFIT_CONSULT AS CSA_EMPLID , ( SELECT TRIM( EMAIL_ADDR ) FROM PS_EMAIL_ADDRESSES WHERE EMPLID = OP.T2_BENEFIT_CONSULT AND E_ADDR_TYPE = 'BUSN' ) AS CSA_EMAIL FROM PS_T2_CLIENTOPTION OP WHERE OP.COMPANY = :company
SELECT 'YES' AS CONFIRMED FROM PS_T2_PAYROLL_HDR WHERE COMPANY = :company AND ( SEQUENCE_NBR_6 > 0 OR :company IN ('001', '002') ) AND ROWNUM = 1

SELECT CE.COMPANY FROM PS_T2_CLIENTOPTION CE WHERE CE.T2_OE_QUARTER = :quarter AND NOT (CE.PF_CLIENT = '0000' ) AND ( (:termStatus = 'ACTIVE' AND CE.T2_COMP_TERM_DT IS NULL) OR (:termStatus = 'TERMED' AND CE.T2_COMP_TERM_DT >= add_months( trunc(sysdate), -48)) ) AND CE.T2_PRODUCT_LINE NOT IN (:productLine) AND CE.PF_CORP NOT IN ('PEOCN') AND CE.COMPANY IN ( SELECT DISTINCT COMPANY FROM PS_T2_PAYROLL_HDR WHERE PF_CALC_CONFM_DTTM < :payrollCutOffDate AND SEQUENCE_NBR_6 > 0) AND (( CE.T2_PRODUCT_LINE = 'NOMD' AND CE.COMPANY IN ( SELECT DISTINCT BOE.COMPANY FROM XBSS_BEN_OFFER_EXCEPTION@HPDB_HRDB BOE, XBSS_REALM_PLAN_YEAR@HPDB_HRDB RPY1 WHERE BOE.PLAN_TYPE = '10' AND RPY1.ID = :realmYearId AND TRUNC(RPY1.PLAN_YEAR_START) BETWEEN BOE.START_DATE AND BOE.END_DATE AND BOE.ACTIVE = 1) ) OR ( CE.T2_PRODUCT_LINE = 'NOMD' AND CE.T2_PEO_ID = 'ALP' ) OR ( CE.T2_PRODUCT_LINE <> 'NOMD' )) AND 0 = ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM XBSS_SCHED_TBL@HPDB_HRDB SC WHERE SC.COMPANY = 'DEFAULT' AND SC.REALM_YEAR_ID = :realmYearId AND (SC.OPEN_DT >= TRUNC(sysdate) OR SC.EXTN_ENDDT >= TRUNC(sysdate) OR SC.CLOSE_DT >= TRUNC(sysdate))) MINUS SELECT DISTINCT CO.CODE FROM XBSS_COMPANY@HPDB_HRDB CO , XBSS_REALM@HPDB_HRDB RL , XBSS_REALM_PLAN_YEAR@HPDB_HRDB RPY , XBSS_STRATEGY@HPDB_HRDB ST WHERE CO.REALM_YEAR_ID = RPY.ID AND RPY.REALM_ID = RL.ID AND RPY.ID = :realmYearId AND ST.COMPANY_ID = CO.ID AND (ST.SUBMITTED = 1 OR ST.SUBMITDATE IS NOT NULL) MINUS SELECT SC.COMPANY FROM XBSS_SCHED_TBL@HPDB_HRDB SC WHERE (SC.OPEN_DT >= TRUNC(sysdate) OR SC.EXTN_ENDDT >= TRUNC(sysdate) OR SC.CLOSE_DT >= TRUNC(sysdate))
