SELECT CE.COMPANY FROM PS_T2_CLIENTOPTION CE WHERE CE.T2_PEO_ID = :peoId AND CE.T2_OE_QUARTER = :quarter AND NOT ( CE.PF_CLIENT = '0000' ) AND CE.T2_COMP_TERM_DT IS NULL AND CE.T2_PRODUCT_LINE not in (:productLine) AND CE.PF_CORP NOT IN ('PEOCN') AND CE.COMPANY IN ( SELECT DISTINCT COMPANY FROM PS_T2_PAYROLL_HDR WHERE PF_CALC_CONFM_DTTM < :payrollCutOffDate AND SEQUENCE_NBR_6 > 0 ) AND ( CE.T2_PRODUCT_LINE = 'NOMD' AND CE.COMPANY IN ( SELECT DISTINCT BOE.COMPANY FROM XBSS_BEN_OFFER_EXCEPTION@HPDB_HRDB BOE, XBSS_REALM_PLAN_YEAR@HPDB_HRDB RPY1 WHERE BOE.PLAN_TYPE = '10' AND RPY1.ID = :realmYearId AND TRUNC(RPY1.PLAN_YEAR_START) BETWEEN BOE.START_DATE AND BOE.END_DATE AND BOE.ACTIVE = 1 ) OR ( CE.T2_PRODUCT_LINE = 'NOMD' AND CE.T2_PEO_ID = 'ALP' ) OR ( CE.T2_PRODUCT_LINE <> 'NOMD' ) ) MINUS SELECT DISTINCT CO.CODE FROM XBSS_COMPANY@HPDB_HRDB CO , XBSS_REALM@HPDB_HRDB RL , XBSS_REALM_PLAN_YEAR@HPDB_HRDB RPY , XBSS_STRATEGY@HPDB_HRDB ST WHERE CO.REALM_YEAR_ID = RPY.ID AND RPY.REALM_ID = RL.ID AND RL.PEO_ID = :peoId AND RPY.ID = :realmYearId AND ST.COMPANY_ID = CO.ID AND ST.TYPE in ('recommended')

SELECT MST.T2_BAND_CD BANDCODE , OPT.BENEFIT_PLAN BENEFITPLAN , OPT.COVRG_CD COVERAGECODE , OPT.PLAN_TYPE PLANTYPE , CASE WHEN OPT.COVRG_CD = '1' THEN MST.T2_COVRG_AMT_1 WHEN OPT.COVRG_CD = '2' THEN MST.T2_COVRG_AMT_2 WHEN OPT.COVRG_CD = '81' THEN MST.T2_COVRG_AMT_2 WHEN OPT.COVRG_CD = 'C' THEN MST.T2_COVRG_AMT_C WHEN OPT.COVRG_CD = '82' THEN MST.T2_COVRG_AMT_C WHEN OPT.COVRG_CD = '4' THEN MST.T2_COVRG_AMT_4 ELSE ( SELECT ROUND( AVG( RTD.BN_EMPLR_RATE ), 2 ) FROM PS_BN_RATE_DATA RTD WHERE RTD.RATE_TBL_ID = MST.T2_COVRG1_FLAT_RT AND RTD.EFFDT = ( SELECT MAX(EFFDT) FROM PS_BN_RATE_DATA R1 WHERE R1.RATE_TBL_ID = RTD.RATE_TBL_ID AND R1.EFFDT <= :effDate ) ) END AS EMPLOYERCOST , PGM.EFFDT FROM PS_BEN_DEFN_PGM PGM , PS_BEN_DEFN_OPTN OPT , PS_BENEF_PLAN_TBL BP , PS_T2_MTR_RATE_TBL MST WHERE PGM.BENEFIT_PROGRAM = :cloneProgram AND MST.T2_OE_QUARTER = :quarter AND PGM.EFFDT = ( SELECT MAX(EFFDT) FROM PS_BEN_DEFN_PGM P1 WHERE P1.BENEFIT_PROGRAM = PGM.BENEFIT_PROGRAM AND P1.EFFDT <= :effDate) AND OPT.BENEFIT_PROGRAM = PGM.BENEFIT_PROGRAM AND OPT.EFFDT = PGM.EFFDT AND OPT.PLAN_TYPE IN (:planTypeList ) AND OPT.OPTION_TYPE <> 'W' AND NOT ( OPT.ELIG_RULES_ID IN ('2009','236Q','23GC') ) AND BP.BENEFIT_PLAN = OPT.BENEFIT_PLAN AND BP.PLAN_TYPE = OPT.PLAN_TYPE AND BP.EFFDT = ( SELECT MAX(EFFDT) FROM PS_BENEF_PLAN_TBL B1 WHERE B1.PLAN_TYPE = BP.PLAN_TYPE AND B1.BENEFIT_PLAN = BP.BENEFIT_PLAN ) AND MST.PLAN_TYPE = OPT.PLAN_TYPE AND MST.BENEFIT_PLAN = OPT.BENEFIT_PLAN AND MST.EFFDT = ( SELECT MAX(EFFDT) FROM PS_T2_MTR_RATE_TBL M1 WHERE M1.PLAN_TYPE = MST.PLAN_TYPE AND M1.BENEFIT_PLAN = MST.BENEFIT_PLAN AND M1.T2_BAND_CD = MST.T2_BAND_CD AND M1.T2_OE_QUARTER = MST.T2_OE_QUARTER AND M1.EFFDT <= :effDate) AND MST.T2_BAND_CD in (:bandCodesSet)

MERGE INTO PS_T2_CLOPTN_EFFDT TGT USING ( SELECT CLOP.COMPANY , CLOP.PF_CLIENT , CASE WHEN CLOP.EFFDT < TO_DATE( :effdtStr, 'DD-MON-YYYY' ) THEN TO_DATE( :effdtStr, 'DD-MON-YYYY' ) ELSE CLOP.EFFDT END AS EFFDT , CLOP.T2_SHOW_VACATION , CLOP.T2_SHOW_SICKLEAVE , CLOP.T2_SHOW_LEAVE3 , CLOP.T2_LEAVE_PLAN_3 , CLOP.T2_SHOW_LEAVE4 , CLOP.T2_LEAVE_PLAN_4 , CLOP.T2_SHOW_ER_BENEFS , CLOP.T2_CLIENT_TYPE , CLOP.T2_REFERRER , CLOP.T2_LOGO_NAME , CLOP.T2_PAYROLL_COORD , CLOP.T2_HR_MANAGER , CLOP.T2_PROCESSING_CNTR , CLOP.T2_DISTRIB_CTR , CLOP.PF_CLIENT_EIN , CLOP.PF_DIV , CLOP.PF_CORP , CLOP.T2_COMP_SETUP_DT , CLOP.T2_COMP_LIVE_DT , CLOP.T2_COMP_TERM_DT , CLOP.T2_DEPT_RB , CLOP.T2_FROM_CHAR , CLOP.T2_DEPTID_LENGTH , CLOP.T2_CALFSC_YR , CLOP.T2_PAY_SYS , CLOP.T2_TEAM , CLOP.T2_PREP_LEAD_DT , CLOP.T2_REPORT_LEAD_DT , CLOP.T2_PROCESS_LEAD_DT , CLOP.T2_PR_CHGS_LEAD_DT , CLOP.T2_BUILD_TXT , CLOP.T2_VDN , CLOP.T2_DFLT_TIME , CLOP.T2_AFLAC , CLOP.T2_CNCT_VER , CLOP.T2_PRINT_ADVICES , CLOP.T2_IMPL_CONSULTANT , CLOP.T2_MANAGE_DIRECTOR , CLOP.T2_SALES_REP , CLOP.T2_FEWASH_OPTN , CLOP.T2_LEGAL_NAME , CLOP.T2_ENR_DEAD_DAYS , CLOP.T2_WC_COVRG_OPTN , CLOP.T2_PAYMENT_METHOD , CASE WHEN TO_DATE( :planStartDate, 'DD-MON-YYYY' ) IS NULL THEN CLOP.T2_PLAN_DT_START ELSE TO_DATE( :planStartDate, 'DD-MON-YYYY' ) END AS T2_PLAN_DT_START , CLOP.T2_EA_DATE , CLOP.T2_REVIEW_CUSTOMER , CLOP.T2_BRIO_CUSTOMER , CLOP.T2_PRIORITY , CLOP.T2_TIME_ZONE , CASE WHEN :productLine IS NULL THEN CLOP.T2_PRODUCT_LINE ELSE :productLine END AS T2_PRODUCT_LINE , CLOP.T2_SVC_REGION , CLOP.T2_FICA_FUTA , CASE WHEN :oe_quarter IS NULL THEN CLOP.T2_OE_QUARTER ELSE :oe_quarter END AS T2_OE_QUARTER , CASE WHEN :oe_quarter_exce IS NULL THEN CLOP.T2_OEQTR_EXCEPTION ELSE :oe_quarter_exce END AS T2_OEQTR_EXCEPTION , CASE WHEN :cmn_owner_company IS NULL THEN CLOP.T2_SISTER_CLIENT ELSE :cmn_owner_company END AS T2_SISTER_CLIENT , CLOP.T2_SUTA_FLAG , CLOP.T2_BENEFIT_CONSULT , CLOP.T2_SEARCH_CONSULT , CLOP.T2_COE_REP , CASE WHEN :ale_status IS NULL THEN CLOP.T2_ACA_LARGE_EMPLR ELSE :ale_status END AS T2_ACA_LARGE_EMPLR , CLOP.T2_TIME_ATTENDANCE , CLOP.T2_PEO_ID , CASE WHEN :ale_tax_year IS NULL THEN CLOP.T2_ALE_TAX_YEAR ELSE :ale_tax_year END AS T2_ALE_TAX_YEAR , CLOP.T2_K1_FLAG , CLOP.T2_K1_EFFDT , CLOP.T2_HR_TRANS_CONSUL , CLOP.T2_SOURCE_COMPANY , CLOP.T2_CROSS_PRODUCT , CLOP.T2_I9_FLAG , CLOP.T2_I9_FLAG2 FROM PS_T2_CLOPTN_EFFDT CLOP WHERE CLOP.COMPANY = :company AND CLOP.EFFDT >= ( SELECT MAX(EFFDT) FROM PS_T2_CLOPTN_EFFDT E1 WHERE E1.COMPANY = CLOP.COMPANY AND E1.PF_CLIENT = CLOP.PF_CLIENT AND E1.EFFDT <= TO_DATE( :effdtStr, 'DD-MON-YYYY' ) ) ) SRC
ON ( SRC.COMPANY = TGT.COMPANY AND SRC.PF_CLIENT = TGT.PF_CLIENT AND SRC.EFFDT = TGT.EFFDT )
WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT ( TGT.COMPANY, TGT.PF_CLIENT, TGT.EFFDT, TGT.T2_SHOW_VACATION, TGT.T2_SHOW_SICKLEAVE , TGT.T2_SHOW_LEAVE3, TGT.T2_LEAVE_PLAN_3, TGT.T2_SHOW_LEAVE4, TGT.T2_LEAVE_PLAN_4 , TGT.T2_SHOW_ER_BENEFS, TGT.T2_CLIENT_TYPE, TGT.T2_REFERRER, TGT.T2_LOGO_NAME , TGT.T2_PAYROLL_COORD, TGT.T2_HR_MANAGER, TGT.T2_PROCESSING_CNTR, TGT.T2_DISTRIB_CTR , TGT.PF_CLIENT_EIN, TGT.PF_DIV, TGT.PF_CORP, TGT.T2_COMP_SETUP_DT, TGT.T2_COMP_LIVE_DT , TGT.T2_COMP_TERM_DT, TGT.T2_DEPT_RB, TGT.T2_FROM_CHAR, TGT.T2_DEPTID_LENGTH , TGT.T2_CALFSC_YR, TGT.T2_PAY_SYS, TGT.T2_TEAM, TGT.T2_PREP_LEAD_DT, TGT.T2_REPORT_LEAD_DT , TGT.T2_PROCESS_LEAD_DT, TGT.T2_PR_CHGS_LEAD_DT, TGT.T2_BUILD_TXT, TGT.T2_VDN , TGT.T2_DFLT_TIME, TGT.T2_AFLAC, TGT.T2_CNCT_VER, TGT.T2_PRINT_ADVICES, TGT.T2_IMPL_CONSULTANT , TGT.T2_MANAGE_DIRECTOR, TGT.T2_SALES_REP, TGT.T2_FEWASH_OPTN, TGT.T2_LEGAL_NAME , TGT.T2_ENR_DEAD_DAYS, TGT.T2_WC_COVRG_OPTN, TGT.T2_PAYMENT_METHOD, TGT.T2_PLAN_DT_START , TGT.T2_EA_DATE, TGT.T2_REVIEW_CUSTOMER, TGT.T2_BRIO_CUSTOMER, TGT.T2_PRIORITY , TGT.T2_TIME_ZONE, TGT.T2_PRODUCT_LINE, TGT.T2_SVC_REGION, TGT.T2_FICA_FUTA , TGT.T2_OE_QUARTER, TGT.T2_OEQTR_EXCEPTION, TGT.T2_SISTER_CLIENT, TGT.T2_SUTA_FLAG , TGT.T2_BENEFIT_CONSULT, TGT.T2_SEARCH_CONSULT, TGT.T2_COE_REP, TGT.T2_ACA_LARGE_EMPLR , TGT.T2_TIME_ATTENDANCE, TGT.T2_PEO_ID, TGT.T2_ALE_TAX_YEAR, TGT.T2_K1_FLAG, TGT.T2_K1_EFFDT , TGT.T2_HR_TRANS_CONSUL, TGT.T2_SOURCE_COMPANY, TGT.T2_CROSS_PRODUCT, TGT.T2_I9_FLAG, TGT.T2_I9_FLAG2 )
VALUES ( SRC.COMPANY, SRC.PF_CLIENT, SRC.EFFDT, SRC.T2_SHOW_VACATION, SRC.T2_SHOW_SICKLEAVE , SRC.T2_SHOW_LEAVE3, SRC.T2_LEAVE_PLAN_3, SRC.T2_SHOW_LEAVE4, SRC.T2_LEAVE_PLAN_4 , SRC.T2_SHOW_ER_BENEFS, SRC.T2_CLIENT_TYPE, SRC.T2_REFERRER, SRC.T2_LOGO_NAME , SRC.T2_PAYROLL_COORD, SRC.T2_HR_MANAGER, SRC.T2_PROCESSING_CNTR, SRC.T2_DISTRIB_CTR , SRC.PF_CLIENT_EIN, SRC.PF_DIV, SRC.PF_CORP, SRC.T2_COMP_SETUP_DT, SRC.T2_COMP_LIVE_DT , SRC.T2_COMP_TERM_DT, SRC.T2_DEPT_RB, SRC.T2_FROM_CHAR, SRC.T2_DEPTID_LENGTH , SRC.T2_CALFSC_YR, SRC.T2_PAY_SYS, SRC.T2_TEAM, SRC.T2_PREP_LEAD_DT, SRC.T2_REPORT_LEAD_DT , SRC.T2_PROCESS_LEAD_DT, SRC.T2_PR_CHGS_LEAD_DT, SRC.T2_BUILD_TXT, SRC.T2_VDN , SRC.T2_DFLT_TIME, SRC.T2_AFLAC, SRC.T2_CNCT_VER, SRC.T2_PRINT_ADVICES, SRC.T2_IMPL_CONSULTANT , SRC.T2_MANAGE_DIRECTOR, SRC.T2_SALES_REP, SRC.T2_FEWASH_OPTN, SRC.T2_LEGAL_NAME , SRC.T2_ENR_DEAD_DAYS, SRC.T2_WC_COVRG_OPTN, SRC.T2_PAYMENT_METHOD, SRC.T2_PLAN_DT_START , SRC.T2_EA_DATE, SRC.T2_REVIEW_CUSTOMER, SRC.T2_BRIO_CUSTOMER, SRC.T2_PRIORITY , SRC.T2_TIME_ZONE, SRC.T2_PRODUCT_LINE, SRC.T2_SVC_REGION, SRC.T2_FICA_FUTA , SRC.T2_OE_QUARTER, SRC.T2_OEQTR_EXCEPTION, SRC.T2_SISTER_CLIENT, SRC.T2_SUTA_FLAG , SRC.T2_BENEFIT_CONSULT, SRC.T2_SEARCH_CONSULT, SRC.T2_COE_REP, SRC.T2_ACA_LARGE_EMPLR , SRC.T2_TIME_ATTENDANCE, SRC.T2_PEO_ID, SRC.T2_ALE_TAX_YEAR, SRC.T2_K1_FLAG, SRC.T2_K1_EFFDT , SRC.T2_HR_TRANS_CONSUL, SRC.T2_SOURCE_COMPANY, SRC.T2_CROSS_PRODUCT, SRC.T2_I9_FLAG, SRC.T2_I9_FLAG2 )
WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET TGT.T2_PLAN_DT_START = SRC.T2_PLAN_DT_START , TGT.T2_PRODUCT_LINE = SRC.T2_PRODUCT_LINE , TGT.T2_OE_QUARTER = SRC.T2_OE_QUARTER , TGT.T2_OEQTR_EXCEPTION = SRC.T2_OEQTR_EXCEPTION , TGT.T2_SISTER_CLIENT = SRC.T2_SISTER_CLIENT , TGT.T2_ACA_LARGE_EMPLR = SRC.T2_ACA_LARGE_EMPLR , TGT.T2_ALE_TAX_YEAR = SRC.T2_ALE_TAX_YEAR

UPDATE PS_T2_CLIENT_OPT2A SET T2_CUST_PROG_NAME = SUBSTR( :groupDescr, 0, 30 ) , T2_CLASS_CODE = NVL( :eligConfig1, ' ' ) , T2_DEF_BEN_PROG = :isDflt , T2_WAITING_PERIOD = :waitingPeriod , T2_BEN_PROG_GROUP = :groupClassification WHERE COMPANY = :company AND BENEFIT_PROGRAM = :benefitProgram AND EFFDT = TO_DATE( :effdtStr, 'DD-MON-YYYY' )

SELECT DT.PF_CLIENT, DT.EFFDT, DT.ELIG_CONFIG1, DT.EFF_STATUS, DT.DESCR FROM PS_PF_ELIGCNFG_TBL DT WHERE DT.PF_CLIENT = :pfClient AND DT.EFFDT = ( SELECT MAX(EFFDT) FROM PS_T2_ELIGCFG_EFDT EF WHERE EF.PF_CLIENT = DT.PF_CLIENT AND EF.EFFDT <= :effdt )

MERGE INTO PS_T2_ELIGCFG_EFDT ECFG USING ( SELECT :pfClient AS PF_CLIENT , :effdt AS EFFDT FROM DUAL ) NW ON ( ECFG.PF_CLIENT = NW.PF_CLIENT AND ECFG.EFFDT = NW.EFFDT ) WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT ( ECFG.PF_CLIENT, ECFG.EFFDT ) VALUES ( NW.PF_CLIENT, NW.EFFDT )

MERGE INTO PS_PF_ELIGCNFG_TBL ECFG USING ( SELECT :pfClient AS PF_CLIENT , :effdt AS EFFDT , :eligConfig1 AS ELIG_CONFIG1 , :effStatus AS EFF_STATUS , :descr AS DESCR FROM DUAL ) NW ON ( ECFG.PF_CLIENT = NW.PF_CLIENT AND ECFG.EFFDT = NW.EFFDT AND ECFG.ELIG_CONFIG1 = NW.ELIG_CONFIG1 ) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET EFF_STATUS = NW.EFF_STATUS , DESCR = NW.DESCR WHERE PF_CLIENT = NW.PF_CLIENT AND EFFDT = NW.EFFDT AND ELIG_CONFIG1 = NW.ELIG_CONFIG1 WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT ( ECFG.PF_CLIENT, ECFG.EFFDT, ECFG.ELIG_CONFIG1, ECFG.EFF_STATUS, ECFG.DESCR ) VALUES ( NW.PF_CLIENT, NW.EFFDT, NW.ELIG_CONFIG1, NW.EFF_STATUS, NW.DESCR )

SELECT /*+ OPT_PARAM('_optimizer_cost_based_transformation', 'LINEAR') */ BPP.BENEFIT_PROGRAM , COUNT(*) AS MED_WAIVE_COUNT FROM PS_HEALTH_BENEFIT HB , PS_BEN_PROG_PARTIC BPP WHERE HB.EFFDT = ( SELECT MAX( EFFDT ) FROM PS_HEALTH_BENEFIT H1 WHERE H1.EMPLID = HB.EMPLID AND H1.EMPL_RCD = HB.EMPL_RCD AND H1.COBRA_EVENT_ID = HB.COBRA_EVENT_ID AND H1.PLAN_TYPE = HB.PLAN_TYPE AND H1.BENEFIT_NBR = HB.BENEFIT_NBR AND H1.EFFDT <= :effdt ) AND ( HB.EMPLID, HB.EMPL_RCD ) IN ( SELECT J.EMPLID, J.EMPL_RCD FROM PS_JOB J WHERE J.COMPANY = :COMPANY_CODE AND NOT ( J.EMPLID LIKE 'C%' ) AND J.EFFDT = (SELECT MAX( EFFDT ) FROM PS_JOB J1 WHERE J1.EMPLID = J.EMPLID AND J1.EMPL_RCD = J.EMPL_RCD AND J1.EFFDT <= :effdt ) AND J.EFFSEQ = (SELECT MAX( EFFSEQ ) FROM PS_JOB J2 WHERE J2.EMPLID = J.EMPLID AND J2.EMPL_RCD = J.EMPL_RCD AND J2.EFFDT = J.EFFDT )) AND HB.PLAN_TYPE = '10' AND HB.COVERAGE_ELECT = 'W' AND BPP.EMPLID = HB.EMPLID AND BPP.EMPL_RCD = HB.EMPL_RCD AND BPP.COBRA_EVENT_ID = 0 AND BPP.COBRA_EVENT_ID = HB.COBRA_EVENT_ID AND BPP.EFFDT = ( SELECT MAX(EFFDT) FROM PS_BEN_PROG_PARTIC B1 WHERE B1.EMPLID = BPP.EMPLID AND B1.EMPL_RCD = BPP.EMPL_RCD AND B1.COBRA_EVENT_ID = BPP.COBRA_EVENT_ID AND B1.EFFDT <= :effdt ) GROUP BY BPP.BENEFIT_PROGRAM, HB.COVERAGE_ELECT

SELECT /*+ OPT_PARAM('_optimizer_cost_based_transformation', 'LINEAR') */ E.FUTURE_BENEFIT_PROGRAM , COUNT(*) AS MED_WAIVE_COUNT FROM PS_HEALTH_BENEFIT HB , PS_BEN_PROG_PARTIC BPP ,XBSS_EMPL_STRATEGY_GROUP_VW@HPDB_HRDB E WHERE HB.EFFDT = ( SELECT MAX( EFFDT ) FROM PS_HEALTH_BENEFIT H1 WHERE H1.EMPLID = HB.EMPLID AND H1.EMPL_RCD = HB.EMPL_RCD AND H1.COBRA_EVENT_ID = HB.COBRA_EVENT_ID AND H1.PLAN_TYPE = HB.PLAN_TYPE AND H1.BENEFIT_NBR = HB.BENEFIT_NBR AND H1.EFFDT <= :effdt ) AND ( HB.EMPLID, HB.EMPL_RCD ) IN ( SELECT J.EMPLID, J.EMPL_RCD FROM PS_JOB J WHERE J.COMPANY = :COMPANY_CODE AND NOT ( J.EMPLID LIKE 'C%' ) AND J.EFFDT = (SELECT MAX( EFFDT ) FROM PS_JOB J1 WHERE J1.EMPLID = J.EMPLID AND J1.EMPL_RCD = J.EMPL_RCD AND J1.EFFDT <= :effdt ) AND J.EFFSEQ = (SELECT MAX( EFFSEQ ) FROM PS_JOB J2 WHERE J2.EMPLID = J.EMPLID AND J2.EMPL_RCD = J.EMPL_RCD AND J2.EFFDT = J.EFFDT )) AND HB.PLAN_TYPE = '10' AND HB.COVERAGE_ELECT = 'W' AND BPP.EMPLID = HB.EMPLID AND BPP.EMPL_RCD = HB.EMPL_RCD AND BPP.COBRA_EVENT_ID = 0 AND BPP.COBRA_EVENT_ID = HB.COBRA_EVENT_ID AND BPP.EFFDT = ( SELECT MAX(EFFDT) FROM PS_BEN_PROG_PARTIC B1 WHERE B1.EMPLID = BPP.EMPLID AND B1.EMPL_RCD = BPP.EMPL_RCD AND B1.COBRA_EVENT_ID = BPP.COBRA_EVENT_ID AND B1.EFFDT <= :effdt ) AND E.STRATEGY_ID = :strategyId AND E.EMPLID = BPP.EMPLID AND E.EMPL_RCD = BPP.EMPL_RCD GROUP BY E.FUTURE_BENEFIT_PROGRAM, HB.COVERAGE_ELECT

WITH ENROLLMENT AS ( SELECT /*+ OPT_PARAM('_optimizer_cost_based_transformation', 'LINEAR') */ BPP.BENEFIT_PROGRAM , HB.PLAN_TYPE , HB.BENEFIT_PLAN , CASE HB.COVRG_CD WHEN '1' THEN CASE HBD.COVRG_CD WHEN '5' THEN '2' WHEN '6' THEN 'C' WHEN '7' THEN '4' WHEN '8' THEN '4' ELSE HB.COVRG_CD END WHEN '2' THEN CASE HBD.COVRG_CD WHEN '6' THEN '4' ELSE HB.COVRG_CD END WHEN 'C' THEN CASE HBD.COVRG_CD WHEN '5' THEN '4' WHEN '6' THEN 'C' WHEN '7' THEN '4' WHEN '8' THEN '4' ELSE HB.COVRG_CD END WHEN '4' THEN '4' ELSE HB.COVRG_CD END AS COVRG_CD_MAPPED , HB.EMPLID , HB.EMPL_RCD FROM PS_HEALTH_BENEFIT HB LEFT OUTER JOIN PS_HEALTH_BENEFIT HBD ON HBD.EMPLID = HB.EMPLID AND HBD.EMPL_RCD = HB.EMPL_RCD AND HBD.PLAN_TYPE = ( CASE HB.PLAN_TYPE WHEN '10' THEN '15' WHEN '11' THEN '16' WHEN '14' THEN '17' WHEN '1D' THEN '1E' WHEN '1V' THEN '1U' END ) AND HBD.EFFDT = ( SELECT MAX( EFFDT ) FROM PS_HEALTH_BENEFIT H2 WHERE H2.EMPLID = HBD.EMPLID AND H2.EMPL_RCD = HBD.EMPL_RCD AND H2.COBRA_EVENT_ID = HBD.COBRA_EVENT_ID AND H2.PLAN_TYPE = HBD.PLAN_TYPE AND H2.BENEFIT_NBR = HBD.BENEFIT_NBR AND H2.EFFDT <= :effdt) AND HBD.COVERAGE_ELECT = 'E' , PS_BEN_PROG_PARTIC BPP WHERE HB.EFFDT = ( SELECT MAX( EFFDT ) FROM PS_HEALTH_BENEFIT H1 WHERE H1.EMPLID = HB.EMPLID AND H1.EMPL_RCD = HB.EMPL_RCD AND H1.COBRA_EVENT_ID = HB.COBRA_EVENT_ID AND H1.PLAN_TYPE = HB.PLAN_TYPE AND H1.BENEFIT_NBR = HB.BENEFIT_NBR AND H1.EFFDT <= :effdt) AND ( HB.EMPLID, HB.EMPL_RCD ) IN ( SELECT J.EMPLID, J.EMPL_RCD FROM PS_JOB J WHERE J.COMPANY = :company AND J.BEN_STATUS IN ('A','P','U') AND NOT ( J.EMPLID LIKE 'C%' ) AND NOT ( J.EMPL_CLASS = 'U' ) AND J.REG_TEMP = 'R' AND J.FULL_PART_TIME = 'F' AND J.STD_HOURS >= 30 AND J.EFFDT = (SELECT MAX( EFFDT ) FROM PS_JOB J1 WHERE J1.EMPLID = J.EMPLID AND J1.EMPL_RCD = J.EMPL_RCD AND J1.EFFDT <= :effdt) AND J.EFFSEQ = (SELECT MAX( EFFSEQ ) FROM PS_JOB J2 WHERE J2.EMPLID = J.EMPLID AND J2.EMPL_RCD = J.EMPL_RCD AND J2.EFFDT = J.EFFDT)) AND HB.PLAN_TYPE IN ('10', '11', '14', '1D', '1V') AND HB.BENEFIT_PLAN <> '0003M3' AND HB.COVERAGE_ELECT = 'E' AND BPP.EMPLID = HB.EMPLID AND BPP.EMPL_RCD = HB.EMPL_RCD AND BPP.COBRA_EVENT_ID = 0 AND BPP.COBRA_EVENT_ID = HB.COBRA_EVENT_ID AND BPP.EFFDT = ( SELECT MAX(EFFDT) FROM PS_BEN_PROG_PARTIC B1 WHERE B1.EMPLID = BPP.EMPLID AND B1.EMPL_RCD = BPP.EMPL_RCD AND B1.COBRA_EVENT_ID = BPP.COBRA_EVENT_ID AND B1.EFFDT <= :effdt ) ) SELECT ENROLLMENT.BENEFIT_PROGRAM, ENROLLMENT.PLAN_TYPE, ENROLLMENT.BENEFIT_PLAN, ENROLLMENT.COVRG_CD_MAPPED, COUNT(*), COUNT(HSA_ENROLLMENT.EMPLID) FROM ENROLLMENT LEFT OUTER JOIN (SELECT * FROM PS_FSA_BENEFIT HSA WHERE HSA.PLAN_TYPE = '67' AND HSA.EFFDT = ( SELECT MAX(EFFDT) FROM PS_FSA_BENEFIT H1 WHERE H1.EMPLID = HSA.EMPLID AND H1.EMPL_RCD = HSA.EMPL_RCD AND H1.COBRA_EVENT_ID = HSA.COBRA_EVENT_ID AND H1.PLAN_TYPE = HSA.PLAN_TYPE AND H1.BENEFIT_NBR = HSA.BENEFIT_NBR AND H1.EFFDT <= :effdt) AND HSA.COBRA_EVENT_ID = 0 AND HSA.COVERAGE_ELECT = 'E') HSA_ENROLLMENT ON HSA_ENROLLMENT.EMPLID = ENROLLMENT.EMPLID AND HSA_ENROLLMENT.EMPL_RCD = ENROLLMENT.EMPL_RCD AND ENROLLMENT.PLAN_TYPE = '10' GROUP BY ENROLLMENT.BENEFIT_PROGRAM, ENROLLMENT.PLAN_TYPE, ENROLLMENT.BENEFIT_PLAN, ENROLLMENT.COVRG_CD_MAPPED

SELECT BPP.BENEFIT_PROGRAM , LF.PLAN_TYPE , LF.BENEFIT_PLAN , COUNT(*) AS ENROLLED_COUNT FROM PS_LIFE_ADD_BEN LF , PS_BEN_PROG_PARTIC BPP WHERE LF.EFFDT = ( SELECT MAX( EFFDT ) FROM PS_LIFE_ADD_BEN H1 WHERE H1.EMPLID = LF.EMPLID AND H1.EMPL_RCD = LF.EMPL_RCD AND H1.PLAN_TYPE = LF.PLAN_TYPE AND H1.BENEFIT_NBR = LF.BENEFIT_NBR AND H1.EFFDT <= :effdt) AND ( LF.EMPLID, LF.EMPL_RCD ) IN ( SELECT J.EMPLID, J.EMPL_RCD FROM PS_JOB J WHERE J.COMPANY = :company AND NOT ( J.EMPLID LIKE 'C%' ) AND J.EFFDT = (SELECT MAX( EFFDT ) FROM PS_JOB J1 WHERE J1.EMPLID = J.EMPLID AND J1.EMPL_RCD = J.EMPL_RCD AND J1.EFFDT <= :effdt) AND J.EFFSEQ = (SELECT MAX( EFFSEQ ) FROM PS_JOB J2 WHERE J2.EMPLID = J.EMPLID AND J2.EMPL_RCD = J.EMPL_RCD AND J2.EFFDT = J.EFFDT)) AND LF.COVERAGE_ELECT = 'E' AND BPP.EMPLID = LF.EMPLID AND BPP.EMPL_RCD = LF.EMPL_RCD AND BPP.COBRA_EVENT_ID = 0 AND BPP.EFFDT = ( SELECT MAX(EFFDT) FROM PS_BEN_PROG_PARTIC B1 WHERE B1.EMPLID = BPP.EMPLID AND B1.EMPL_RCD = BPP.EMPL_RCD AND B1.COBRA_EVENT_ID = BPP.COBRA_EVENT_ID AND B1.EFFDT <= :effdt ) GROUP BY BPP.BENEFIT_PROGRAM, LF.PLAN_TYPE, LF.BENEFIT_PLAN
UNION
SELECT BPP.BENEFIT_PROGRAM , DS.PLAN_TYPE , DS.BENEFIT_PLAN , COUNT(*) AS ENROLLED_COUNT FROM PS_DISABILITY_BEN DS , PS_BEN_PROG_PARTIC BPP WHERE DS.EFFDT = ( SELECT MAX( EFFDT ) FROM PS_DISABILITY_BEN H1 WHERE H1.EMPLID = DS.EMPLID AND H1.EMPL_RCD = DS.EMPL_RCD AND H1.PLAN_TYPE = DS.PLAN_TYPE AND H1.BENEFIT_NBR = DS.BENEFIT_NBR AND H1.EFFDT <= :effdt ) AND ( DS.EMPLID, DS.EMPL_RCD ) IN ( SELECT J.EMPLID, J.EMPL_RCD FROM PS_JOB J WHERE J.COMPANY = :company AND NOT ( J.EMPLID LIKE 'C%' ) AND J.EFFDT = (SELECT MAX( EFFDT ) FROM PS_JOB J1 WHERE J1.EMPLID = J.EMPLID AND J1.EMPL_RCD = J.EMPL_RCD AND J1.EFFDT <= :effdt) AND J.EFFSEQ = (SELECT MAX( EFFSEQ ) FROM PS_JOB J2 WHERE J2.EMPLID = J.EMPLID AND J2.EMPL_RCD = J.EMPL_RCD AND J2.EFFDT = J.EFFDT)) AND DS.COVERAGE_ELECT = 'E' AND BPP.EMPLID = DS.EMPLID AND BPP.EMPL_RCD = DS.EMPL_RCD AND BPP.COBRA_EVENT_ID = 0 AND BPP.EFFDT = ( SELECT MAX(EFFDT) FROM PS_BEN_PROG_PARTIC B1 WHERE B1.EMPLID = BPP.EMPLID AND B1.EMPL_RCD = BPP.EMPL_RCD AND B1.COBRA_EVENT_ID = BPP.COBRA_EVENT_ID AND B1.EFFDT <= :effdt ) GROUP BY BPP.BENEFIT_PROGRAM, DS.PLAN_TYPE, DS.BENEFIT_PLAN
UNION
SELECT BPP.BENEFIT_PROGRAM , HB.PLAN_TYPE , HB.BENEFIT_PLAN , COUNT(*) AS ENROLLED_COUNT FROM PS_SIMPLE_BENEFIT HB , PS_BEN_PROG_PARTIC BPP WHERE HB.EFFDT = ( SELECT MAX( EFFDT ) FROM PS_SIMPLE_BENEFIT H1 WHERE H1.EMPLID = HB.EMPLID AND H1.EMPL_RCD = HB.EMPL_RCD AND H1.PLAN_TYPE = HB.PLAN_TYPE AND H1.BENEFIT_NBR = HB.BENEFIT_NBR AND H1.EFFDT <= :effdt ) AND ( HB.EMPLID, HB.EMPL_RCD ) IN ( SELECT J.EMPLID, J.EMPL_RCD FROM PS_JOB J WHERE J.COMPANY = :company AND NOT ( J.EMPLID LIKE 'C%' ) AND J.EFFDT = (SELECT MAX( EFFDT ) FROM PS_JOB J1 WHERE J1.EMPLID = J.EMPLID AND J1.EMPL_RCD = J.EMPL_RCD AND J1.EFFDT <= :effdt) AND J.EFFSEQ = (SELECT MAX( EFFSEQ ) FROM PS_JOB J2 WHERE J2.EMPLID = J.EMPLID AND J2.EMPL_RCD = J.EMPL_RCD AND J2.EFFDT = J.EFFDT)) AND HB.COVERAGE_ELECT = 'E' AND BPP.EMPLID = HB.EMPLID AND BPP.EMPL_RCD = HB.EMPL_RCD AND BPP.COBRA_EVENT_ID = 0 AND BPP.EFFDT = ( SELECT MAX(EFFDT) FROM PS_BEN_PROG_PARTIC B1 WHERE B1.EMPLID = BPP.EMPLID AND B1.EMPL_RCD = BPP.EMPL_RCD AND B1.COBRA_EVENT_ID = BPP.COBRA_EVENT_ID AND B1.EFFDT <= :effdt ) GROUP BY BPP.BENEFIT_PROGRAM, HB.PLAN_TYPE, HB.BENEFIT_PLAN
SELECT GP.BENEFIT_PROGRAM FROM XBSS_GROUP@HPDB_HRDB GP WHERE GP.COMPANY_ID = :companyId
SELECT BENEFIT_PLAN FROM XBSS_REALM_PLYR_PLAN@HPDB_HRDB WHERE REALM_YEAR_ID = :realmYearId AND ( PLAN_TYPE LIKE '2%' OR PLAN_TYPE LIKE '3%' )

SELECT XE.FUTURE_BENEFIT_PROGRAM AS BENEFIT_PROGRAM , J.EMPLID , J.ANNUAL_RT , J.ANNL_BENEF_BASE_RT FROM PS_JOB J , XBSS_EMPL_STRATEGY_GROUP_VW@HPDB_HRDB XE WHERE J.COMPANY =:company AND J.BEN_STATUS IN ('A','P','U') AND NOT ( J.EMPL_CLASS = 'U' ) AND J.EFFDT = ( SELECT MAX( EFFDT ) FROM PS_JOB J1 WHERE J1.EMPLID = J.EMPLID AND J1.EMPL_RCD = J.EMPL_RCD AND J1.EFFDT <= GREATEST( TO_DATE( :effdt ), ( SELECT MIN(EFFDT) FROM PS_JOB MINJ WHERE MINJ.EMPLID = J.EMPLID AND MINJ.EMPL_RCD = J.EMPL_RCD AND MINJ.BEN_STATUS IN ('A','P','U') AND NOT ( MINJ.EMPL_CLASS = 'U' ) ))) AND J.EFFSEQ = ( SELECT MAX( EFFSEQ ) FROM PS_JOB J2 WHERE J2.EMPLID = J.EMPLID AND J2.EMPL_RCD = J.EMPL_RCD AND J2.EFFDT = J.EFFDT ) AND XE.EMPLID = J.EMPLID AND XE.CODE = J.COMPANY AND XE.STRATEGY_ID = :strategyId

SELECT BPP.BENEFIT_PROGRAM , JHIST.EMPLID , JHIST.ANNUAL_RT , JHIST.ANNL_BENEF_BASE_RT FROM PS_JOB JHIST , PS_JOB JCURR , PS_BEN_PROG_PARTIC BPP WHERE JHIST.COMPANY = :company AND JHIST.BEN_STATUS IN ('A','P','U') AND NOT ( JHIST.EMPLID LIKE 'C%' ) AND NOT ( JHIST.EMPL_CLASS = 'U' ) AND JHIST.REG_TEMP = 'R' AND JHIST.FULL_PART_TIME = 'F' AND JHIST.STD_HOURS >= 30 AND JHIST.EFFDT = ( SELECT MAX( EFFDT ) FROM PS_JOB JH1 WHERE JH1.EMPLID = JHIST.EMPLID AND JH1.EMPL_RCD = JHIST.EMPL_RCD AND JH1.EFFDT <= GREATEST( TO_DATE( :effdt ), ( SELECT MIN(EFFDT) FROM PS_JOB MINJ WHERE MINJ.EMPLID = JHIST.EMPLID AND MINJ.EMPL_RCD = JHIST.EMPL_RCD AND MINJ.BEN_STATUS IN ('A','P','U') AND NOT ( MINJ.EMPL_CLASS = 'U' ) AND MINJ.REG_TEMP = 'R' AND MINJ.FULL_PART_TIME = 'F' AND MINJ.STD_HOURS >= 30 ) )) AND JHIST.EFFSEQ = ( SELECT MAX( EFFSEQ ) FROM PS_JOB JH2 WHERE JH2.EMPLID = JHIST.EMPLID AND JH2.EMPL_RCD = JHIST.EMPL_RCD AND JH2.EFFDT = JHIST.EFFDT ) AND BPP.EMPLID = JHIST.EMPLID AND BPP.EMPL_RCD = JHIST.EMPL_RCD AND BPP.COBRA_EVENT_ID = 0 AND BPP.EFFDT = ( SELECT MAX( EFFDT ) FROM PS_BEN_PROG_PARTIC B1 WHERE B1.EMPLID = BPP.EMPLID AND B1.EMPL_RCD = BPP.EMPL_RCD AND B1.COBRA_EVENT_ID = BPP.COBRA_EVENT_ID AND B1.EFFDT <= :yearEndDate ) AND JCURR.EMPLID = JHIST.EMPLID AND JCURR.EMPL_RCD = JHIST.EMPL_RCD AND JCURR.COMPANY = JHIST.COMPANY AND JCURR.BEN_STATUS IN ('A','P','U') AND NOT ( JCURR.EMPLID LIKE 'C%' ) AND NOT ( JCURR.EMPL_CLASS = 'U' ) AND JCURR.REG_TEMP = 'R' AND JCURR.FULL_PART_TIME = 'F' AND JCURR.STD_HOURS >= 30 AND JCURR.EFFDT = ( SELECT MAX( EFFDT ) FROM PS_JOB JC1 WHERE JC1.EMPLID = JCURR.EMPLID AND JC1.EMPL_RCD = JCURR.EMPL_RCD AND JC1.EFFDT <= TO_DATE( :yearEndDate ) + 1 ) AND JCURR.EFFSEQ = ( SELECT MAX( EFFSEQ ) FROM PS_JOB JC2 WHERE JC2.EMPLID = JCURR.EMPLID AND JC2.EMPL_RCD = JCURR.EMPL_RCD AND JC2.EFFDT = JCURR.EFFDT )

SELECT OP.BENEFIT_PLAN , CS.CALC_RULES_ID , CLC.BENBASE_AS_OF_CD , CLC.BENBASE_AS_OF_MM , CLC.BENBASE_AS_OF_DD , CASE CLC.BENEFITS_BASE WHEN '1' THEN 'ANRT' WHEN '2' THEN 'ABBR' ELSE CLC.BENEFITS_BASE END AS BASE_SOURCE FROM PS_BEN_DEFN_PGM PG , PS_BEN_DEFN_OPTN OP , PS_BEN_DEFN_COST CS , PS_CALC_RULES_TBL CLC WHERE PG.BENEFIT_PROGRAM = :cloneBenefitProgram AND PG.EFFDT = ( SELECT MAX(EFFDT) FROM PS_BEN_DEFN_PGM P1 WHERE P1.BENEFIT_PROGRAM = PG.BENEFIT_PROGRAM AND P1.EFFDT <= :effdt ) AND OP.BENEFIT_PROGRAM = PG.BENEFIT_PROGRAM AND OP.EFFDT = PG.EFFDT AND OP.BENEFIT_PLAN IN ( :planList ) AND CS.BENEFIT_PROGRAM = OP.BENEFIT_PROGRAM AND CS.EFFDT = OP.EFFDT AND CS.PLAN_TYPE = OP.PLAN_TYPE AND CS.OPTION_ID = OP.OPTION_ID AND CLC.CALC_RULES_ID = CS.CALC_RULES_ID AND CLC.EFFDT = ( SELECT MAX(EFFDT) FROM PS_CALC_RULES_TBL C1 WHERE C1.CALC_RULES_ID = CLC.CALC_RULES_ID AND C1.EFFDT <= :effdt )

SELECT OP.BENEFIT_PROGRAM , TO_CHAR( OP.EFFDT, 'DD-MON-YYYY' ) AS EFFDT , OP.PLAN_TYPE , OP.OPTION_ID , OP.BENEFIT_PLAN , ( SELECT MT.T2_COVRG1_FLAT_RT FROM PS_T2_MTR_RATE_TBL MT WHERE MT.T2_OE_QUARTER = :oeQuarter AND MT.PLAN_TYPE = OP.PLAN_TYPE AND MT.BENEFIT_PLAN = OP.BENEFIT_PLAN AND MT.EFFDT = ( SELECT MAX( EFFDT ) FROM PS_T2_MTR_RATE_TBL M1 WHERE M1.PLAN_TYPE = MT.PLAN_TYPE AND M1.BENEFIT_PLAN = MT.BENEFIT_PLAN AND M1.T2_BAND_CD = MT.T2_BAND_CD AND M1.T2_OE_QUARTER = MT.T2_OE_QUARTER AND M1.EFFDT <= TO_DATE( :effdt, 'DD-MON-YYYY' )) AND MT.T2_BAND_CD = :bandCode ) RATE_TBL_ID , RT.RATE_TYPE , RT.PAY_FREQUENCY , CASE RT.RATE_UNIT WHEN '1' THEN 'NONE' WHEN '2' THEN 'PTHO' WHEN '3' THEN 'PHUN' ELSE RT.RATE_UNIT END AS RATE_PER_UNIT FROM PS_BEN_DEFN_OPTN OP , PS_BEN_DEFN_COST CS , PS_BN_RATE_TBL RT WHERE OP.BENEFIT_PROGRAM = :benProg AND OP.EFFDT = ( SELECT MAX( EFFDT ) FROM PS_BEN_DEFN_PGM PG WHERE PG.BENEFIT_PROGRAM = OP.BENEFIT_PROGRAM AND PG.EFFDT <= TO_DATE( :effdt, 'DD-MON-YYYY' )) AND OP.BENEFIT_PLAN IN ( :benefitPlanList ) AND CS.BENEFIT_PROGRAM = OP.BENEFIT_PROGRAM AND CS.EFFDT = OP.EFFDT AND CS.PLAN_TYPE = OP.PLAN_TYPE AND CS.OPTION_ID = OP.OPTION_ID AND RT.RATE_TBL_ID = CS.RATE_TBL_ID AND RT.EFFDT = ( SELECT MAX( EFFDT ) FROM PS_BN_RATE_TBL R1 WHERE R1.RATE_TBL_ID = RT.RATE_TBL_ID AND R1.EFFDT <= TO_DATE( :effdt, 'DD-MON-YYYY' ))

SELECT RD.RATE_TBL_ID , RD.BN_RATE_KEY01 AS GENDER , RD.BN_RATE_KEY02 AS SMOKER , CASE WHEN RD.BN_RATE_KEY03 = ' ' THEN 0 WHEN LENGTH(TRIM(TRANSLATE( ' ', ' +-.0123456789', ' '))) IS NULL THEN TO_NUMBER( RD.BN_RATE_KEY03 ) ELSE 0 END AS AGE , RD.BN_EMPLR_RATE FROM PS_BN_RATE_DATA RD WHERE RD.RATE_TBL_ID IN ( :rateIdList ) AND RD.EFFDT = ( SELECT MAX(EFFDT) FROM PS_BN_RATE_TBL R1 WHERE R1.RATE_TBL_ID = RD.RATE_TBL_ID AND R1.EFFDT <= TO_DATE( :effdt, 'DD-MON-YYYY' ) )

SELECT LF.PLAN_TYPE , LF.BENEFIT_PLAN , TO_CHAR( LF.EFFDT, 'DD-MON-YYYY' ) AS PLAN_EFFDT , LF.BN_FORMULA_ID , TO_CHAR( FM.EFFDT, 'DD-MON-YYYY' ) AS FORMULA_EFFDT , CASE FM.BENEFITS_BASE WHEN '1' THEN 'ANRT' WHEN '2' THEN 'ABBR' ELSE FM.BENEFITS_BASE END AS BASE_SOURCE , FM.MAX_BENEF_BASE , FM.COVERAGE_MINIMUM , FM.COVERAGE_MAXIMUM , FM.COVRG_AS_OF_MM , FM.COVRG_AS_OF_DD , FM.COVRG_AS_OF_CD , FM.PREM_AS_OF_MM , FM.PREM_AS_OF_DD , FM.PREM_AS_OF_CD FROM PS_LIFE_ADD_TBL LF , PS_BN_FORMULA FM WHERE LF.BENEFIT_PLAN IN ( :planList ) AND LF.EFFDT = ( SELECT MAX(EFFDT) FROM PS_LIFE_ADD_TBL L1 WHERE L1.PLAN_TYPE = LF.PLAN_TYPE AND L1.BENEFIT_PLAN = LF.BENEFIT_PLAN AND L1.EFFDT <= :effdt ) AND FM.BN_FORMULA_ID = LF.BN_FORMULA_ID AND FM.EFFDT = ( SELECT MAX(EFFDT) FROM PS_BN_FORMULA F1 WHERE F1.BN_FORMULA_ID = FM.BN_FORMULA_ID AND F1.EFFDT <= :effdt )

SELECT DS.PLAN_TYPE, DS.BENEFIT_PLAN , TO_CHAR( DS.EFFDT, 'DD-MON-YYYY' ) AS PLAN_EFFDT , DS.BN_FORMULA_ID , TO_CHAR( FM.EFFDT, 'DD-MON-YYYY' ) AS FORMULA_EFFDT , CASE FM.BENEFITS_BASE WHEN '1' THEN 'ANRT' WHEN '2' THEN 'ABBR' ELSE FM.BENEFITS_BASE END AS BASE_SOURCE , FM.MAX_BENEF_BASE , FM.COVERAGE_MINIMUM , FM.COVERAGE_MAXIMUM , FM.COVRG_AS_OF_MM , FM.COVRG_AS_OF_DD , FM.COVRG_AS_OF_CD , FM.PREM_AS_OF_MM , FM.PREM_AS_OF_DD , FM.PREM_AS_OF_CD FROM PS_DISBLTY_PLN_TBL DS , PS_BN_FORMULA FM WHERE DS.BENEFIT_PLAN IN ( :planList ) AND DS.EFFDT = ( SELECT MAX(EFFDT) FROM PS_DISBLTY_PLN_TBL D1 WHERE D1.PLAN_TYPE = DS.PLAN_TYPE AND D1.BENEFIT_PLAN = DS.BENEFIT_PLAN AND D1.EFFDT <= :effdt ) AND FM.BN_FORMULA_ID = DS.BN_FORMULA_ID AND FM.EFFDT = ( SELECT MAX(EFFDT) FROM PS_BN_FORMULA F1 WHERE F1.BN_FORMULA_ID = FM.BN_FORMULA_ID AND F1.EFFDT <= :effdt )

SELECT BN_SEQ_NUM, BEN_OPERAND, BN_ENTRY_TYP, BN_VALUE, ROUND_UP_AMT, ROUND_TO FROM PS_BN_FORM_DEF DEF WHERE DEF.BN_FORMULA_ID = :formulaID AND DEF.EFFDT = TO_DATE( :effdt, 'DD-MON-YYYY' ) ORDER BY BN_SEQ_NUM ASC

SELECT LTB.PLAN_TYPE , LTB.BENEFIT_PLAN , CASE WHEN LTB.COVG_GROUP_CD <> ' ' THEN ( SELECT CV.COVERAGE_MAXIMUM FROM PS_COVG_GROUP_TBL CV WHERE CV.EFFDT = ( SELECT MAX( EFFDT ) FROM PS_COVG_GROUP_TBL C1 WHERE C1.COVG_GROUP_CD = CV.COVG_GROUP_CD AND C1.EFFDT <= TO_DATE( :effdt, 'DD-MON-YYYY' ) ) AND CV.COVG_GROUP_CD = LTB.COVG_GROUP_CD ) WHEN LTB.BN_FORMULA_ID <> ' ' THEN ( SELECT FM.COVERAGE_MAXIMUM FROM PS_BN_FORMULA FM WHERE FM.EFFDT = ( SELECT MAX( EFFDT ) FROM PS_BN_FORMULA F1 WHERE F1.BN_FORMULA_ID = FM.BN_FORMULA_ID AND F1.EFFDT <= TO_DATE( :effdt, 'DD-MON-YYYY' ) ) AND FM.BN_FORMULA_ID = LTB.BN_FORMULA_ID ) ELSE NULL END AS COVG_MAX FROM PS_LIFE_ADD_TBL LTB WHERE LTB.BENEFIT_PLAN IN ( SELECT OP.BENEFIT_PLAN FROM PS_BEN_DEFN_OPTN OP WHERE OP.BENEFIT_PROGRAM = :benProg AND OP.EFFDT = ( SELECT MAX( EFFDT ) FROM PS_BEN_DEFN_PGM P1 WHERE P1.BENEFIT_PROGRAM = OP.BENEFIT_PROGRAM AND P1.EFFDT <= TO_DATE( :effdt, 'DD-MON-YYYY' )) AND ( OP.PLAN_TYPE LIKE '2%' OR OP.PLAN_TYPE LIKE '3%' ) AND OP.OPTION_TYPE = 'O' ) AND LTB.EFFDT = ( SELECT MAX( EFFDT ) FROM PS_LIFE_ADD_TBL L1 WHERE L1.PLAN_TYPE = LTB.PLAN_TYPE AND L1.BENEFIT_PLAN = LTB.BENEFIT_PLAN AND L1.EFFDT <= TO_DATE( :effdt, 'DD-MON-YYYY' ) ) UNION SELECT DSB.PLAN_TYPE , DSB.BENEFIT_PLAN , CASE WHEN DSB.BN_FORMULA_ID <> ' ' THEN ( SELECT FM.MAX_BENEF_BASE FROM PS_BN_FORMULA FM WHERE FM.EFFDT = ( SELECT MAX( EFFDT ) FROM PS_BN_FORMULA F1 WHERE F1.BN_FORMULA_ID = FM.BN_FORMULA_ID AND F1.EFFDT <= TO_DATE( :effdt, 'DD-MON-YYYY' ) ) AND FM.BN_FORMULA_ID = DSB.BN_FORMULA_ID ) ELSE NULL END AS COVG_MAX FROM PS_DISBLTY_PLN_TBL DSB WHERE DSB.BENEFIT_PLAN IN ( SELECT OP.BENEFIT_PLAN FROM PS_BEN_DEFN_OPTN OP WHERE OP.BENEFIT_PROGRAM = :benProg AND OP.EFFDT = ( SELECT MAX( EFFDT ) FROM PS_BEN_DEFN_PGM P1 WHERE P1.BENEFIT_PROGRAM = OP.BENEFIT_PROGRAM AND P1.EFFDT <= TO_DATE( :effdt, 'DD-MON-YYYY' )) AND ( OP.PLAN_TYPE LIKE '2%' OR OP.PLAN_TYPE LIKE '3%' ) AND OP.OPTION_TYPE = 'O' ) AND DSB.EFFDT = ( SELECT MAX( EFFDT ) FROM PS_DISBLTY_PLN_TBL D1 WHERE D1.PLAN_TYPE = DSB.PLAN_TYPE AND D1.BENEFIT_PLAN = DSB.BENEFIT_PLAN AND D1.EFFDT <= TO_DATE( :effdt, 'DD-MON-YYYY' ) )

MERGE INTO PS_BEN_DEFN_OPTN TGT USING ( WITH OLD_WAIT_PERIOD_TMP AS ( SELECT O2A.T2_WAITING_PERIOD FROM PS_T2_CL_OPTN_EFDT EF , PS_T2_CLIENT_OPT2A O2A WHERE EF.COMPANY = :company AND EF.PF_CLIENT = :pfClient AND EF.EFFDT = (SELECT MAX( EFFDT ) FROM PS_T2_CL_OPTN_EFDT E1 WHERE E1.COMPANY = EF.COMPANY AND E1.PF_CLIENT = EF.PF_CLIENT AND E1.EFFDT < TO_DATE( :effdtStr, 'DD-MON-YYYY' ) ) AND O2A.COMPANY = EF.COMPANY AND O2A.PF_CLIENT = EF.PF_CLIENT AND O2A.EFFDT = EF.EFFDT AND O2A.BENEFIT_PROGRAM = :benProg ) , WAIT_PERIOD_TMP AS ( SELECT EG.T2_OLD_WAIT_PERIOD, EG.T2_NEW_WAIT_PERIOD, EG.PLAN_TYPE, EG.BENEFIT_PLAN, EG.T2_NEW_ELIG_RULEID FROM PS_T2_WAITPER_ELIG EG WHERE EG.T2_OE_QUARTER = :oeQuarter AND EG.T2_OLD_WAIT_PERIOD = NVL( ( SELECT T2_WAITING_PERIOD FROM OLD_WAIT_PERIOD_TMP ), :newWaitPeriod ) AND EG.EFF_STATUS = 'A' AND EG.EFFDT = ( SELECT MAX(EFFDT) FROM PS_T2_WAITPER_ELIG E1 WHERE E1.T2_OLD_WAIT_PERIOD = EG.T2_OLD_WAIT_PERIOD AND E1.T2_NEW_WAIT_PERIOD = EG.T2_NEW_WAIT_PERIOD AND E1.T2_OE_QUARTER = EG.T2_OE_QUARTER AND E1.EFFDT <= TO_DATE( :effdtStr, 'DD-MON-YYYY' ) ))
SELECT OP.BENEFIT_PROGRAM , OP.EFFDT , OP.PLAN_TYPE , OP.OPTION_ID , OP.BENEFIT_PLAN , OP.ELIG_RULES_ID , COALESCE( ( SELECT T2_NEW_ELIG_RULEID FROM WAIT_PERIOD_TMP WPT WHERE WPT.T2_OLD_WAIT_PERIOD = NVL( ( SELECT T2_WAITING_PERIOD FROM OLD_WAIT_PERIOD_TMP ), :newWaitPeriod ) AND WPT.T2_NEW_WAIT_PERIOD = :newWaitPeriod AND WPT.PLAN_TYPE = OP.PLAN_TYPE AND WPT.BENEFIT_PLAN = OP.BENEFIT_PLAN ) , ( SELECT T2_NEW_ELIG_RULEID FROM WAIT_PERIOD_TMP WPT WHERE WPT.T2_OLD_WAIT_PERIOD = NVL( ( SELECT T2_WAITING_PERIOD FROM OLD_WAIT_PERIOD_TMP ), :newWaitPeriod ) AND WPT.T2_NEW_WAIT_PERIOD = :newWaitPeriod AND WPT.PLAN_TYPE = OP.PLAN_TYPE AND WPT.BENEFIT_PLAN = ' ' ) ) AS NEW_ELIG_RULE FROM PS_BEN_DEFN_OPTN OP WHERE OP.BENEFIT_PROGRAM = :benProg AND OP.EFFDT = TO_DATE( :effdtStr, 'DD-MON-YYYY' ) AND OP.PLAN_TYPE IN ( SELECT PLAN_TYPE FROM WAIT_PERIOD_TMP ) AND OP.OPTION_TYPE = 'O' AND NOT ( OP.ELIG_RULES_ID IN ('23GC', '236Q', '2009') ) ) SRC
ON ( TGT.BENEFIT_PROGRAM = SRC.BENEFIT_PROGRAM AND TGT.EFFDT = SRC.EFFDT AND TGT.PLAN_TYPE = SRC.PLAN_TYPE AND TGT.OPTION_ID = SRC.OPTION_ID )
WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET TGT.ELIG_RULES_ID = SRC.NEW_ELIG_RULE WHERE SRC.NEW_ELIG_RULE IS NOT NULL
UPDATE PS_BEN_DEFN_PLAN SET EVENT_RULES_ID = :eventRule WHERE BENEFIT_PROGRAM = :benProg AND EFFDT = TO_DATE( :effdt, 'DD-MON-YYYY' ) AND PLAN_TYPE = :planType

SELECT EV.PLAN_TYPE, EV.T2_WAITING_PERIOD, EV.T2_EVNT_RULE_NONFL AS EE_RULE, EV.T2_EVNT_RULE_FL AS ER_RULE FROM PS_T2_WAITPER_EVNT EV WHERE EV.T2_OE_QUARTER = :oeQuarter AND EV.EFF_STATUS = 'A' AND EV.EFFDT = ( SELECT MAX(EFFDT) FROM PS_T2_WAITPER_EVNT E1 WHERE E1.PLAN_TYPE = EV.PLAN_TYPE AND E1.T2_WAITING_PERIOD = EV.T2_WAITING_PERIOD AND E1.T2_OE_QUARTER = EV.T2_OE_QUARTER AND E1.EFFDT <= TO_DATE( :effdt, 'DD-MON-YYYY' ) )

SELECT CST.BENEFIT_PROGRAM, CST.EFFDT, CST.PLAN_TYPE, CST.OPTION_ID, CST.COST_ID, OPT.BENEFIT_PLAN FROM PS_BEN_DEFN_COST CST , PS_BEN_DEFN_OPTN OPT WHERE CST.PLAN_TYPE in ('23','30','31') AND CST.BENEFIT_PROGRAM = :benProgram AND CST.EFFDT = TO_DATE( :effdtStr, 'DD-MON-YYYY' ) AND CST.BENEFIT_PROGRAM = OPT.BENEFIT_PROGRAM AND CST.EFFDT = OPT.EFFDT AND CST.PLAN_TYPE = OPT.PLAN_TYPE AND CST.OPTION_ID = OPT.OPTION_ID AND NOT OPT.ELIG_RULES_ID IN ('2009','236Q','23GC')

SELECT MTR.T2_COVRG1_FLAT_RT FROM PS_T2_MTR_RATE_TBL MTR WHERE MTR.T2_OE_QUARTER = :oeQuarter AND MTR.EFFDT = ( SELECT MAX(EFFDT) FROM PS_T2_MTR_RATE_TBL M1 WHERE M1.PLAN_TYPE = MTR.PLAN_TYPE AND M1.BENEFIT_PLAN = MTR.BENEFIT_PLAN AND M1.T2_BAND_CD = MTR.T2_BAND_CD AND M1.T2_OE_QUARTER = MTR.T2_OE_QUARTER AND M1.EFFDT <= TO_DATE( :effdtStr, 'DD-MON-YYYY' ) ) AND MTR.PLAN_TYPE = :planType AND MTR.BENEFIT_PLAN = :benefitPlan AND MTR.T2_BAND_CD = :bandCode

UPDATE PS_BEN_DEFN_COST CST SET CST.RATE_TYPE = ( SELECT RTT.RATE_TYPE FROM PS_BN_RATE_TBL RTT WHERE RTT.RATE_TBL_ID = :rateTblId AND RTT.EFFDT = ( SELECT MAX(EFFDT) FROM PS_BN_RATE_TBL RT1 WHERE RT1.RATE_TBL_ID = RTT.RATE_TBL_ID AND RT1.EFFDT <= TO_DATE( :effdtStr, 'DD-MON-YYYY' ) ) ) , CST.RATE_TBL_ID = :rateTblId WHERE CST.BENEFIT_PROGRAM = :benProgram AND CST.EFFDT = TO_DATE( :effdtStr, 'DD-MON-YYYY' ) AND CST.PLAN_TYPE = :planType AND CST.OPTION_ID = :optionId AND CST.COST_ID = :costId

SELECT O2.BENEFIT_PROGRAM , PGM.DESCR , BPD.T2_GROUP_TYPE , TRIM(BPD.T2_GROUP_STATE) FROM PS_T2_CLIENT_OPTN2 O2 LEFT JOIN PS_BEN_DEFN_PGM PGM ON PGM.BENEFIT_PROGRAM = O2.BENEFIT_PROGRAM LEFT JOIN PS_T2_PRCL_BN_PGM BPD ON BPD.BENEFIT_PROGRAM = O2.BENEFIT_PROGRAM WHERE ( O2.COMPANY, O2.PF_CLIENT, O2.EFFDT ) IN ( SELECT OEF.COMPANY, OEF.PF_CLIENT, OEF.EFFDT FROM PS_T2_CL_OPTN_EFDT OEF WHERE OEF.PF_CLIENT = :pfClient AND ( ( :pfClient = '0000' AND OEF.COMPANY = '001' ) OR ( :pfClient != '0000' ) ) AND OEF.EFFDT = ( SELECT MAX(EFFDT) FROM PS_T2_CL_OPTN_EFDT E1 WHERE E1.COMPANY = OEF.COMPANY AND E1.PF_CLIENT = OEF.PF_CLIENT AND E1.EFFDT <= :currentPlanYearStartDate ) ) AND O2.EFF_STATUS = 'A' AND ( PGM.EFFDT = ( SELECT MAX(EFFDT) FROM PS_BEN_DEFN_PGM P1 WHERE P1.BENEFIT_PROGRAM = PGM.BENEFIT_PROGRAM AND P1.EFFDT <= :currentPlanYearStartDate ) OR PGM.EFFDT IS NULL ) AND ( BPD.EFFDT = ( SELECT MAX(EFFDT) FROM PS_T2_PRCL_BN_PGM D1 WHERE D1.BENEFIT_PROGRAM = PGM.BENEFIT_PROGRAM AND D1.EFFDT <= :currentPlanYearStartDate ) OR BPD.EFFDT IS NULL )

WITH CLIENTOPTION AS ( SELECT O.T2_OE_QUARTER FROM PS_T2_CLOPTN_EFFDT O WHERE O.COMPANY = :CompanyCode AND O.PF_CLIENT = :pfClient AND O.EFFDT = ( SELECT MAX( EFFDT ) FROM PS_T2_CLOPTN_EFFDT OE WHERE OE.COMPANY = O.COMPANY AND OE.PF_CLIENT = O.PF_CLIENT AND OE.EFFDT <= :currentPlanYearStartDate ) ), MIRROR_PLANS AS ( SELECT MIRT.PLAN_TYPE, MIRT.BENEFIT_PLAN, MIRT.T2_MIRR_BEN_PLAN FROM PS_T2_ACA_MIRR_TBL MIRT WHERE MIRT.T2_OE_QUARTER = ( SELECT T2_OE_QUARTER FROM CLIENTOPTION ) AND MIRT.T2_OPTION_TYPE = 'B' AND MIRT.EFFDT = ( SELECT MAX( EFFDT ) FROM PS_T2_ACA_MIRR_EFF EF WHERE EF.T2_OE_QUARTER = MIRT.T2_OE_QUARTER AND EF.T2_OPTION_TYPE = MIRT.T2_OPTION_TYPE AND EF.EFFDT <= :currentPlanYearStartDate ) ), BPL AS ( SELECT PLAN_TYPE , BENEFIT_PLAN , VENDOR_ID FROM PS_BENEF_PLAN_TBL B WHERE B.EFFDT = ( SELECT MAX( EFFDT ) FROM PS_BENEF_PLAN_TBL B1 WHERE B1.PLAN_TYPE = B.PLAN_TYPE AND B1.BENEFIT_PLAN = B.BENEFIT_PLAN AND B1.EFFDT <= :currentPlanYearStartDate ) ), ACTIVE_BENEFIT_PROGRAMS AS ( SELECT OP2.BENEFIT_PROGRAM FROM PS_T2_CL_OPTN_EFDT CLEF , PS_T2_CLIENT_OPTN2 OP2 WHERE CLEF.COMPANY = :CompanyCode AND CLEF.PF_CLIENT = :pfClient AND CLEF.EFFDT = ( SELECT MAX(EFFDT) FROM PS_T2_CL_OPTN_EFDT CL1 WHERE CL1.COMPANY = CLEF.COMPANY AND CL1.PF_CLIENT = CLEF.PF_CLIENT AND CL1.EFFDT <= :currentPlanYearStartDate ) AND OP2.COMPANY = CLEF.COMPANY AND OP2.PF_CLIENT = CLEF.PF_CLIENT AND OP2.EFFDT = CLEF.EFFDT AND OP2.EFF_STATUS = 'A' ), BPG AS ( SELECT PG.BENEFIT_PROGRAM , PG.EFFDT , OP.PLAN_TYPE , OP.OPTION_ID , OP.BENEFIT_PLAN , OP.COVRG_CD FROM PS_BEN_DEFN_PGM PG , PS_BEN_DEFN_OPTN OP WHERE PG.BENEFIT_PROGRAM IN ( SELECT BENEFIT_PROGRAM FROM ACTIVE_BENEFIT_PROGRAMS ) AND PG.EFFDT = ( SELECT MAX( EFFDT ) FROM PS_BEN_DEFN_PGM P1 WHERE PG.BENEFIT_PROGRAM = P1.BENEFIT_PROGRAM AND P1.EFFDT <= :currentPlanYearStartDate ) AND OP.BENEFIT_PROGRAM = PG.BENEFIT_PROGRAM AND OP.EFFDT = PG.EFFDT AND OP.PLAN_TYPE IN ( '10', '11', '14', '1D', '1V' ) AND OP.OPTION_TYPE = 'O' AND NOT OP.ELIG_RULES_ID IN ( '2009', '236Q', '23GC' ) AND OP.BENEFIT_PLAN <> '0003M3' AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 'X' FROM MIRROR_PLANS MPL WHERE MPL.PLAN_TYPE = OP.PLAN_TYPE AND MPL.T2_MIRR_BEN_PLAN = OP.BENEFIT_PLAN ) ), BENEFIT_SUPPLEMENT AS ( SELECT CST.* , RDT.BN_EMPL_RATE SUPPLEMENT_CREDIT FROM PS_BEN_DEFN_COST CST , BPG , PS_BN_RATE_TBL RTB , PS_BN_RATE_DATA RDT WHERE CST.BENEFIT_PROGRAM = BPG.BENEFIT_PROGRAM AND CST.EFFDT = BPG.EFFDT AND CST.PLAN_TYPE = BPG.PLAN_TYPE AND CST.OPTION_ID = BPG.OPTION_ID AND CST.COST_TYPE = 'C' AND CST.ERNCD = 'BS' AND RTB.RATE_TBL_ID = CST.RATE_TBL_ID AND RTB.EFFDT = ( SELECT MAX( EFFDT ) FROM PS_BN_RATE_TBL R1 WHERE R1.RATE_TBL_ID = RTB.RATE_TBL_ID AND R1.EFFDT <= :currentPlanYearStartDate ) AND RDT.RATE_TBL_ID = RTB.RATE_TBL_ID AND RDT.EFFDT = RTB.EFFDT AND ( ( RTB.RATE_TYPE = '7' AND RDT.BN_RATE_KEY01 = BPG.BENEFIT_PLAN AND RDT.BN_RATE_KEY02 = BPG.COVRG_CD ) OR ( RTB.RATE_TYPE = '2' ) ) ), BENEFIT_CONTRIBUTION AS ( SELECT CST.* , RDT.BN_EMPL_RATE , RDT.BN_EMPLR_RATE FROM PS_BEN_DEFN_COST CST , BPG , PS_BN_RATE_TBL RTB , PS_BN_RATE_DATA RDT WHERE CST.BENEFIT_PROGRAM = BPG.BENEFIT_PROGRAM AND CST.EFFDT = BPG.EFFDT AND CST.PLAN_TYPE = BPG.PLAN_TYPE AND CST.OPTION_ID = BPG.OPTION_ID AND CST.COST_TYPE = 'P' AND RTB.RATE_TBL_ID = CST.RATE_TBL_ID AND RTB.EFFDT = ( SELECT MAX( EFFDT ) FROM PS_BN_RATE_TBL R1 WHERE R1.RATE_TBL_ID = RTB.RATE_TBL_ID AND R1.EFFDT <= :currentPlanYearStartDate ) AND RDT.RATE_TBL_ID = RTB.RATE_TBL_ID AND RDT.EFFDT = RTB.EFFDT AND ( ( RTB.RATE_TYPE = '7' AND RDT.BN_RATE_KEY01 = BPG.BENEFIT_PLAN AND RDT.BN_RATE_KEY02 = BPG.COVRG_CD ) OR ( RTB.RATE_TYPE = '2' ) ) ) SELECT BPG.BENEFIT_PROGRAM , BPG.BENEFIT_PLAN , BPG.EFFDT , BPG.PLAN_TYPE , ( SELECT VENDOR_ID FROM BPL WHERE BPL.PLAN_TYPE = BPG.PLAN_TYPE AND BPL.BENEFIT_PLAN = BPG.BENEFIT_PLAN ) VENDOR_ID , BPG.COVRG_CD , CASE WHEN SUP.SUPPLEMENT_CREDIT IS NULL THEN CNTB.BN_EMPL_RATE WHEN SUP.SUPPLEMENT_CREDIT > CNTB.BN_EMPL_RATE + CNTB.BN_EMPLR_RATE THEN 0 ELSE CNTB.BN_EMPL_RATE - SUP.SUPPLEMENT_CREDIT END BN_EMPL_RATE , CASE WHEN SUP.SUPPLEMENT_CREDIT IS NULL THEN CNTB.BN_EMPLR_RATE WHEN SUP.SUPPLEMENT_CREDIT > CNTB.BN_EMPL_RATE + CNTB.BN_EMPLR_RATE THEN CNTB.BN_EMPL_RATE + CNTB.BN_EMPLR_RATE ELSE CNTB.BN_EMPLR_RATE + SUP.SUPPLEMENT_CREDIT END BN_EMPLR_RATE FROM BPG LEFT JOIN BENEFIT_SUPPLEMENT SUP ON ( SUP.BENEFIT_PROGRAM = BPG.BENEFIT_PROGRAM AND SUP.EFFDT = BPG.EFFDT AND SUP.PLAN_TYPE = BPG.PLAN_TYPE AND SUP.OPTION_ID = BPG.OPTION_ID ) , BENEFIT_CONTRIBUTION CNTB WHERE CNTB.BENEFIT_PROGRAM = BPG.BENEFIT_PROGRAM AND CNTB.EFFDT = BPG.EFFDT AND CNTB.PLAN_TYPE = BPG.PLAN_TYPE AND CNTB.OPTION_ID = BPG.OPTION_ID

SELECT BPG.BENEFIT_PROGRAM , BPG.BENEFIT_PLAN , BPG.EFFDT , BPG.PLAN_TYPE , RT.BN_EMPLR_RATE , RT.BN_EMPL_RATE FROM ( SELECT PG.BENEFIT_PROGRAM , PG.EFFDT , OP.OPTION_ID , OP.BENEFIT_PLAN , OP.PLAN_TYPE , OP.COVRG_CD , CST.RATE_TBL_ID FROM PS_BEN_DEFN_PGM PG , PS_BEN_DEFN_OPTN OP , PS_BEN_DEFN_COST CST WHERE PG.BENEFIT_PROGRAM IN ( SELECT OP2.BENEFIT_PROGRAM FROM PS_T2_CL_OPTN_EFDT CLEF , PS_T2_CLIENT_OPTN2 OP2 WHERE CLEF.COMPANY = :CompanyCode AND CLEF.PF_CLIENT = :pfClient AND CLEF.EFFDT = ( SELECT MAX(EFFDT) FROM PS_T2_CL_OPTN_EFDT CL1 WHERE CL1.COMPANY = CLEF.COMPANY AND CL1.PF_CLIENT = CLEF.PF_CLIENT AND CL1.EFFDT <= :currentPlanYearStartDate ) AND OP2.COMPANY = CLEF.COMPANY AND OP2.PF_CLIENT = CLEF.PF_CLIENT AND OP2.EFFDT = CLEF.EFFDT AND OP2.EFF_STATUS = 'A' ) AND PG.EFFDT = ( SELECT MAX(EFFDT) FROM PS_BEN_DEFN_PGM P1 WHERE PG.BENEFIT_PROGRAM = P1.BENEFIT_PROGRAM AND P1.EFFDT <= :currentPlanYearStartDate ) AND OP.BENEFIT_PROGRAM = PG.BENEFIT_PROGRAM AND OP.EFFDT = PG.EFFDT AND OP.PLAN_TYPE IN ('23','30','31','A3') AND OP.OPTION_TYPE = 'O' AND NOT OP.ELIG_RULES_ID IN ('2009','236Q','23GC') AND CST.BENEFIT_PROGRAM = OP.BENEFIT_PROGRAM AND CST.EFFDT = OP.EFFDT AND CST.PLAN_TYPE = OP.PLAN_TYPE AND CST.OPTION_ID = OP.OPTION_ID ) BPG , ( SELECT R1.RATE_TBL_ID , R1.EFFDT , R1.BN_RATE_KEY01 , R1.BN_RATE_KEY02 , R1.BN_RATE_KEY03 , R1.BN_EMPL_RATE , R1.BN_EMPLR_RATE , R1.T2_PROV_COVRG_RATE FROM PS_BN_RATE_DATA R1 WHERE R1.EFFDT = ( SELECT MAX(EFFDT) FROM PS_BN_RATE_TBL R2 WHERE R2.RATE_TBL_ID = R1.RATE_TBL_ID AND R2.EFFDT <= :currentPlanYearStartDate ) ) RT WHERE RT.RATE_TBL_ID = BPG.RATE_TBL_ID

SELECT CASE CS.PLAN_TYPE WHEN '10' THEN CASE OP.OPTION_TYPE WHEN 'O' THEN CS.PLAN_TYPE WHEN 'W' THEN 'WAIVE' END WHEN '15' THEN CS.PLAN_TYPE ELSE 'OTHER' END AS RATE_ID_TYPE , CS.RATE_TBL_ID , COUNT(*) AS RATE_ID_COUNT FROM PS_BEN_DEFN_OPTN OP LEFT JOIN PS_BEN_DEFN_COST CS ON CS.BENEFIT_PROGRAM = OP.BENEFIT_PROGRAM AND CS.EFFDT = OP.EFFDT AND CS.PLAN_TYPE = OP.PLAN_TYPE AND CS.OPTION_ID = OP.OPTION_ID WHERE OP.BENEFIT_PROGRAM = :benefitProgram AND OP.OPTION_TYPE IN ('O','W') AND OP.EFFDT = ( SELECT MAX( EFFDT ) FROM PS_BEN_DEFN_PGM PG WHERE PG.BENEFIT_PROGRAM = OP.BENEFIT_PROGRAM AND PG.EFFDT <= :effDate ) AND OP.PLAN_TYPE IN ( '10','15', '11','16', '14','17', '1V','1U', '1D','1E' ) AND NOT ( OP.ELIG_RULES_ID IN ( '2009', '23GC', '236Q' ) ) AND EXISTS ( SELECT 'X' FROM PS_BN_RATE_TBL RT WHERE RT.RATE_TBL_ID = CS.RATE_TBL_ID AND RT.EFFDT = ( SELECT MAX(EFFDT) FROM PS_BN_RATE_TBL R1 WHERE R1.RATE_TBL_ID = RT.RATE_TBL_ID AND R1.EFFDT <= :effDate ) AND RT.PF_CLIENT = ( SELECT PGX.PF_CLIENT FROM PS_BEN_DEFN_PGM PGX WHERE PGX.BENEFIT_PROGRAM = :benefitProgram AND PGX.EFFDT = ( SELECT MAX(EFFDT) FROM PS_BEN_DEFN_PGM P1 WHERE P1.BENEFIT_PROGRAM = PGX.BENEFIT_PROGRAM AND P1.EFFDT <= :effDate ) ) ) GROUP BY CASE CS.PLAN_TYPE WHEN '10' THEN CASE OP.OPTION_TYPE WHEN 'O' THEN CS.PLAN_TYPE WHEN 'W' THEN 'WAIVE' END WHEN '15' THEN CS.PLAN_TYPE ELSE 'OTHER' END , CS.RATE_TBL_ID ORDER BY 1, 3 ASC

SELECT OPTN.OPTION_ID, CST.COST_ID FROM PS_BEN_DEFN_PGM PGM , PS_BEN_DEFN_OPTN OPTN , PS_BEN_DEFN_COST CST WHERE PGM.BENEFIT_PROGRAM = :benefitProgram AND PGM.EFFDT = TO_DATE( :effdtStr, 'DD-MON-YYYY' ) AND OPTN.BENEFIT_PROGRAM = PGM.BENEFIT_PROGRAM AND OPTN.EFFDT = PGM.EFFDT AND OPTN.PLAN_TYPE = :planType AND OPTN.OPTION_TYPE = 'W' AND CST.BENEFIT_PROGRAM(+) = OPTN.BENEFIT_PROGRAM AND CST.EFFDT(+) = OPTN.EFFDT AND CST.PLAN_TYPE(+) = OPTN.PLAN_TYPE AND CST.OPTION_ID(+) = OPTN.OPTION_ID

MERGE INTO PS_BEN_DEFN_COST TGT USING (
SELECT :benefitProgram AS BENEFIT_PROGRAM , TO_DATE( :effdtStr, 'DD-MON-YYYY' ) AS EFFDT , :planType AS PLAN_TYPE , :optionId AS OPTION_ID , CASE WHEN :costId IS NULL THEN ( SELECT ( NVL( MAX( COST_ID ), 0 )) + 1 AS NEXT_COST_ID FROM PS_BEN_DEFN_COST WHERE BENEFIT_PROGRAM = :benefitProgram AND EFFDT = TO_DATE( :effdtStr, 'DD-MON-YYYY' ) ) ELSE TO_NUMBER( :costId ) END AS COST_ID , 'C' AS COST_TYPE , 'N1' AS ERNCD , '2' AS RATE_TYPE , :rateTblId AS RATE_TBL_ID , 'PSX' AS CALC_RULES_ID FROM DUAL ) SRC
ON ( SRC.BENEFIT_PROGRAM = TGT.BENEFIT_PROGRAM AND SRC.EFFDT = TGT.EFFDT AND SRC.PLAN_TYPE = TGT.PLAN_TYPE AND SRC.OPTION_ID = TGT.OPTION_ID AND SRC.COST_ID = TGT.COST_ID )
WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT ( TGT.BENEFIT_PROGRAM, TGT.EFFDT, TGT.PLAN_TYPE, TGT.OPTION_ID, TGT.COST_ID , TGT.COST_TYPE, TGT.ERNCD, TGT.RATE_TYPE, TGT.RATE_TBL_ID, TGT.CALC_RULES_ID ) VALUES ( SRC.BENEFIT_PROGRAM, SRC.EFFDT, SRC.PLAN_TYPE, SRC.OPTION_ID, SRC.COST_ID , SRC.COST_TYPE, SRC.ERNCD, SRC.RATE_TYPE, SRC.RATE_TBL_ID, SRC.CALC_RULES_ID )
WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET TGT.RATE_TBL_ID = SRC.RATE_TBL_ID

MERGE INTO PS_BN_RATE_TBL TGT USING ( SELECT :rateTblId AS RATE_TBL_ID , TO_DATE( :effdtStr, 'DD-MON-YYYY' ) AS EFFDT , 'A' AS EFF_STATUS , '2' AS RATE_TYPE , SUBSTR( ( :benefitProgram || ' waiver allowance' ), 1, 30 ) AS DESCR , 'Wv allow' AS DESCRSHORT , 'M' AS PAY_FREQUENCY , '1' AS RATE_UNIT , 'USD' AS CURRENCY_CD , 'N' AS RATE_LIMIT_CD , 0 AS FLAT_AMT_LIMIT , 0 AS PCT_RATE_LIMIT , :pfClient AS PF_CLIENT FROM DUAL ) SRC
ON ( TGT.RATE_TBL_ID = SRC.RATE_TBL_ID AND TGT.EFFDT = SRC.EFFDT )
WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT( TGT.RATE_TBL_ID, TGT.EFFDT, TGT.EFF_STATUS, TGT.RATE_TYPE, TGT.DESCR , TGT.DESCRSHORT, TGT.PAY_FREQUENCY, TGT.RATE_UNIT, TGT.CURRENCY_CD , TGT.RATE_LIMIT_CD, TGT.FLAT_AMT_LIMIT, TGT.PCT_RATE_LIMIT, TGT.PF_CLIENT ) VALUES ( SRC.RATE_TBL_ID, SRC.EFFDT, SRC.EFF_STATUS, SRC.RATE_TYPE, SRC.DESCR , SRC.DESCRSHORT, SRC.PAY_FREQUENCY, SRC.RATE_UNIT, SRC.CURRENCY_CD , SRC.RATE_LIMIT_CD, SRC.FLAT_AMT_LIMIT, SRC.PCT_RATE_LIMIT, SRC.PF_CLIENT )
WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET TGT.EFF_STATUS = SRC.EFF_STATUS , TGT.RATE_TYPE = SRC.RATE_TYPE , TGT.DESCR = SRC.DESCR , TGT.DESCRSHORT = SRC.DESCRSHORT , TGT.PAY_FREQUENCY = SRC.PAY_FREQUENCY , TGT.RATE_UNIT = SRC.RATE_UNIT , TGT.CURRENCY_CD = SRC.CURRENCY_CD , TGT.RATE_LIMIT_CD = SRC.RATE_LIMIT_CD , TGT.FLAT_AMT_LIMIT = SRC.FLAT_AMT_LIMIT , TGT.PCT_RATE_LIMIT = SRC.PCT_RATE_LIMIT , TGT.PF_CLIENT = SRC.PF_CLIENT

MERGE INTO PS_BN_RATE_DATA TGT USING ( SELECT :rateTblId AS RATE_TBL_ID , TO_DATE( :effdtStr, 'DD-MON-YYYY' ) AS EFFDT , ' ' AS BN_RATE_KEY01 , ' ' AS BN_RATE_KEY02 , ' ' AS BN_RATE_KEY03 , :bnEmplRate AS BN_EMPL_RATE , 0 AS BN_EMPLR_RATE , 0 AS BN_B_TAX_RATE , 0 AS BN_A_TAX_RATE , 0 AS BN_N_TAX_RATE , 0 AS BN_T_TAX_RATE , 0 AS BN_P_TAX_RATE , ' ' AS OTHER_RATES_EXIST , :bnEmplRate AS T2_PROV_COVRG_RATE , :pfClient AS PF_CLIENT FROM DUAL ) SRC
ON ( TGT.RATE_TBL_ID = SRC.RATE_TBL_ID AND TGT.EFFDT = SRC.EFFDT AND TGT.BN_RATE_KEY01 = SRC.BN_RATE_KEY01 AND TGT.BN_RATE_KEY02 = SRC.BN_RATE_KEY02 AND TGT.BN_RATE_KEY03 = SRC.BN_RATE_KEY03 )
WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT ( TGT.RATE_TBL_ID, TGT.EFFDT, TGT.BN_RATE_KEY01, TGT.BN_RATE_KEY02, TGT.BN_RATE_KEY03 , TGT.BN_EMPL_RATE, TGT.BN_EMPLR_RATE, TGT.BN_B_TAX_RATE, TGT.BN_A_TAX_RATE, TGT.BN_N_TAX_RATE , TGT.BN_T_TAX_RATE, TGT.BN_P_TAX_RATE, TGT.OTHER_RATES_EXIST, TGT.T2_PROV_COVRG_RATE, TGT.PF_CLIENT ) VALUES ( SRC.RATE_TBL_ID, SRC.EFFDT, SRC.BN_RATE_KEY01, SRC.BN_RATE_KEY02, SRC.BN_RATE_KEY03 , SRC.BN_EMPL_RATE, SRC.BN_EMPLR_RATE, SRC.BN_B_TAX_RATE, SRC.BN_A_TAX_RATE, SRC.BN_N_TAX_RATE , SRC.BN_T_TAX_RATE, SRC.BN_P_TAX_RATE, SRC.OTHER_RATES_EXIST, SRC.T2_PROV_COVRG_RATE, SRC.PF_CLIENT )
WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET TGT.BN_EMPL_RATE = SRC.BN_EMPL_RATE , TGT.BN_EMPLR_RATE = SRC.BN_EMPLR_RATE , TGT.BN_B_TAX_RATE = SRC.BN_B_TAX_RATE , TGT.BN_A_TAX_RATE = SRC.BN_A_TAX_RATE , TGT.BN_N_TAX_RATE = SRC.BN_N_TAX_RATE , TGT.BN_T_TAX_RATE = SRC.BN_T_TAX_RATE , TGT.BN_P_TAX_RATE = SRC.BN_P_TAX_RATE , TGT.OTHER_RATES_EXIST = SRC.OTHER_RATES_EXIST , TGT.T2_PROV_COVRG_RATE = SRC.T2_PROV_COVRG_RATE , TGT.PF_CLIENT = SRC.PF_CLIENT

SELECT PG.ELIG_RULES_ID, PG.BENEFIT_PROGRAM FROM PS_BEN_DEFN_OPTN PG WHERE PG.BENEFIT_PROGRAM IN (SELECT BENEFIT_PROGRAM FROM PS_BEN_DEFN_PGM WHERE PF_CLIENT = :pfClient ) AND PG.EFFDT = (SELECT MAX(EFFDT) FROM PS_BEN_DEFN_PGM P1 WHERE P1.BENEFIT_PROGRAM = PG.BENEFIT_PROGRAM AND P1.EFFDT <= :effDate ) AND PG.PLAN_TYPE = '01'

SELECT OP.T2_WAITING_PERIOD, OP.BENEFIT_PROGRAM FROM PS_T2_CLIENT_OPT2A OP WHERE OP.COMPANY = :company AND OP.EFFDT = (SELECT MAX( EFFDT ) FROM PS_T2_CL_OPTN_EFDT O1 WHERE O1.COMPANY = OP.COMPANY AND O1.PF_CLIENT = OP.PF_CLIENT AND O1.EFFDT <= :effDate)

SELECT COALESCE( ( SELECT MAX( TRIM( ELIG_CONFIG1 ) ) FROM XBSS_GROUP@HPDB_HRDB WHERE COMPANY_ID IN (SELECT ID FROM XBSS_COMPANY@HPDB_HRDB WHERE CODE = :company) AND BENEFIT_PROGRAM = :benProgram ) , ( SELECT TRIM( O2.T2_CLASS_CODE ) FROM PS_T2_CLIENT_OPT2A O2 WHERE O2.COMPANY = :company AND O2.EFFDT = (SELECT MAX( EFFDT ) FROM PS_T2_CLIENT_OPTN2 O1 WHERE O1.COMPANY = O2.COMPANY AND O1.PF_CLIENT = O2.PF_CLIENT AND O1.EFFDT <= :effDt) AND O2.BENEFIT_PROGRAM = :benProgram ) ) AS ELIG_CONFIG1 FROM DUAL

SELECT O2.BENEFIT_PROGRAM, O2.T2_CLASS_CODE FROM PS_T2_CLIENT_OPT2A O2 WHERE O2.COMPANY = :company AND O2.EFFDT = ( SELECT MAX(EFFDT) FROM PS_T2_CLIENT_OPTN2 O1 WHERE O1.COMPANY = O2.COMPANY AND O1.PF_CLIENT = O2.PF_CLIENT AND O1.EFFDT <= :effDt ) UNION SELECT BENEFIT_PROGRAM, ELIG_CONFIG1 FROM XBSS_GROUP@HPDB_HRDB WHERE COMPANY_ID IN ( SELECT ID FROM XBSS_COMPANY@HPDB_HRDB WHERE CODE = :company )

UPDATE PS_T2_CLIENT_OPTN2 SET EFF_STATUS = :effStatus , T2_FUNDING_OPTN = :legacyFundingOpt , T2_FORFEIT_EXC_CR = :excessCreditOpt , T2_BENSUPP_NB = :waiverAllowance , T2_BENSUPP_ALL = 0 , T2_BENSUPP_EE = :benSupp1 , T2_BENSUPP_SP = :benSupp2 , T2_BENSUPP_DEP = :benSuppC , T2_BENSUPP_FAM = :benSupp4 WHERE COMPANY = :company AND PF_CLIENT = :pfClient AND EFFDT = :effdtStr AND BENEFIT_PROGRAM = :benProgram
UPDATE PS_T2_CLIENT_OPT2A SET T2_EXCL_MED_PLAN = :exclPlan WHERE COMPANY = :company AND PF_CLIENT = :pfClient AND EFFDT = :effdtStr AND BENEFIT_PROGRAM = :benProgram

SELECT DISTINCT C.OE_QUARTER, B.CLIENT_TYPE FROM XBSS_SEARCH_ACCESS_CONTROL@HPDB_HRDB B , XBSS_REALM_PLAN_YEAR@HPDB_HRDB C WHERE ( B.DEPARTMENT = (SELECT A.DEPTID FROM PS_JOB A WHERE A.EMPLID = :psEmplid AND A.COMPANY = '001' AND A.EMPL_STATUS = 'A' AND A.EFFDT = (SELECT MAX( EFFDT ) FROM PS_JOB A1 WHERE A1.EMPLID = A.EMPLID AND A1.EMPL_RCD = A.EMPL_RCD AND A1.EFFDT <= SYSDATE) AND A.EFFSEQ = (SELECT MAX( EFFSEQ ) FROM PS_JOB A2 WHERE A2.EMPLID = A.EMPLID AND A2.EMPL_RCD = A.EMPL_RCD AND A2.EFFDT = A.EFFDT)) OR ROLE IN (SELECT S_ROLE FROM ALLROLES_VW@HPDB_HRDB WHERE PERSONID = (SELECT PERSONID FROM PERSON_KEYS@hpdb_hrdb WHERE PERS_KEY_TYPE = 2 AND PERS_KEY = :psEmplid)) ) AND C.REALM_ID = B.REALM_ID ORDER BY DECODE(B.CLIENT_TYPE, 'ALL', 1, 'NEW', 2, 3)

SELECT CO.COMPANY, CO.DESCR AS ORG_DESC FROM PS_COMPANY_TBL CO WHERE CO.COMPANY IN ( SELECT B.COMPANY FROM PS_T2_CLIENTOPTION B WHERE CO.COMPANY = B.COMPANY AND B.T2_COMP_TERM_DT IS NULL AND B.T2_OE_QUARTER IN ( :quarterList ) ) AND CO.EFFDT = ( SELECT MAX( EFFDT ) FROM PS_COMPANY_TBL C1 WHERE C1.COMPANY = CO.COMPANY AND C1.EFFDT <= TRUNC(SYSDATE) ) AND ( UPPER( CO.COMPANY ) LIKE UPPER( :inputText ) OR UPPER( CO.DESCR ) LIKE UPPER( :inputText ) )

SELECT CO.COMPANY, CO.DESCR AS ORG_DESC FROM PS_COMPANY_TBL CO WHERE CO.COMPANY IN ( SELECT B.COMPANY FROM PS_T2_CLIENTOPTION B WHERE CO.COMPANY = B.COMPANY AND B.T2_COMP_TERM_DT IS NULL AND B.T2_OE_QUARTER IN ( :quarterList ) ) AND CO.EFFDT = ( SELECT MAX( EFFDT ) FROM PS_COMPANY_TBL C1 WHERE C1.COMPANY = CO.COMPANY AND C1.EFFDT <= TRUNC(SYSDATE) ) AND ( UPPER( CO.COMPANY ) LIKE UPPER( :inputText ) OR UPPER( CO.DESCR ) LIKE UPPER( :inputText ) ) AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 'X' FROM PS_T2_PAYROLL_HDR HDR WHERE HDR.COMPANY = CO.COMPANY AND HDR.SEQUENCE_NBR_6 > 0 )

SELECT CO.COMPANY, CO.DESCR AS ORG_DESC FROM PS_COMPANY_TBL CO WHERE CO.COMPANY IN ( SELECT B.COMPANY FROM PS_T2_CLIENTOPTION B WHERE CO.COMPANY = B.COMPANY AND B.T2_COMP_TERM_DT IS NULL AND B.T2_OE_QUARTER IN ( :quarterList ) AND ( ( NOT B.T2_PRODUCT_LINE IN ( 'NOHW' ) ) OR ( B.T2_PEO_ID = 'ALP' AND B.T2_PRODUCT_LINE = 'NOMD' ) ) ) AND CO.EFFDT = ( SELECT MAX( EFFDT ) FROM PS_COMPANY_TBL C1 WHERE C1.COMPANY = CO.COMPANY AND C1.EFFDT <= TRUNC(SYSDATE) ) AND ( UPPER( CO.COMPANY ) LIKE UPPER( :inputText ) OR UPPER( CO.DESCR ) LIKE UPPER( :inputText ) ) AND EXISTS ( SELECT 'X' FROM PS_T2_PAYROLL_HDR HDR WHERE HDR.COMPANY = CO.COMPANY AND HDR.SEQUENCE_NBR_6 > 0 )

WITH T2_JOB AS ( SELECT J.EMPLID, J.EMPL_RCD, J.DEPTID, J.LOCATION, J.SETID_LOCATION, J.SETID_DEPT FROM PS_JOB J WHERE J.COMPANY = :companyCode AND J.BEN_STATUS IN ('A', 'P', 'U') AND NOT (J.EMPLID LIKE 'C%' ) AND NOT (J.EMPL_CLASS = 'U' ) AND J.REG_TEMP = 'R' AND J.FULL_PART_TIME = 'F' AND J.STD_HOURS >= 30 AND J.EFFDT = (SELECT MAX(J1.EFFDT ) FROM PS_JOB J1 WHERE J1.EMPLID = J.EMPLID AND J1.EMPL_RCD = J.EMPL_RCD AND J1.EFFDT <= :effDate ) AND J.EFFSEQ = (SELECT MAX( J2.EFFSEQ ) FROM PS_JOB J2 WHERE J2.EMPLID = J.EMPLID AND J2.EMPL_RCD = J.EMPL_RCD AND J2.EFFDT = J.EFFDT ) ) SELECT DISTINCT J.EMPLID, J.EMPL_RCD, N.NAME, D.DESCR DEPT_DESCR, L.DESCR LOC_DESCR, ASGN.BUSINESS_TITLE JC_DESCR, B.BENEFIT_PROGRAM FROM T2_JOB J, PS_BEN_PROG_PARTIC B, PS_LOCATION_TBL L, PS_DEPT_TBL D, PS_NAMES N, PS_PER_ORG_ASGN ASGN WHERE ASGN.EMPLID = J.EMPLID AND ASGN.EMPL_RCD = J.EMPL_RCD AND N.EMPLID = J.EMPLID AND N.NAME_TYPE = 'PRI' AND N.EFFDT = (SELECT MAX(N1.EFFDT) FROM PS_NAMES N1 WHERE N1.EMPLID = N.EMPLID AND N1.NAME_TYPE = N.NAME_TYPE AND N1.EFFDT <= :effDate) AND B.EMPLID = J.EMPLID AND B.EMPL_RCD = J.EMPL_RCD AND B.COBRA_EVENT_ID = 0 AND B.EFFDT = (SELECT MAX(EFFDT) FROM PS_BEN_PROG_PARTIC B1 WHERE B1.EMPLID = B.EMPLID AND B1.EMPL_RCD = B.EMPL_RCD AND B1.COBRA_EVENT_ID = B.COBRA_EVENT_ID AND B1.EFFDT <= :effDate ) AND L.SETID = J.SETID_LOCATION AND L.LOCATION = J.LOCATION AND L.EFFDT = (SELECT MAX(L1.EFFDT) FROM PS_LOCATION_TBL L1 WHERE L1.LOCATION = L.LOCATION AND L1.SETID = L.SETID AND L1.EFFDT <= :effDate ) AND D.SETID = J.SETID_DEPT AND D.DEPTID = J.DEPTID AND D.EFFDT = (SELECT MAX(D1.EFFDT) FROM PS_DEPT_TBL D1 WHERE D1.DEPTID = D.DEPTID AND D1.SETID = D.SETID AND D1.EFFDT <= :effDate )

select benefit_program, count( distinct emplid) from ( WITH T2_JOB AS (SELECT J.COMPANY, J.EMPLID, J.EMPL_RCD FROM PS_JOB J WHERE J.COMPANY =:companyCode AND J.BEN_STATUS IN ('A', 'P', 'U') AND NOT ( J.EMPLID LIKE 'C%' ) AND NOT (J.EMPL_CLASS = 'U' ) AND REG_TEMP = 'R' AND FULL_PART_TIME = 'F' AND STD_HOURS >= 30 AND J.EFFDT = (SELECT MAX(J1.EFFDT ) FROM PS_JOB J1 WHERE J1.EMPLID = J.EMPLID AND J1.EMPL_RCD = J.EMPL_RCD AND J1.EFFDT <=:effDate ) AND J.EFFSEQ = (SELECT MAX( J2.EFFSEQ ) FROM PS_JOB J2 WHERE J2.EMPLID = J.EMPLID AND J2.EMPL_RCD = J.EMPL_RCD AND J2.EFFDT = J.EFFDT ) ), T2_BENEFITS AS (SELECT J.COMPANY, H.EMPLID, H.EMPL_RCD, H.COBRA_EVENT_ID, H.PLAN_TYPE, H.BENEFIT_PLAN, H.COVRG_CD FROM PS_HEALTH_BENEFIT H, T2_JOB J WHERE H.EMPLID = J.EMPLID AND H.EMPL_RCD = J.EMPL_RCD AND H.COBRA_EVENT_ID = 0 AND H.COVERAGE_ELECT IN ('E','W') AND H.EFFDT = (SELECT MAX( EFFDT ) FROM PS_HEALTH_BENEFIT H1 WHERE H1.EMPLID = H.EMPLID AND H1.EMPL_RCD = H.EMPL_RCD AND H1.COBRA_EVENT_ID = H.COBRA_EVENT_ID AND H1.PLAN_TYPE = H.PLAN_TYPE AND H1.BENEFIT_NBR = H.BENEFIT_NBR AND H1.EFFDT <=:effDate ) UNION SELECT J.COMPANY, L.EMPLID, L.EMPL_RCD, 0 COBRA_EVENT_ID, L.PLAN_TYPE, L.BENEFIT_PLAN, '0' COVRG_CD FROM PS_LIFE_ADD_BEN L, T2_JOB J WHERE L.EMPLID = J.EMPLID AND L.EMPL_RCD = J.EMPL_RCD AND L.COVERAGE_ELECT IN ('E','W') AND L.EFFDT = (SELECT MAX( L1.EFFDT ) FROM PS_LIFE_ADD_BEN L1 WHERE L1.EMPLID = L.EMPLID AND L1.EMPL_RCD = L.EMPL_RCD AND L1.PLAN_TYPE = L.PLAN_TYPE AND L1.BENEFIT_NBR = L.BENEFIT_NBR AND L1.EFFDT <=:effDate )
UNION SELECT J.COMPANY, D.EMPLID, D.EMPL_RCD, 0 COBRA_EVENT_ID, D.PLAN_TYPE, D.BENEFIT_PLAN, '0' COVRG_CD FROM PS_DISABILITY_BEN D, T2_JOB J WHERE D.EMPLID = J.EMPLID AND D.EMPL_RCD = J.EMPL_RCD AND D.COVERAGE_ELECT IN ('E','W') AND D.EFFDT = (SELECT MAX( D1.EFFDT ) FROM PS_DISABILITY_BEN D1 WHERE D1.EMPLID = D.EMPLID AND D1.EMPL_RCD = D.EMPL_RCD AND D1.PLAN_TYPE = D.PLAN_TYPE AND D1.BENEFIT_NBR = D.BENEFIT_NBR AND D1.EFFDT <=:effDate ) UNION SELECT J.COMPANY, S.EMPLID, S.EMPL_RCD, 0 COBRA_EVENT_ID, S.PLAN_TYPE, S.BENEFIT_PLAN, '0' COVRG_CD FROM PS_SIMPLE_BENEFIT S, T2_JOB J WHERE S.EMPLID = J.EMPLID AND S.EMPL_RCD = J.EMPL_RCD AND S.COVERAGE_ELECT IN ('E','W') AND S.EFFDT = (SELECT MAX( S1.EFFDT ) FROM PS_SIMPLE_BENEFIT S1 WHERE S1.EMPLID = S.EMPLID AND S1.EMPL_RCD = S.EMPL_RCD AND S1.PLAN_TYPE = S.PLAN_TYPE AND S1.BENEFIT_NBR = S.BENEFIT_NBR AND S1.EFFDT <=:effDate ) ) SELECT B.COMPANY, A.BENEFIT_PROGRAM, A.EMPLID, A.EMPL_RCD, B.COBRA_EVENT_ID, B.PLAN_TYPE, B.BENEFIT_PLAN, B.COVRG_CD FROM PS_BEN_PROG_PARTIC A, T2_BENEFITS B WHERE A.EMPLID = B.EMPLID AND A.EMPL_RCD = B.EMPL_RCD AND A.COBRA_EVENT_ID = 0 AND A.COBRA_EVENT_ID = B.COBRA_EVENT_ID AND trim(B.BENEFIT_PLAN) is not null AND A.EFFDT = (SELECT MAX(A1.EFFDT) FROM PS_BEN_PROG_PARTIC A1 WHERE A1.EMPLID = A.EMPLID AND A1.EMPL_RCD = A.EMPL_RCD AND A1.COBRA_EVENT_ID = A.COBRA_EVENT_ID AND A1.EFFDT <=:effDate ) and B.PLAN_TYPE in ( :planTypes ) ) group by benefit_program

SELECT SVW.CODE CODE, SVW.EMPLID EMPLID, SVW.EMPL_RCD EMPL_RCD, NULL EFFDT, SVW.CURRENT_BENEFIT_PROGRAM CURRENT_BENEFIT_PROGRAM, SVW.FUTURE_ELIG_CONFIG1 FUTURE_ELIG_CONFIG1, SVW.FUTURE_BENEFIT_PROGRAM FUTURE_BENEFIT_PROGRAM FROM XBSS_EMPL_STRATEGY_GROUP_VW SVW WHERE SVW.STRATEGY_ID = :STRATEGY_ID AND ( ( :IS_MATCH = 'true' ) OR ( :IS_MATCH = 'false' AND SVW.CURRENT_BENEFIT_PROGRAM != SVW.FUTURE_BENEFIT_PROGRAM ) )

SELECT CASE WHEN EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM PS_T2_CLIENT_OPT2A O2A WHERE O2A.COMPANY = :company AND O2A.EFFDT = ( SELECT MAX(O2A1.EFFDT) FROM PS_T2_CLIENT_OPT2A O2A1 WHERE O2A1.COMPANY = O2A.COMPANY AND O2A1.EFFDT < :effDt ) AND O2A.T2_BEN_PROG_GROUP = 'ONE' ) THEN 'false' ELSE 'true' END AS IS_ONE_PRESENT FROM DUAL
DELETE FROM PS_T2_EE_BPG WHERE COMPANY = :COMPANY AND EFFDT = :EFFDT

INSERT INTO PS_T2_EE_BPG ( COMPANY, EMPLID, EMPL_RCD, EFFDT, BENEFIT_PROGRAM, ELIG_CONFIG1, T2_PRCS_FLAG, LASTUPDOPRID, LASTUPDDTTM ) VALUES ( :COMPANY, :EMPLID, :EMPLRCD, :EFFDT, :BENEFITPROGRAM, :ELIGCONFIG1, 'N', 'BSS', SYSDATE )

MERGE INTO PS_T2_CLIENT_OPTN2 TGT USING ( SELECT COMPANY, PF_CLIENT, EFFDT, BENEFIT_PROGRAM, EFF_STATUS, T2_FUNDING_OPTN, T2_EE_PCT, T2_DEP_PCT , T2_EE_PCT_D, T2_DEP_PCT_D, T2_EE_PCT_V, T2_DEP_PCT_V, T2_RATE_UPDATE, T2_BAND_CHG, T2_FUNDING_CHG , T2_BENSUPP_EE, T2_BENSUPP_SP, T2_BENSUPP_DEP, T2_BENSUPP_FAM, T2_BENSUPP_ALL, T2_BENSUPP_NB, T2_LIFE_PLAN , T2_LTD_PLAN, T2_STD_PLAN, T2_FORFEIT_EXC_CR, T2_SPONS_MDV, T2_MED_EE, T2_MED_SP, T2_MED_DEP, T2_MED_FAM , T2_DENT_EE, T2_DENT_SP, T2_DENT_DEP, T2_DENT_FAM, T2_VIS_EE, T2_VIS_SP, T2_VIS_DEP, T2_VIS_FAM , T2_LIMIT_PLAN_10, T2_LIMIT_PLAN_15, T2_LIMIT_MED_EE, T2_LIMIT_MED_SP, T2_LIMIT_MED_DEP, T2_LIMIT_MED_FAM , T2_ER_HSA_LVL, T2_ER_HSA_FRT_EE, T2_ER_HSA_FRT_FAM, T2_HSA_FRT_PAYOUT, T2_ER_HSA_MON_EE, T2_ER_HSA_MON_FAM , T2_BAND_CD, T2_LIFE_BAND_CD, T2_DIS_BAND_CD, T2_LIMIT_PLAN_11, T2_LIMIT_DEN_EE, T2_LIMIT_DEN_SP , T2_LIMIT_DEN_DEP, T2_LIMIT_DEN_FAM, T2_LIMIT_PLAN_14, T2_LIMIT_VIS_EE, T2_LIMIT_VIS_SP, T2_LIMIT_VIS_DEP , T2_LIMIT_VIS_FAM, T2_BCBS_BAND_CD, T2_BCBSNC_BAND_CD, T2_KAISCA_BAND_CD, T2_KAISCO_BAND_CD, T2_BSOFCA_BAND_CD , T2_AETNA_BAND_CD, T2_TUFTS_BAND_CD, T2_UHC_BAND_CD, T2_BCOFID_BAND_CD , T2_BCBSMN_BAND_CD, T2_KAIMIDA_BAND_CD, T2_KAISHI_BAND_CD, T2_AET_HMO_BAND_CD, T2_AET_PPO_BAND_CD , T2_EMP_NY_BAND_CD, T2_HSA_CNTB_FRQ, T2_HSA_FRNT_FRQ, T2_HSA_FRTMNTH_Q1, T2_HSA_FRTMNTH_Q2, T2_HSA_FRTMNTH_Q3 , T2_HSA_FRTMNTH_Q4, T2_HARVARD_BAND_CD FROM PS_T2_CLIENT_OPTN2 O2 WHERE O2.COMPANY = :companyCode AND O2.PF_CLIENT = :pfClient AND O2.BENEFIT_PROGRAM = :benProgram AND O2.EFFDT = ( SELECT MAX(EFFDT) FROM PS_T2_CLIENT_OPTN2 ED WHERE ED.COMPANY = O2.COMPANY AND ED.PF_CLIENT = O2.PF_CLIENT AND ED.BENEFIT_PROGRAM = O2.BENEFIT_PROGRAM AND ED.EFFDT <= :effDate ) ) SRC
ON ( TGT.COMPANY = SRC.COMPANY AND TGT.PF_CLIENT = SRC.PF_CLIENT AND TGT.EFFDT = :effDate AND TGT.BENEFIT_PROGRAM = SRC.BENEFIT_PROGRAM )
WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT ( TGT.COMPANY, TGT.PF_CLIENT, TGT.EFFDT, TGT.BENEFIT_PROGRAM, TGT.EFF_STATUS, TGT.T2_FUNDING_OPTN , TGT.T2_EE_PCT, TGT.T2_DEP_PCT, TGT.T2_EE_PCT_D, TGT.T2_DEP_PCT_D, TGT.T2_EE_PCT_V, TGT.T2_DEP_PCT_V , TGT.T2_RATE_UPDATE, TGT.T2_BAND_CHG, TGT.T2_FUNDING_CHG, TGT.T2_BENSUPP_EE, TGT.T2_BENSUPP_SP, TGT.T2_BENSUPP_DEP , TGT.T2_BENSUPP_FAM, TGT.T2_BENSUPP_ALL, TGT.T2_BENSUPP_NB, TGT.T2_LIFE_PLAN, TGT.T2_LTD_PLAN, TGT.T2_STD_PLAN , TGT.T2_FORFEIT_EXC_CR, TGT.T2_SPONS_MDV, TGT.T2_MED_EE, TGT.T2_MED_SP, TGT.T2_MED_DEP, TGT.T2_MED_FAM , TGT.T2_DENT_EE, ON ( TGT.T2_PEO_ID = SRC.T2_PEO_ID AND TGT.COMPANY = SRC.COMPANY AND TGT.PF_CLIENT = SRC.PF_CLIENT AND TGT.EFFDT = :effDate AND TGT.BENEFIT_PROGRAM = SRC.BENEFIT_PROGRAM )
WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT ( TGT.T2_PEO_ID, TGT.COMPANY, TGT.PF_CLIENT, TGT.EFFDT, TGT.BENEFIT_PROGRAM, TGT.EFF_STATUS , TGT.T2_SELECTED_PLANS, TGT.T2_BENSUPP_EE, TGT.T2_BENSUPP_SP, , TGT.T2_LIMIT_VIS_SP, TGT.T2_VIS_MAX_EE, TGT.T2_VIS_MAX_SP, TGT.T2_VIS_MAX_DEP, TGT.T2_VIS_MAX_FAM , TGT.T2_NOT_OFFERED_1D, TGT.T2_NOT_OFFERED_1U, TGT.T2_NOT_OFFERED_23, TGT.T2_NOT_OFFERED_30 , TGT.T2_NOT_OFFERED_31, TGT.T2_NOT_OFFERED_A3, TGT.T2_OFFER_EE_30, TGT.T2_OFFER_EE_31 , TGT.T2_GROUP_TYPE, TGT.T2_GROUP_STATE ) VALUES ( SRC.T2_PEO_ID, SRC.COMPANY, SRC.PF_CLIENT, :effDate, , SRC.T2_LIMIT_DEN_SP, SRC.T2_DEN_MAX_EE, SRC.T2_DEN_MAX_SP, SRC.T2_DEN_MAX_DEP, SRC.T2_DEN_MAX_FAM , SRC.T2_BSS_VS_FUNDING, SRC.T2_NOT_OFFERED_14, SRC.T2_LIMIT_PLAN_14, SRC.T2_LIMIT_COVRG_14 ,
