MERGE INTO PS_BEN_DEFN_PGM TGT USING ( SELECT BENEFIT_PROGRAM, EFFDT, DESCR, PF_CLIENT, DESCRSHORT, EFF_STATUS, PROGRAM_TYPE , FSA_RUN_ID, FSA_MAX_ANNL_PLDG, CURRENCY_CD, DFLT_EXPIRATION_DD, DFLT_CREDIT_RLLOVR , COBRA_SURCHARGE, COBRA_DISABL_SURCG, FMLA_PLAN_ID, SHOW_CREDIT, COST_FREQUENCY , HANDBOOK_URL_ID, INCLD_CNSLSTX, COBRA_CONTACT_ID, BAS_SHOW_ER_COSTS, BAS_SHOW_TAX_IMPCT FROM PS_BEN_DEFN_PGM O2 WHERE O2.PF_CLIENT = :pfClient AND O2.BENEFIT_PROGRAM = :benProgram AND O2.EFFDT = ( SELECT MAX(EFFDT) FROM PS_BEN_DEFN_PGM ED WHERE ED.PF_CLIENT = O2.PF_CLIENT AND ED.BENEFIT_PROGRAM = O2.BENEFIT_PROGRAM AND ED.EFFDT <= :effDate ) ) SRC
ON ( TGT.BENEFIT_PROGRAM = SRC.BENEFIT_PROGRAM AND TGT.EFFDT = :effDate )
WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT ( TGT.BENEFIT_PROGRAM, TGT.EFFDT, TGT.DESCR, TGT.PF_CLIENT, TGT.DESCRSHORT, TGT.EFF_STATUS , TGT.PROGRAM_TYPE, TGT.FSA_RUN_ID, TGT.FSA_MAX_ANNL_PLDG, TGT.CURRENCY_CD, TGT.DFLT_EXPIRATION_DD , TGT.DFLT_CREDIT_RLLOVR, TGT.COBRA_SURCHARGE, TGT.COBRA_DISABL_SURCG, TGT.FMLA_PLAN_ID, TGT.SHOW_CREDIT , TGT.COST_FREQUENCY, TGT.HANDBOOK_URL_ID, TGT.INCLD_CNSLSTX, TGT.COBRA_CONTACT_ID, TGT.BAS_SHOW_ER_COSTS , TGT.BAS_SHOW_TAX_IMPCT ) VALUES ( SRC.BENEFIT_PROGRAM, :effDate, SRC.DESCR, SRC.PF_CLIENT, SRC.DESCRSHORT, SRC.EFF_STATUS , SRC.PROGRAM_TYPE, SRC.FSA_RUN_ID, SRC.FSA_MAX_ANNL_PLDG, SRC.CURRENCY_CD, SRC.DFLT_EXPIRATION_DD , SRC.DFLT_CREDIT_RLLOVR, SRC.COBRA_SURCHARGE, SRC.COBRA_DISABL_SURCG, SRC.FMLA_PLAN_ID, SRC.SHOW_CREDIT , SRC.COST_FREQUENCY, SRC.HANDBOOK_URL_ID, SRC.INCLD_CNSLSTX, SRC.COBRA_CONTACT_ID, SRC.BAS_SHOW_ER_COSTS , SRC.BAS_SHOW_TAX_IMPCT )

MERGE INTO PS_BEN_DEFN_PLAN TGT USING ( SELECT BENEFIT_PROGRAM, EFFDT, PLAN_TYPE, DISPLAY_PLN_SEQ, MIN_ANNUAL_CONTRIB , MAX_ANNUAL_CONTRIB, WAIVE_COVERAGE, RESTRICT_ENTRY_MM, EVENT_RULES_ID, COBRA_PLAN , HIPAA_PLAN, COLLECT_DEPBEN, COLLECT_FUNDS, SHOW_PLAN_TYPE, HANDBOOK_URL_ID, DEP_RULE_ID FROM PS_BEN_DEFN_PLAN O2 WHERE ( O2.BENEFIT_PROGRAM, O2.EFFDT ) IN ( SELECT PG.BENEFIT_PROGRAM, PG.EFFDT FROM PS_BEN_DEFN_PGM PG WHERE PG.BENEFIT_PROGRAM = :benProgram AND PG.EFFDT = ( SELECT MAX(EFFDT) FROM PS_BEN_DEFN_PGM P1 WHERE P1.BENEFIT_PROGRAM = PG.BENEFIT_PROGRAM AND P1.EFFDT <= :effDate ) ) AND O2.PLAN_TYPE = '01' ) SRC
ON ( TGT.BENEFIT_PROGRAM = SRC.BENEFIT_PROGRAM AND TGT.EFFDT = :effDate AND TGT.PLAN_TYPE = SRC.PLAN_TYPE )
WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT ( TGT.BENEFIT_PROGRAM, TGT.EFFDT, TGT.PLAN_TYPE, TGT.DISPLAY_PLN_SEQ, TGT.MIN_ANNUAL_CONTRIB , TGT.MAX_ANNUAL_CONTRIB, TGT.WAIVE_COVERAGE, TGT.RESTRICT_ENTRY_MM, TGT.EVENT_RULES_ID, TGT.COBRA_PLAN , TGT.HIPAA_PLAN, TGT.COLLECT_DEPBEN, TGT.COLLECT_FUNDS, TGT.SHOW_PLAN_TYPE, TGT.HANDBOOK_URL_ID, TGT.DEP_RULE_ID ) VALUES ( SRC.BENEFIT_PROGRAM, :effDate, SRC.PLAN_TYPE, SRC.DISPLAY_PLN_SEQ, SRC.MIN_ANNUAL_CONTRIB , SRC.MAX_ANNUAL_CONTRIB, SRC.WAIVE_COVERAGE, SRC.RESTRICT_ENTRY_MM, SRC.EVENT_RULES_ID, SRC.COBRA_PLAN , SRC.HIPAA_PLAN, SRC.COLLECT_DEPBEN, SRC.COLLECT_FUNDS, SRC.SHOW_PLAN_TYPE, SRC.HANDBOOK_URL_ID, SRC.DEP_RULE_ID )

MERGE INTO PS_BEN_DEFN_OPTN TGT USING ( SELECT BENEFIT_PROGRAM, EFFDT, PLAN_TYPE, OPTION_ID, DISPLAY_OPT_SEQ, OPTION_TYPE, BENEFIT_PLAN , COVRG_CD, OPTION_CD, OPTION_LVL, DEDCD, DFLT_OPTION_IND, ELIG_RULES_ID, LOCATION_TBL_ID , CROSS_PLAN_TYPE, CROSS_BENEF_PLAN, COVERAGE_LIMIT_PCT, CROSS_PLN_DPND_CHK FROM PS_BEN_DEFN_OPTN O2 WHERE ( O2.BENEFIT_PROGRAM, O2.EFFDT ) IN ( SELECT PG.BENEFIT_PROGRAM, PG.EFFDT FROM PS_BEN_DEFN_PGM PG WHERE PG.BENEFIT_PROGRAM = :benProgram AND PG.EFFDT = ( SELECT MAX(EFFDT) FROM PS_BEN_DEFN_PGM P1 WHERE P1.BENEFIT_PROGRAM = PG.BENEFIT_PROGRAM AND P1.EFFDT <= :effDate ) ) AND O2.PLAN_TYPE = '01' ) SRC
ON ( TGT.BENEFIT_PROGRAM = SRC.BENEFIT_PROGRAM AND TGT.EFFDT = :effDate AND TGT.PLAN_TYPE = SRC.PLAN_TYPE AND TGT.OPTION_ID = SRC.OPTION_ID )
WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT ( TGT.BENEFIT_PROGRAM, TGT.EFFDT, TGT.PLAN_TYPE, TGT.OPTION_ID, TGT.DISPLAY_OPT_SEQ, TGT.OPTION_TYPE , TGT.BENEFIT_PLAN, TGT.COVRG_CD, TGT.OPTION_CD, TGT.OPTION_LVL, TGT.DEDCD, TGT.DFLT_OPTION_IND, TGT.ELIG_RULES_ID , TGT.LOCATION_TBL_ID, TGT.CROSS_PLAN_TYPE, TGT.CROSS_BENEF_PLAN, TGT.COVERAGE_LIMIT_PCT, TGT.CROSS_PLN_DPND_CHK ) VALUES ( SRC.BENEFIT_PROGRAM, :effDate, SRC.PLAN_TYPE, SRC.OPTION_ID, SRC.DISPLAY_OPT_SEQ, SRC.OPTION_TYPE , SRC.BENEFIT_PLAN, SRC.COVRG_CD, SRC.OPTION_CD, SRC.OPTION_LVL, SRC.DEDCD, SRC.DFLT_OPTION_IND, '2009' , SRC.LOCATION_TBL_ID, SRC.CROSS_PLAN_TYPE, SRC.CROSS_BENEF_PLAN, SRC.COVERAGE_LIMIT_PCT, SRC.CROSS_PLN_DPND_CHK )
WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET TGT.ELIG_RULES_ID = '2009'
DELETE FROM PS_T2_CLIENT_OPT2A WHERE COMPANY = :company AND PF_CLIENT = :pfClient AND EFFDT = :effDate AND BENEFIT_PROGRAM = :benefitProgram

select PG.COMPANY, PG.PF_CLIENT, PG.BENEFIT_PROGRAM, PG.EFFDT, PG.EFF_STATUS, PG.T2_BENSUPP_EE, PG.T2_BENSUPP_SP, PG.T2_BENSUPP_DEP, PG.T2_BENSUPP_FAM, PG.T2_BSS_MD_FUNDING, PG.T2_WAIVE_ALLOWANCE, PG.T2_LIMIT_PLAN_10, PG.T2_ER_MD_CNTRB_PCT, PG.T2_LIMIT_COVRG_10, PG.T2_LIMIT_MED_EE, PG.T2_LIMIT_MED_SP, PG.T2_LIMIT_MED_DEP, PG.T2_LIMIT_MED_FAM, PG.T2_MED_MAX_EE, PG.T2_MED_MAX_SP, PG.T2_MED_MAX_DEP, PG.T2_MED_MAX_FAM, PG.T2_BSS_DN_FUNDING, PG.T2_LIMIT_PLAN_11, PG.T2_ER_DN_CNTRB_PCT, PG.T2_LIMIT_COVRG_11, PG.T2_LIMIT_DEN_EE, PG.T2_LIMIT_DEN_SP, PG.T2_LIMIT_DEN_DEP, PG.T2_LIMIT_DEN_FAM, PG.T2_DEN_MAX_EE, PG.T2_DEN_MAX_SP, PG.T2_DEN_MAX_DEP, PG.T2_DEN_MAX_FAM, PG.T2_BSS_VS_FUNDING, PG.T2_LIMIT_PLAN_14, PG.T2_ER_VS_CNTRB_PCT, PG.T2_LIMIT_COVRG_14, PG.T2_LIMIT_VIS_EE, PG.T2_LIMIT_VIS_SP, PG.T2_LIMIT_VIS_DEP, PG.T2_LIMIT_VIS_FAM, PG.T2_VIS_MAX_EE, PG.T2_VIS_MAX_SP, PG.T2_VIS_MAX_DEP, PG.T2_VIS_MAX_FAM, PGM.DFLT_CREDIT_RLLOVR from PS_T2_PRCL_BN_PGM PG, PS_BEN_DEFN_PGM PGM where PG.COMPANY = :company and PG.BENEFIT_PROGRAM = PGM.BENEFIT_PROGRAM and PG.EFFDT = ( select max(EFFDT) from PS_T2_PRCL_BN_PGM P1 where P1.T2_PEO_ID = PG.T2_PEO_ID and P1.COMPANY = PG.COMPANY and P1.PF_CLIENT = PG.PF_CLIENT and P1.EFFDT <= :effDate )
and ( PGM.EFFDT = ( select max(EFFDT) from PS_BEN_DEFN_PGM P1 where P1.BENEFIT_PROGRAM = PGM.BENEFIT_PROGRAM and P1.EFFDT < = :effDate ))

SELECT /*+ OPT_PARAM('_optimizer_cost_based_transformation', 'LINEAR') */ HB.EMPLID , HB.EMPL_RCD , BPP.BENEFIT_PROGRAM , HB.PLAN_TYPE , HB.BENEFIT_PLAN , CASE HB.COVRG_CD WHEN '1' THEN CASE HBD.COVRG_CD WHEN '5' THEN '2' WHEN '6' THEN 'C' WHEN '7' THEN '4' WHEN '8' THEN '4' ELSE HB.COVRG_CD END WHEN '2' THEN CASE HBD.COVRG_CD WHEN '6' THEN '4' ELSE HB.COVRG_CD END WHEN 'C' THEN CASE HBD.COVRG_CD WHEN '5' THEN '4' WHEN '6' THEN 'C' WHEN '7' THEN '4' WHEN '8' THEN '4' ELSE HB.COVRG_CD END WHEN '4' THEN '4' ELSE HB.COVRG_CD END AS COVRG_CD , CASE HB.PLAN_TYPE WHEN '10' THEN ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM PS_FSA_BENEFIT HSA WHERE HSA.PLAN_TYPE = '67' AND HSA.EFFDT = ( SELECT MAX(EFFDT) FROM PS_FSA_BENEFIT H1 WHERE H1.EMPLID = HSA.EMPLID AND H1.EMPL_RCD = HSA.EMPL_RCD AND H1.COBRA_EVENT_ID = HSA.COBRA_EVENT_ID AND H1.PLAN_TYPE = HSA.PLAN_TYPE AND H1.BENEFIT_NBR = HSA.BENEFIT_NBR AND H1.EFFDT <= :EFFDT) AND HSA.COBRA_EVENT_ID = 0 AND HSA.COVERAGE_ELECT = 'E' AND HSA.EMPLID = J.EMPLID AND HSA.EMPL_RCD = J.EMPL_RCD) ELSE 0 END AS HAS_HSA FROM PS_JOB J , PS_BEN_PROG_PARTIC BPP , PS_HEALTH_BENEFIT HB LEFT OUTER JOIN PS_HEALTH_BENEFIT HBD ON HBD.EMPLID = HB.EMPLID AND HBD.EMPL_RCD = HB.EMPL_RCD AND HBD.PLAN_TYPE = ( CASE HB.PLAN_TYPE WHEN '10' THEN '15' WHEN '11' THEN '16' WHEN '14' THEN '17' WHEN '1D' THEN '1E' WHEN '1V' THEN '1U' END ) AND HBD.EFFDT = ( SELECT MAX(EFFDT) FROM PS_HEALTH_BENEFIT H2 WHERE H2.EMPLID = HBD.EMPLID AND H2.EMPL_RCD = HBD.EMPL_RCD AND H2.COBRA_EVENT_ID = HBD.COBRA_EVENT_ID AND H2.PLAN_TYPE = HBD.PLAN_TYPE AND H2.BENEFIT_NBR = HBD.BENEFIT_NBR AND H2.EFFDT <= :EFFDT ) AND HBD.COVERAGE_ELECT = HB.COVERAGE_ELECT WHERE J.COMPANY = :COMPANY_CODE AND J.BEN_STATUS IN ('A','P','U') AND NOT ( J.EMPLID LIKE 'C%' ) AND NOT ( J.EMPL_CLASS = 'U' ) AND J.REG_TEMP = 'R' AND J.FULL_PART_TIME = 'F' AND J.STD_HOURS >= 30 AND J.EFFDT = ( SELECT MAX( EFFDT ) FROM PS_JOB J1 WHERE J1.EMPLID = J.EMPLID AND J1.EMPL_RCD = J.EMPL_RCD AND J1.EFFDT <= :EFFDT ) AND J.EFFSEQ = ( SELECT MAX( EFFSEQ ) FROM PS_JOB J2 WHERE J2.EMPLID = J.EMPLID AND J2.EMPL_RCD = J.EMPL_RCD AND J2.EFFDT = J.EFFDT ) AND HB.EMPLID = J.EMPLID AND HB.EMPL_RCD = J.EMPL_RCD AND HB.COBRA_EVENT_ID = 0 AND HB.EFFDT = ( SELECT MAX( EFFDT ) FROM PS_HEALTH_BENEFIT H1 WHERE H1.EMPLID = HB.EMPLID AND H1.EMPL_RCD = HB.EMPL_RCD AND H1.COBRA_EVENT_ID = HB.COBRA_EVENT_ID AND H1.PLAN_TYPE = HB.PLAN_TYPE AND H1.BENEFIT_NBR = HB.BENEFIT_NBR AND H1.EFFDT <= :EFFDT ) AND HB.COVERAGE_ELECT = 'E' AND HB.PLAN_TYPE IN (:primaryPlanTypes) AND HB.BENEFIT_PLAN <> '0003M3' AND BPP.EMPLID = J.EMPLID AND BPP.EMPL_RCD = J.EMPL_RCD AND BPP.COBRA_EVENT_ID = HB.COBRA_EVENT_ID AND BPP.EFFDT = ( SELECT MAX(EFFDT) FROM PS_BEN_PROG_PARTIC B1 WHERE B1.EMPLID = BPP.EMPLID AND B1.EMPL_RCD = BPP.EMPL_RCD AND B1.COBRA_EVENT_ID = BPP.COBRA_EVENT_ID AND B1.EFFDT <= :EFFDT )
SELECT CASE WHEN EXISTS ( SELECT 'X' FROM PS_T2_CLIENT_OPTN2 WHERE COMPANY = :company AND PF_CLIENT = :pfClient AND EFFDT = :effdt ) THEN 'TRUE' ELSE 'FALSE' END AS NEW_BANDS_EXIST FROM DUAL

WITH EMPLOYEES AS ( SELECT J.COMPANY , J.EMPLID , J.EMPL_RCD , N.FIRST_NAME , N.MIDDLE_NAME , N.LAST_NAME , J.DEPTID , D.DESCR DEPT_DESCR , J.LOCATION , L.DESCR LOC_DESCR , BPP.BENEFIT_PROGRAM, BPP.COBRA_EVENT_ID, PGM.EFFDT AS PROGRAM_EFFDT
FROM PS_JOB J , PS_BEN_PROG_PARTIC BPP , PS_NAMES N , PS_BEN_DEFN_PGM PGM , PS_DEPT_TBL D , PS_LOCATION_TBL L
WHERE J.COMPANY = :companyCode AND J.EFFDT = ( SELECT MAX( J1.EFFDT ) FROM PS_JOB J1 WHERE J1.EMPLID = J.EMPLID AND J1.EMPL_RCD = J.EMPL_RCD AND J1.EFFDT < :effDate ) AND J.EFFSEQ = ( SELECT MAX( EFFSEQ ) FROM PS_JOB J2 WHERE J2.EMPLID = J.EMPLID AND J2.EMPL_RCD = J.EMPL_RCD AND J2.EFFDT = J.EFFDT ) AND J.BEN_STATUS IN ('A','P','U') AND NOT ( J.EMPLID LIKE 'C%' ) AND NOT ( J.EMPL_CLASS = 'U' ) AND J.REG_TEMP = 'R' AND J.FULL_PART_TIME = 'F' AND J.STD_HOURS >= 30
AND BPP.EMPLID = J.EMPLID AND BPP.EMPL_RCD = J.EMPL_RCD AND BPP.COBRA_EVENT_ID = 0 AND BPP.EFFDT = ( SELECT MAX( EFFDT ) FROM PS_BEN_PROG_PARTIC B1 WHERE B1.EMPLID = BPP.EMPLID AND B1.EMPL_RCD = BPP.EMPL_RCD AND B1.COBRA_EVENT_ID = BPP.COBRA_EVENT_ID AND B1.EFFDT < :effDate )
AND N.EMPLID = J.EMPLID AND N.NAME_TYPE = 'PRI' AND N.EFFDT = ( SELECT MAX( N1.EFFDT ) FROM PS_NAMES N1 WHERE N1.EMPLID = N.EMPLID AND N1.NAME_TYPE = N.NAME_TYPE AND N1.EFFDT < :effDate )
AND PGM.BENEFIT_PROGRAM = BPP.BENEFIT_PROGRAM AND PGM.EFFDT = ( SELECT MAX(EFFDT) FROM PS_BEN_DEFN_PGM P1 WHERE P1.BENEFIT_PROGRAM = PGM.BENEFIT_PROGRAM AND P1.EFFDT < :effDate )
AND D.SETID = J.SETID_DEPT AND D.DEPTID = J.DEPTID AND D.EFFDT = ( SELECT MAX( D1.EFFDT ) FROM PS_DEPT_TBL D1 WHERE D1.SETID = D.SETID AND D1.DEPTID = D.DEPTID AND D1.EFFDT < :effDate )
AND L.SETID = J.SETID_LOCATION AND L.LOCATION = J.LOCATION AND L.EFFDT = ( SELECT MAX( L1.EFFDT ) FROM PS_LOCATION_TBL L1 WHERE L1.SETID = L.SETID AND L1.LOCATION = L.LOCATION AND L1.EFFDT < :effDate ) ) SELECT /*+ OPT_PARAM('_optimizer_cost_based_transformation', 'LINEAR') */ E.EMPLID , E.FIRST_NAME , E.MIDDLE_NAME , E.LAST_NAME , E.DEPTID , E.DEPT_DESCR , E.LOCATION , E.LOC_DESCR , E.BENEFIT_PROGRAM , HBM.PLAN_TYPE , HBM.BENEFIT_PLAN , BPT.DESCR PLAN_NAME , CASE HBM.COVRG_CD WHEN '1' THEN CASE HB_DP.COVRG_CD WHEN '5' THEN '2' WHEN '6' THEN 'C' WHEN '7' THEN '4' WHEN '8' THEN '4' ELSE HBM.COVRG_CD END WHEN '2' THEN CASE HB_DP.COVRG_CD WHEN '6' THEN '4' ELSE HBM.COVRG_CD END WHEN 'C' THEN CASE HB_DP.COVRG_CD WHEN '5' THEN '4' WHEN '6' THEN 'C' WHEN '7' THEN '4' WHEN '8' THEN '4' ELSE HBM.COVRG_CD END WHEN '4' THEN '4' ELSE HBM.COVRG_CD END AS COVRG_CD, HBM.COVERAGE_ELECT
FROM EMPLOYEES E, PS_BENEF_PLAN_TBL BPT , PS_BEN_DEFN_OPTN OPT , PS_BEN_DEFN_COST CST , PS_BN_RATE_TBL RT , PS_BN_RATE_DATA RATE , PS_HEALTH_BENEFIT HBM LEFT OUTER JOIN ( SELECT * FROM PS_HEALTH_BENEFIT HBD WHERE HBD.EFFDT = ( SELECT MAX(EFFDT) FROM PS_HEALTH_BENEFIT H2 WHERE H2.EMPLID = HBD.EMPLID AND H2.EMPL_RCD = HBD.EMPL_RCD AND H2.COBRA_EVENT_ID = HBD.COBRA_EVENT_ID AND H2.PLAN_TYPE = HBD.PLAN_TYPE AND H2.BENEFIT_NBR = HBD.BENEFIT_NBR AND H2.EFFDT < :effDate )) HB_DP ON HB_DP.EMPLID = HBM.EMPLID AND HB_DP.EMPL_RCD = HBM.EMPL_RCD AND HB_DP.PLAN_TYPE = ( CASE HBM.PLAN_TYPE WHEN '10' THEN '15' WHEN '11' THEN '16' WHEN '14' THEN '17' WHEN '1D' THEN '1E' WHEN '1V' THEN '1U' END ) AND HB_DP.COVERAGE_ELECT = HBM.COVERAGE_ELECT
WHERE HBM.EMPLID = E.EMPLID AND HBM.EMPL_RCD = E.EMPL_RCD AND HBM.COBRA_EVENT_ID = E.COBRA_EVENT_ID AND HBM.PLAN_TYPE IN (:primaryPlanTypes) AND HBM.BENEFIT_PLAN <> '0003M3' AND HBM.EFFDT = ( SELECT MAX( EFFDT ) FROM PS_HEALTH_BENEFIT H1 WHERE H1.EMPLID = HBM.EMPLID AND H1.EMPL_RCD = HBM.EMPL_RCD AND H1.COBRA_EVENT_ID = HBM.COBRA_EVENT_ID AND H1.PLAN_TYPE = HBM.PLAN_TYPE AND H1.BENEFIT_NBR = HBM.BENEFIT_NBR AND H1.EFFDT < :effDate ) AND HBM.COVERAGE_ELECT = 'E' AND HBM.COVERAGE_END_DT IS NULL
AND BPT.PLAN_TYPE = HBM.PLAN_TYPE AND BPT.BENEFIT_PLAN = HBM.BENEFIT_PLAN AND BPT.EFFDT = ( SELECT MAX(EFFDT) FROM PS_BENEF_PLAN_TBL BP1 WHERE BP1.PLAN_TYPE = BPT.PLAN_TYPE AND BP1.BENEFIT_PLAN = BPT.BENEFIT_PLAN AND BP1.EFFDT < :effDate )
AND OPT.BENEFIT_PROGRAM = E.BENEFIT_PROGRAM AND OPT.EFFDT = E.PROGRAM_EFFDT AND OPT.PLAN_TYPE = HBM.PLAN_TYPE AND OPT.BENEFIT_PLAN = HBM.BENEFIT_PLAN AND OPT.COVRG_CD = ( CASE HBM.COVRG_CD WHEN '1' THEN CASE HB_DP.COVRG_CD WHEN '5' THEN '2' WHEN '6' THEN 'C' WHEN '7' THEN '4' WHEN '8' THEN '4' ELSE HBM.COVRG_CD END WHEN '2' THEN CASE HB_DP.COVRG_CD WHEN '6' THEN '4' ELSE HBM.COVRG_CD END WHEN 'C' THEN CASE HB_DP.COVRG_CD WHEN '5' THEN '4' WHEN '6' THEN 'C' WHEN '7' THEN '4' WHEN '8' THEN '4' ELSE HBM.COVRG_CD END WHEN '4' THEN '4' ELSE HBM.COVRG_CD END)
AND CST.BENEFIT_PROGRAM = OPT.BENEFIT_PROGRAM AND CST.EFFDT = OPT.EFFDT AND CST.PLAN_TYPE = OPT.PLAN_TYPE AND CST.OPTION_ID = OPT.OPTION_ID AND CST.COST_TYPE = 'P'
AND RT.RATE_TBL_ID = CST.RATE_TBL_ID AND RT.EFFDT = ( SELECT MAX(EFFDT) FROM PS_BN_RATE_TBL RT1 WHERE RT1.RATE_TBL_ID = RT.RATE_TBL_ID AND RT1.EFFDT < :effDate )
AND RATE.RATE_TBL_ID = RT.RATE_TBL_ID AND RATE.EFFDT = RT.EFFDT AND ( ( RT.RATE_TYPE = 7 AND RATE.BN_RATE_KEY01 = OPT.BENEFIT_PLAN AND RATE.BN_RATE_KEY02 = OPT.COVRG_CD AND RATE.BN_RATE_KEY03 = ' ' ) OR RT.RATE_TYPE = 2 )
UNION
SELECT E.EMPLID , E.FIRST_NAME , E.MIDDLE_NAME , E.LAST_NAME , E.DEPTID , E.DEPT_DESCR , E.LOCATION , E.LOC_DESCR , E.BENEFIT_PROGRAM , HBM.PLAN_TYPE , NULL BENEFIT_PLAN , NULL PLAN_NAME , NULL COVRG_CD , HBM.COVERAGE_ELECT
FROM EMPLOYEES E , PS_HEALTH_BENEFIT HBM, PS_T2_CLIENTOPTION CLOP, PS_T2_PRCL_BN_EFDT BEF, PS_T2_PRCL_BN_PGM BPD
WHERE E.EMPLID = HBM.EMPLID AND HBM.EMPL_RCD = E.EMPL_RCD AND HBM.PLAN_TYPE IN (:primaryPlanTypes) AND HBM.EFFDT = ( SELECT MAX( EFFDT ) FROM PS_HEALTH_BENEFIT H1 WHERE H1.EMPLID = HBM.EMPLID AND H1.EMPL_RCD = HBM.EMPL_RCD AND H1.COBRA_EVENT_ID = HBM.COBRA_EVENT_ID AND H1.PLAN_TYPE = HBM.PLAN_TYPE AND H1.BENEFIT_NBR = HBM.BENEFIT_NBR AND H1.EFFDT < :effDate) AND HBM.COBRA_EVENT_ID = 0 AND HBM.COVERAGE_ELECT = 'W' AND HBM.COVERAGE_END_DT IS NULL AND CLOP.COMPANY = E.COMPANY AND BEF.T2_PEO_ID = CLOP.T2_PEO_ID AND BEF.COMPANY = CLOP.COMPANY AND BEF.PF_CLIENT = CLOP.PF_CLIENT AND BEF.EFFDT = ( SELECT MAX(EFFDT) FROM PS_T2_PRCL_BN_EFDT E1 WHERE E1.T2_PEO_ID = BEF.T2_PEO_ID AND E1.COMPANY = BEF.COMPANY AND E1.PF_CLIENT = BEF.PF_CLIENT AND E1.EFFDT <= :effDate ) AND BPD.T2_PEO_ID = BEF.T2_PEO_ID AND BPD.COMPANY = BEF.COMPANY AND BPD.PF_CLIENT = BEF.PF_CLIENT AND BPD.EFFDT = BEF.EFFDT AND BPD.BENEFIT_PROGRAM = E.BENEFIT_PROGRAM AND BPD.T2_WAIVE_ALLOWANCE IS NOT NULL
UNION
SELECT
E.EMPLID , E.FIRST_NAME , E.MIDDLE_NAME , E.LAST_NAME , E.DEPTID , E.DEPT_DESCR , E.LOCATION , E.LOC_DESCR , E.BENEFIT_PROGRAM , NULL PLAN_TYPE , NULL BENEFIT_PLAN , NULL PLAN_NAME , NULL COVRG_CD , 'N' COVERAGE_ELECT
FROM EMPLOYEES E
WHERE E.EMPLID NOT IN ( SELECT HBM.EMPLID FROM PS_HEALTH_BENEFIT HBM WHERE E.EMPLID = HBM.EMPLID AND HBM.EMPL_RCD = E.EMPL_RCD AND HBM.PLAN_TYPE IN (:primaryPlanTypes) AND HBM.EFFDT = ( SELECT MAX( EFFDT ) FROM PS_HEALTH_BENEFIT H1 WHERE H1.EMPLID = HBM.EMPLID AND H1.EMPL_RCD = HBM.EMPL_RCD AND H1.COBRA_EVENT_ID = HBM.COBRA_EVENT_ID AND H1.PLAN_TYPE = HBM.PLAN_TYPE AND H1.BENEFIT_NBR = HBM.BENEFIT_NBR AND H1.EFFDT < :effDate ) AND HBM.COBRA_EVENT_ID = 0 AND HBM.COVERAGE_ELECT IN ('E', 'W') AND HBM.COVERAGE_END_DT IS NULL )

WITH TMP_CAL_LOCATION AS ( SELECT DISTINCT T2_BSCA_REGION, DECODE( T2_BSCA_REGION, '2', 'NORCAL', '3', 'SOCAL', 'BADDATA' ) AS CA_REGION, LOCATION_TBL_ID FROM PS_T2_CA_BENPL_MAP WHERE EFFDT = :effdt )
SELECT BENEFIT_PLAN FROM PS_T2_CA_BENPL_MAP WHERE EFFDT = :effdt AND T2_BSCA_REGION NOT IN (
SELECT COALESCE( ( SELECT 2 FROM DUAL WHERE EXISTS ( SELECT GLR.* FROM PS_GEOG_LOCN_TBL GT , PS_GEOG_LOCN_RANGE GLR WHERE GT.LOCATION_TBL_ID = ( SELECT LOCATION_TBL_ID FROM TMP_CAL_LOCATION WHERE T2_BSCA_REGION = '2' ) AND GT.EFFDT = :effdt AND GLR.LOCATION_TBL_ID = GT.LOCATION_TBL_ID AND GLR.EFFDT = GT.EFFDT AND 'A' || :zipCode BETWEEN 'A' || GLR.LOCN_FROM AND 'A' || GLR.LOCN_TO ) ) , ( SELECT 3 FROM DUAL WHERE EXISTS ( SELECT GLR.* FROM PS_GEOG_LOCN_TBL GT , PS_GEOG_LOCN_RANGE GLR WHERE GT.LOCATION_TBL_ID = ( SELECT LOCATION_TBL_ID FROM TMP_CAL_LOCATION WHERE T2_BSCA_REGION = '3' ) AND GT.EFFDT = :effdt AND GLR.LOCATION_TBL_ID = GT.LOCATION_TBL_ID AND GLR.EFFDT = GT.EFFDT AND 'A' || :zipCode BETWEEN 'A' || GLR.LOCN_FROM AND 'A' || GLR.LOCN_TO ) ) , 999 ) AS CAL_REGION FROM DUAL )

SELECT /*+ OPT_PARAM('_optimizer_cost_based_transformation', 'LINEAR') */ BPP.BENEFIT_PROGRAM, COUNT(DISTINCT HB.EMPLID) ENROLLED_COUNT FROM PS_JOB J , PS_BEN_PROG_PARTIC BPP , PS_HEALTH_BENEFIT HB WHERE J.COMPANY = :COMPANY_CODE AND J.BEN_STATUS IN ('A','P','U') AND NOT ( J.EMPLID LIKE 'C%' ) AND NOT ( J.EMPL_CLASS = 'U' ) AND J.REG_TEMP = 'R' AND J.FULL_PART_TIME = 'F' AND J.STD_HOURS >= 30 AND J.EFFDT = ( SELECT MAX( EFFDT ) FROM PS_JOB J1 WHERE J1.EMPLID = J.EMPLID AND J1.EMPL_RCD = J.EMPL_RCD AND J1.EFFDT <= :EFFDT ) AND J.EFFSEQ = ( SELECT MAX( EFFSEQ ) FROM PS_JOB J2 WHERE J2.EMPLID = J.EMPLID AND J2.EMPL_RCD = J.EMPL_RCD AND J2.EFFDT = J.EFFDT ) AND HB.EMPLID = J.EMPLID AND HB.EMPL_RCD = J.EMPL_RCD AND HB.COBRA_EVENT_ID = 0 AND HB.EFFDT = ( SELECT MAX( EFFDT ) FROM PS_HEALTH_BENEFIT H1 WHERE H1.EMPLID = HB.EMPLID AND H1.EMPL_RCD = HB.EMPL_RCD AND H1.COBRA_EVENT_ID = HB.COBRA_EVENT_ID AND H1.PLAN_TYPE = HB.PLAN_TYPE AND H1.BENEFIT_NBR = HB.BENEFIT_NBR AND H1.EFFDT <= :EFFDT ) AND HB.COVERAGE_ELECT = 'E' AND HB.PLAN_TYPE IN (:primaryPlanTypes) AND HB.BENEFIT_PLAN <> '0003M3' AND BPP.EMPLID = J.EMPLID AND BPP.EMPL_RCD = J.EMPL_RCD AND BPP.COBRA_EVENT_ID = HB.COBRA_EVENT_ID AND BPP.EFFDT = ( SELECT MAX(EFFDT) FROM PS_BEN_PROG_PARTIC B1 WHERE B1.EMPLID = BPP.EMPLID AND B1.EMPL_RCD = BPP.EMPL_RCD AND B1.COBRA_EVENT_ID = BPP.COBRA_EVENT_ID AND B1.EFFDT <= :EFFDT ) GROUP BY BPP.BENEFIT_PROGRAM

SELECT /*+ OPT_PARAM('_optimizer_cost_based_transformation', 'LINEAR') */ E.FUTURE_BENEFIT_PROGRAM, COUNT(DISTINCT HB.EMPLID) ENROLLED_COUNT FROM PS_JOB J , XBSS_EMPL_STRATEGY_GROUP_VW@HPDB_HRDB E , PS_HEALTH_BENEFIT HB WHERE J.COMPANY = :COMPANY_CODE AND J.BEN_STATUS IN ('A','P','U') AND NOT ( J.EMPLID LIKE 'C%' ) AND NOT ( J.EMPL_CLASS = 'U' ) AND J.REG_TEMP = 'R' AND J.FULL_PART_TIME = 'F' AND J.STD_HOURS >= 30 AND J.EFFDT = ( SELECT MAX( EFFDT ) FROM PS_JOB J1 WHERE J1.EMPLID = J.EMPLID AND J1.EMPL_RCD = J.EMPL_RCD AND J1.EFFDT <= :EFFDT ) AND J.EFFSEQ = ( SELECT MAX( EFFSEQ ) FROM PS_JOB J2 WHERE J2.EMPLID = J.EMPLID AND J2.EMPL_RCD = J.EMPL_RCD AND J2.EFFDT = J.EFFDT ) AND HB.EMPLID = J.EMPLID AND HB.EMPL_RCD = J.EMPL_RCD AND HB.COBRA_EVENT_ID = 0 AND HB.EFFDT = ( SELECT MAX( EFFDT ) FROM PS_HEALTH_BENEFIT H1 WHERE H1.EMPLID = HB.EMPLID AND H1.EMPL_RCD = HB.EMPL_RCD AND H1.COBRA_EVENT_ID = HB.COBRA_EVENT_ID AND H1.PLAN_TYPE = HB.PLAN_TYPE AND H1.BENEFIT_NBR = HB.BENEFIT_NBR AND H1.EFFDT <= :EFFDT ) AND HB.COVERAGE_ELECT = 'E' AND HB.PLAN_TYPE IN (:primaryPlanTypes) AND HB.BENEFIT_PLAN <> '0003M3' AND E.STRATEGY_ID = :strategyId AND E.EMPLID = J.EMPLID AND E.EMPL_RCD = J.EMPL_RCD AND E.REALM_YEAR_ID = :realmYearId GROUP BY E.FUTURE_BENEFIT_PROGRAM

SELECT CASE WHEN A.COVRG_CD = '1' THEN 'HSA_ANNUAL_EMPLOYEE_MAXIMUM' WHEN A.COVRG_CD = '4' THEN 'HSA_ANNUAL_FAMILY_MAXIMUM' END, A.T2_HSA_ER_FRT_MAX FROM PS_T2_HSA_FUND_LMT A WHERE ( A.EFFDT = (SELECT MAX(A_ED.EFFDT) FROM PS_T2_HSA_FUND_LMT A_ED WHERE A.COVRG_CD = A_ED.COVRG_CD AND A_ED.EFFDT <= :effDate ))

SELECT SAP.BENEFIT_PLAN FROM PS_T2_SVC_AREA_TBL SAT , PS_T2_SVC_AREA_LOC SAL , PS_T2_SVC_AREA_PLN SAP , PS_GEOG_LOCN_TBL LTB WHERE SAT.T2_OE_QUARTER = :oeQuarter AND SAT.T2_EXCL_MED_PLAN IN (:medPlanGroups) AND SAT.EFFDT = ( SELECT MAX(EFFDT) FROM PS_T2_SVC_AREA_TBL S1 WHERE S1.T2_OE_QUARTER = SAT.T2_OE_QUARTER AND S1.T2_EXCL_MED_PLAN = SAT.T2_EXCL_MED_PLAN AND S1.EFFDT <= :effDate ) AND SAL.T2_OE_QUARTER = SAT.T2_OE_QUARTER AND SAL.T2_EXCL_MED_PLAN = SAT.T2_EXCL_MED_PLAN AND SAL.EFFDT = SAT.EFFDT AND SAP.T2_OE_QUARTER = SAL.T2_OE_QUARTER AND SAP.T2_EXCL_MED_PLAN = SAL.T2_EXCL_MED_PLAN AND SAP.EFFDT = SAL.EFFDT AND SAP.LOCATION_TBL_ID = SAL.LOCATION_TBL_ID AND LTB.LOCATION_TBL_ID = SAP.LOCATION_TBL_ID AND LTB.EFFDT = ( SELECT MAX(EFFDT) FROM PS_GEOG_LOCN_TBL L1 WHERE L1.LOCATION_TBL_ID = LTB.LOCATION_TBL_ID AND L1.EFFDT <= :effDate ) AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 'X' FROM PS_GEOG_LOCN_RANGE LRG WHERE LRG.LOCATION_TBL_ID = LTB.LOCATION_TBL_ID AND LRG.EFFDT = LTB.EFFDT AND TO_CHAR( :zipCode ) BETWEEN LRG.LOCN_FROM AND LRG.LOCN_TO )

SELECT EXT.BENEFIT_PROGRAM, INC.PLAN_TYPE FROM PS_EXC_CR_CALC_TBL EXT , PS_EXC_CR_CALC_INC INC WHERE EXT.BENEFIT_PROGRAM =:benefitProgram AND EXT.EFFDT = ( SELECT MAX(EFFDT) FROM PS_EXC_CR_CALC_TBL E1 WHERE E1.BENEFIT_PROGRAM = EXT.BENEFIT_PROGRAM AND E1.EFFDT <= :effDate ) AND EXT.EFF_STATUS = 'A' AND INC.BENEFIT_PROGRAM = EXT.BENEFIT_PROGRAM AND INC.EFFDT = EXT.EFFDT
DELETE FROM PS_EXC_CR_CALC_TBL WHERE BENEFIT_PROGRAM = :benefitProgram AND EFFDT = :effDt
DELETE FROM PS_EXC_CR_CALC_INC WHERE BENEFIT_PROGRAM = :benefitProgram AND EFFDT = :effDt
INSERT INTO PS_EXC_CR_CALC_TBL ( BENEFIT_PROGRAM, EFFDT, EFF_STATUS ) VALUES ( :benefitProgram, :effDt, 'A' )

INSERT INTO PS_EXC_CR_CALC_INC ( BENEFIT_PROGRAM, EFFDT, PLAN_TYPE, DED_CLASS ) VALUES ( :benefitProgram , :effDt , :planType , CASE TO_CHAR( :planType ) WHEN '10' THEN 'B' WHEN '11' THEN 'B' WHEN '14' THEN 'B' WHEN '15' THEN 'A' WHEN '16' THEN 'A' WHEN '17' THEN 'A' WHEN '1D' THEN 'B' WHEN '1E' THEN 'A' WHEN '1U' THEN 'A' WHEN '1V' THEN 'B' WHEN '21' THEN 'A' WHEN '25' THEN 'A' WHEN '27' THEN 'A' WHEN '2Y' THEN 'A' WHEN '30' THEN 'A' WHEN '31' THEN 'A' ELSE 'A' END )

SELECT CO.COMPANY, CO.DESCR AS ORG_DESC FROM PS_COMPANY_TBL CO WHERE CO.COMPANY IN ( SELECT B.COMPANY FROM PS_T2_CLIENTOPTION B WHERE CO.COMPANY = B.COMPANY AND NOT B.T2_PRODUCT_LINE IN ( 'NOHW' ) ) AND CO.EFFDT = ( SELECT MAX( C1.EFFDT ) FROM PS_COMPANY_TBL C1 WHERE C1.COMPANY = CO.COMPANY AND C1.EFFDT <= sysdate ) AND UPPER( CO.COMPANY ) IN ( :companyCodes )

SELECT DISTINCT BPD.T2_DEF_BEN_PROG, CASE WHEN O.T2_ER_HSA_LVL IN ('1', '2', '3') THEN '5' WHEN O.T2_ER_HSA_LVL = '4' THEN '0' WHEN (O.T2_ER_HSA_FRT_EE = 0 AND O.T2_ER_HSA_FRT_FAM = 0 AND O.T2_ER_HSA_MON_EE = 0 AND O.T2_ER_HSA_MON_FAM = 0) THEN '0' ELSE O.T2_ER_HSA_LVL END AS T2_ER_HSA_LVL, O.T2_HSA_FRNT_FRQ, O.T2_ER_HSA_FRT_EE, O.T2_ER_HSA_FRT_FAM, O.T2_HSA_FRT_PAYOUT, O.T2_HSA_FRTMNTH_Q1, O.T2_HSA_FRTMNTH_Q2, O.T2_HSA_FRTMNTH_Q3, O.T2_HSA_FRTMNTH_Q4, CASE WHEN O.T2_ER_HSA_LVL IN (1,2) THEN ( SELECT TRUNC(HSA_AMT/12, 2) FROM BD_HSA_STD_LEVELS@HPDB_HRDB WHERE :effDate BETWEEN EFFDT AND ENDDT AND HSA_LEVEL = O.T2_ER_HSA_LVL AND HSA_COVRG_CD = '1') WHEN O.T2_ER_HSA_LVL = 3 THEN ( SELECT A.T2_HSA_ER_MON_MAX FROM PS_T2_HSA_FUND_LMT A WHERE A.EFFDT = ( SELECT MAX(A_ED.EFFDT) FROM PS_T2_HSA_FUND_LMT A_ED WHERE A.COVRG_CD = A_ED.COVRG_CD AND A_ED.EFFDT <= O.EFFDT) AND A.COVRG_CD = '1') ELSE O.T2_ER_HSA_MON_EE END AS T2_ER_HSA_MON_EE, CASE WHEN O.T2_ER_HSA_LVL IN (1,2) THEN ( SELECT TRUNC(HSA_AMT/12, 2) FROM BD_HSA_STD_LEVELS@HPDB_HRDB WHERE :effDate BETWEEN EFFDT AND ENDDT AND HSA_LEVEL = O.T2_ER_HSA_LVL AND HSA_COVRG_CD = 'M') WHEN O.T2_ER_HSA_LVL = 3 THEN ( SELECT A.T2_HSA_ER_MON_MAX FROM PS_T2_HSA_FUND_LMT A WHERE A.EFFDT = ( SELECT MAX(A_ED.EFFDT) FROM PS_T2_HSA_FUND_LMT A_ED WHERE A.COVRG_CD = A_ED.COVRG_CD AND A_ED.EFFDT <= O.EFFDT) AND A.COVRG_CD = '4') ELSE O.T2_ER_HSA_MON_FAM END AS T2_ER_HSA_MON_FAM, CASE WHEN O.T2_ER_HSA_LVL IN (1,2, 3) THEN 'M' ELSE O.T2_HSA_CNTB_FRQ END AS T2_HSA_CNTB_FRQ FROM PS_T2_CLIENT_OPTN2 O, PS_BEN_DEFN_PGM BP, PS_T2_CLIENT_OPT2A BPD WHERE O.COMPANY = :company AND BP.PF_CLIENT = O.PF_CLIENT AND BP.BENEFIT_PROGRAM = O.BENEFIT_PROGRAM AND BP.BENEFIT_PROGRAM = BPD.BENEFIT_PROGRAM AND BP.PF_CLIENT = BPD.PF_CLIENT AND BP.EFF_STATUS = 'A' AND O.EFF_STATUS = 'A' AND BP.EFFDT = ( SELECT MAX(BP2.EFFDT) FROM PS_BEN_DEFN_PGM BP2 WHERE BP.PF_CLIENT = BP2.PF_CLIENT AND BP.BENEFIT_PROGRAM = BP2.BENEFIT_PROGRAM AND BP2.EFFDT <= :effDate ) AND BPD.EFFDT = ( SELECT MAX(BP2.EFFDT) FROM PS_T2_CLIENT_OPT2A BP2 WHERE BP.PF_CLIENT = BP2.PF_CLIENT AND BP.BENEFIT_PROGRAM = BP2.BENEFIT_PROGRAM AND BP2.EFFDT <= :effDate ) AND O.EFFDT = ( SELECT MAX(O2.EFFDT) FROM PS_T2_CLIENT_OPTN2 O2 WHERE O.COMPANY = O2.COMPANY AND O.BENEFIT_PROGRAM = O2.BENEFIT_PROGRAM AND O2.EFFDT <= :effDate ) ORDER BY BPD.T2_DEF_BEN_PROG DESC

SELECT HSA.BENEFIT_PROGRAM , TO_CHAR( HSA.EFFDT, 'YYYY-MM-DD' ) AS EFFDT , HSA.PLAN_TYPE , HSA.OPTION_ID , HSA.DISPLAY_OPT_SEQ , HSA.OPTION_TYPE , HSA.BENEFIT_PLAN , HSA.COVRG_CD , HSA.OPTION_CD , HSA.OPTION_LVL , HSA.DEDCD , HSA.DFLT_OPTION_IND , HSA.ELIG_RULES_ID , HSA.LOCATION_TBL_ID , HSA.CROSS_PLAN_TYPE , HSA.CROSS_BENEF_PLAN , HSA.COVERAGE_LIMIT_PCT , HSA.CROSS_PLN_DPND_CHK , ( SELECT BP.PF_CLIENT FROM PS_BENEF_PLAN_TBL BP WHERE BP.PLAN_TYPE = HSA.PLAN_TYPE AND BP.BENEFIT_PLAN = HSA.BENEFIT_PLAN AND BP.EFFDT = ( SELECT MAX(EFFDT) FROM PS_BENEF_PLAN_TBL B1 WHERE B1.PLAN_TYPE = BP.PLAN_TYPE AND B1.BENEFIT_PLAN = BP.BENEFIT_PLAN AND B1.EFFDT <= HSA.EFFDT ) ) AS HSA_PF_CLIENT FROM PS_BEN_DEFN_PGM HSAPG , PS_BEN_DEFN_OPTN HSA WHERE HSAPG.BENEFIT_PROGRAM = :benefitProgram AND HSAPG.EFFDT = ( SELECT MAX(EFFDT) FROM PS_BEN_DEFN_PGM HP1 WHERE HP1.BENEFIT_PROGRAM = HSAPG.BENEFIT_PROGRAM AND HP1.EFFDT <= :effdt ) AND HSA.BENEFIT_PROGRAM = HSAPG.BENEFIT_PROGRAM AND HSA.EFFDT = HSAPG.EFFDT AND HSA.PLAN_TYPE = '67' AND HSA.OPTION_TYPE = 'O' ORDER BY HSA.OPTION_CD

SELECT MED.BENEFIT_PLAN, MED.ELIG_RULES_ID FROM PS_BEN_DEFN_PGM MEDPG , PS_BEN_DEFN_OPTN MED WHERE MEDPG.BENEFIT_PROGRAM = :benefitProgram AND MEDPG.EFFDT = ( SELECT MAX(EFFDT) FROM PS_BEN_DEFN_PGM MD1 WHERE MD1.BENEFIT_PROGRAM = MEDPG.BENEFIT_PROGRAM AND MD1.EFFDT <= :effdt ) AND MED.BENEFIT_PROGRAM = MEDPG.BENEFIT_PROGRAM AND MED.EFFDT = MEDPG.EFFDT AND MED.BENEFIT_PLAN != '0003M3' AND MED.COVRG_CD = '1' AND MED.PLAN_TYPE = '10' AND MED.OPTION_TYPE = 'O' AND MED.ELIG_RULES_ID NOT IN ('2009','23GC','236Q')

MERGE INTO PS_BENEF_PLAN_TBL TGT USING ( SELECT CLN.PLAN_TYPE AS CLN_PLAN_TYPE , CLN.BENEFIT_PLAN AS CLN_BENEFIT_PLAN , CLN.EFFDT AS CLN_EFFDT , CLN.DESCR AS CLN_DESCR , CLN.DESCRSHORT AS CLN_DESCRSHORT , CLN.SETID AS CLN_SETID , CLN.VENDOR_ID AS CLN_VENDOR_ID , CLN.GROUP_NBR AS CLN_GROUP_NBR , CLN.DEDCD AS CLN_DEDCD , CLN.INCLUDE_IN_NDT AS CLN_INCLUDE_IN_NDT , CLN.INCLUDE_IN_PAGELET AS CLN_INCLUDE_IN_PAGELET , CLN.MIN_BENEFIC_ALLOC AS CLN_MIN_BENEFIC_ALLOC , CLN.PAY_MODE AS CLN_PAY_MODE , CLN.AP_PAYMENT_DT_TYPE AS CLN_AP_PAYMENT_DT_TYPE , CLN.SEPARATE_AP_PAYMNT AS CLN_SEPARATE_AP_PAYMNT , CLN.SMRYPLNDOC_URL_ID AS CLN_SMRYPLNDOC_URL_ID , CLN.PF_CLIENT AS CLN_PF_CLIENT , CLN.T2_VENDOR AS CLN_T2_VENDOR , CLN.BN_834_PLN_CVG_DSC AS CLN_BN_834_PLN_CVG_DSC , CLN.BN_834_FIELD_MAPPD AS CLN_BN_834_FIELD_MAPPD , CLN.DESCRLONG AS CLN_DESCRLONG , UNQ.PLAN_TYPE AS UNQ_PLAN_TYPE , UNQ.BENEFIT_PLAN AS UNQ_BENEFIT_PLAN , UNQ.EFFDT AS UNQ_EFFDT , UNQ.DESCR AS UNQ_DESCR , UNQ.DESCRSHORT AS UNQ_DESCRSHORT , UNQ.SETID AS UNQ_SETID , UNQ.VENDOR_ID AS UNQ_VENDOR_ID , UNQ.GROUP_NBR AS UNQ_GROUP_NBR , UNQ.DEDCD AS UNQ_DEDCD , UNQ.INCLUDE_IN_NDT AS UNQ_INCLUDE_IN_NDT , UNQ.INCLUDE_IN_PAGELET AS UNQ_INCLUDE_IN_PAGELET , UNQ.MIN_BENEFIC_ALLOC AS UNQ_MIN_BENEFIC_ALLOC , UNQ.PAY_MODE AS UNQ_PAY_MODE , UNQ.AP_PAYMENT_DT_TYPE AS UNQ_AP_PAYMENT_DT_TYPE , UNQ.SEPARATE_AP_PAYMNT AS UNQ_SEPARATE_AP_PAYMNT , UNQ.SMRYPLNDOC_URL_ID AS UNQ_SMRYPLNDOC_URL_ID , UNQ.PF_CLIENT AS UNQ_PF_CLIENT , UNQ.T2_VENDOR AS UNQ_T2_VENDOR , UNQ.BN_834_PLN_CVG_DSC AS UNQ_BN_834_PLN_CVG_DSC , UNQ.BN_834_FIELD_MAPPD AS UNQ_BN_834_FIELD_MAPPD , UNQ.DESCRLONG AS UNQ_DESCRLONG FROM PS_BENEF_PLAN_TBL CLN LEFT OUTER JOIN PS_BENEF_PLAN_TBL UNQ ON UNQ.PLAN_TYPE = CLN.PLAN_TYPE AND UNQ.BENEFIT_PLAN = :newPlan WHERE CLN.PLAN_TYPE = '67' AND CLN.BENEFIT_PLAN = :clonePlan AND CLN.EFFDT = ( SELECT MAX(EFFDT) FROM PS_BENEF_PLAN_TBL B1 WHERE B1.PLAN_TYPE = CLN.PLAN_TYPE AND B1.BENEFIT_PLAN = CLN.BENEFIT_PLAN AND B1.EFFDT <= :effdt ) AND ( UNQ.EFFDT IS NULL OR UNQ.EFFDT = ( SELECT MAX(EFFDT) FROM PS_BENEF_PLAN_TBL U1 WHERE U1.PLAN_TYPE = UNQ.PLAN_TYPE AND U1.BENEFIT_PLAN = UNQ.BENEFIT_PLAN AND U1.EFFDT <= :effdt ) ) AND ( ( UNQ.DESCR IS NULL OR CLN.DESCR != UNQ.DESCR ) OR ( UNQ.DESCRSHORT IS NULL OR CLN.DESCRSHORT != UNQ.DESCRSHORT ) OR ( UNQ.SETID IS NULL OR CLN.SETID != UNQ.SETID ) OR ( UNQ.VENDOR_ID IS NULL OR CLN.VENDOR_ID != UNQ.VENDOR_ID ) OR ( UNQ.GROUP_NBR IS NULL OR CLN.GROUP_NBR != UNQ.GROUP_NBR ) OR ( UNQ.DEDCD IS NULL OR CLN.DEDCD != UNQ.DEDCD ) OR ( UNQ.INCLUDE_IN_NDT IS NULL OR CLN.INCLUDE_IN_NDT != UNQ.INCLUDE_IN_NDT ) OR ( UNQ.INCLUDE_IN_PAGELET IS NULL OR CLN.INCLUDE_IN_PAGELET != UNQ.INCLUDE_IN_PAGELET ) OR ( UNQ.MIN_BENEFIC_ALLOC IS NULL OR CLN.MIN_BENEFIC_ALLOC != UNQ.MIN_BENEFIC_ALLOC ) OR ( UNQ.PAY_MODE IS NULL OR CLN.PAY_MODE != UNQ.PAY_MODE ) OR ( UNQ.AP_PAYMENT_DT_TYPE IS NULL OR CLN.AP_PAYMENT_DT_TYPE != UNQ.AP_PAYMENT_DT_TYPE ) OR ( UNQ.SEPARATE_AP_PAYMNT IS NULL OR CLN.SEPARATE_AP_PAYMNT != UNQ.SEPARATE_AP_PAYMNT ) OR ( UNQ.SMRYPLNDOC_URL_ID IS NULL OR CLN.SMRYPLNDOC_URL_ID != UNQ.SMRYPLNDOC_URL_ID ) OR ( UNQ.T2_VENDOR IS NULL OR CLN.T2_VENDOR != UNQ.T2_VENDOR ) OR ( UNQ.BN_834_PLN_CVG_DSC IS NULL OR CLN.BN_834_PLN_CVG_DSC != UNQ.BN_834_PLN_CVG_DSC ) OR ( UNQ.BN_834_FIELD_MAPPD IS NULL OR CLN.BN_834_FIELD_MAPPD != UNQ.BN_834_FIELD_MAPPD ) ) ) SRC
ON ( TGT.PLAN_TYPE = SRC.CLN_PLAN_TYPE AND TGT.BENEFIT_PLAN = :newPlan AND TGT.EFFDT = :effdt )
WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT ( TGT.PLAN_TYPE, TGT.BENEFIT_PLAN, TGT.EFFDT, TGT.DESCR, TGT.DESCRSHORT, TGT.SETID , TGT.VENDOR_ID, TGT.GROUP_NBR, TGT.DEDCD, TGT.INCLUDE_IN_NDT, TGT.INCLUDE_IN_PAGELET , TGT.MIN_BENEFIC_ALLOC, TGT.PAY_MODE, TGT.AP_PAYMENT_DT_TYPE, TGT.SEPARATE_AP_PAYMNT , TGT.SMRYPLNDOC_URL_ID, TGT.PF_CLIENT, TGT.T2_VENDOR, TGT.BN_834_PLN_CVG_DSC , TGT.BN_834_FIELD_MAPPD, TGT.DESCRLONG ) VALUES ( SRC.CLN_PLAN_TYPE, :newPlan, :effdt, SRC.CLN_DESCR , SRC.CLN_DESCRSHORT, SRC.CLN_SETID, SRC.CLN_VENDOR_ID, SRC.CLN_GROUP_NBR, SRC.CLN_DEDCD , SRC.CLN_INCLUDE_IN_NDT, SRC.CLN_INCLUDE_IN_PAGELET, SRC.CLN_MIN_BENEFIC_ALLOC, SRC.CLN_PAY_MODE , SRC.CLN_AP_PAYMENT_DT_TYPE, SRC.CLN_SEPARATE_AP_PAYMNT, SRC.CLN_SMRYPLNDOC_URL_ID, :pfClient , SRC.CLN_T2_VENDOR, SRC.CLN_BN_834_PLN_CVG_DSC, SRC.CLN_BN_834_FIELD_MAPPD, SRC.CLN_DESCRLONG )
WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET TGT.DESCR = SRC.CLN_DESCR , TGT.DESCRSHORT = SRC.CLN_DESCRSHORT , TGT.SETID = SRC.CLN_SETID , TGT.VENDOR_ID = SRC.CLN_VENDOR_ID , TGT.GROUP_NBR = SRC.CLN_GROUP_NBR , TGT.DEDCD = SRC.CLN_DEDCD , TGT.INCLUDE_IN_NDT = SRC.CLN_INCLUDE_IN_NDT , TGT.INCLUDE_IN_PAGELET = SRC.CLN_INCLUDE_IN_PAGELET , TGT.MIN_BENEFIC_ALLOC = SRC.CLN_MIN_BENEFIC_ALLOC , TGT.PAY_MODE = SRC.CLN_PAY_MODE , TGT.AP_PAYMENT_DT_TYPE = SRC.CLN_AP_PAYMENT_DT_TYPE , TGT.SEPARATE_AP_PAYMNT = SRC.CLN_SEPARATE_AP_PAYMNT , TGT.SMRYPLNDOC_URL_ID = SRC.CLN_SMRYPLNDOC_URL_ID , TGT.PF_CLIENT = :pfClient , TGT.T2_VENDOR = SRC.CLN_T2_VENDOR , TGT.BN_834_PLN_CVG_DSC = SRC.CLN_BN_834_PLN_CVG_DSC , TGT.BN_834_FIELD_MAPPD = SRC.CLN_BN_834_FIELD_MAPPD , TGT.DESCRLONG = SRC.CLN_DESCRLONG

MERGE INTO PS_FSA_BENEF_TBL TGT USING ( SELECT CLN.PLAN_TYPE AS CLN_PLAN_TYPE , CLN.BENEFIT_PLAN AS CLN_BENEFIT_PLAN , CLN.EFFDT AS CLN_EFFDT , CLN.SRVC_DT_FROM AS CLN_SRVC_DT_FROM , CLN.SRVC_DT_THRU AS CLN_SRVC_DT_THRU , CLN.PLAN_YEAR AS CLN_PLAN_YEAR , CLN.FSA_CLOSE AS CLN_FSA_CLOSE , CLN.PAY_FREQUENCY AS CLN_PAY_FREQUENCY , CLN.EMPLR_CONTRBUTN AS CLN_EMPLR_CONTRBUTN , CLN.FLAT_CONTRB_AMT AS CLN_FLAT_CONTRB_AMT , CLN.PCT_EMPL_CONTRBUTN AS CLN_PCT_EMPL_CONTRBUTN , CLN.EMPLR_CONTRB_AMT AS CLN_EMPLR_CONTRB_AMT , CLN.EMPLR_CONTRB_PCT AS CLN_EMPLR_CONTRB_PCT , CLN.FUTURE_BORROWING AS CLN_FUTURE_BORROWING , CLN.CARRYFORWARD_ER AS CLN_CARRYFORWARD_ER , CLN.SETID AS CLN_SETID , CLN.BALANCE_ID AS CLN_BALANCE_ID , CLN.PLAN_CONTRIBUTION AS CLN_PLAN_CONTRIBUTION , CLN.BN_SPEND_ACCT_TYPE AS CLN_BN_SPEND_ACCT_TYPE , CLN.FSA_MIN_CHECK_AMT AS CLN_FSA_MIN_CHECK_AMT , CLN.CURRENCY_CD AS CLN_CURRENCY_CD , CLN.IGNORE_MIN_CHK_AMT AS CLN_IGNORE_MIN_CHK_AMT , CLN.MIN_ANNUAL_CONTRIB AS CLN_MIN_ANNUAL_CONTRIB , CLN.MAX_ANNUAL_CONTRIB AS CLN_MAX_ANNUAL_CONTRIB , CLN.BN_HSA_CATCHUP_AMT AS CLN_BN_HSA_CATCHUP_AMT , CLN.BN_HSA_CATCHUP_AGE AS CLN_BN_HSA_CATCHUP_AGE , CLN.FSA_CARRYOVER_LMT AS CLN_FSA_CARRYOVER_LMT FROM PS_FSA_BENEF_TBL CLN WHERE CLN.PLAN_TYPE = '67' AND CLN.BENEFIT_PLAN = :clonePlan AND CLN.EFFDT = ( SELECT MAX(EFFDT) FROM PS_FSA_BENEF_TBL F1 WHERE F1.PLAN_TYPE = CLN.PLAN_TYPE AND F1.BENEFIT_PLAN = CLN.BENEFIT_PLAN AND F1.EFFDT <= :effdt ) ) SRC
ON ( TGT.PLAN_TYPE = SRC.CLN_PLAN_TYPE AND TGT.BENEFIT_PLAN = :newPlan AND TGT.EFFDT = :effdt )
WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT ( TGT.PLAN_TYPE, TGT.BENEFIT_PLAN, TGT.EFFDT, TGT.SRVC_DT_FROM, TGT.SRVC_DT_THRU , TGT.PLAN_YEAR, TGT.FSA_CLOSE, TGT.PAY_FREQUENCY, TGT.EMPLR_CONTRBUTN, TGT.FLAT_CONTRB_AMT , TGT.PCT_EMPL_CONTRBUTN, TGT.EMPLR_CONTRB_AMT, TGT.EMPLR_CONTRB_PCT, TGT.FUTURE_BORROWING , TGT.CARRYFORWARD_ER, TGT.SETID, TGT.BALANCE_ID, TGT.PLAN_CONTRIBUTION , TGT.BN_SPEND_ACCT_TYPE, TGT.FSA_MIN_CHECK_AMT, TGT.CURRENCY_CD, TGT.IGNORE_MIN_CHK_AMT , TGT.MIN_ANNUAL_CONTRIB, TGT.MAX_ANNUAL_CONTRIB, TGT.BN_HSA_CATCHUP_AMT , TGT.BN_HSA_CATCHUP_AGE, TGT.FSA_CARRYOVER_LMT ) VALUES ( SRC.CLN_PLAN_TYPE, :newPlan, :effdt, SRC.CLN_SRVC_DT_FROM, SRC.CLN_SRVC_DT_THRU , SRC.CLN_PLAN_YEAR, SRC.CLN_FSA_CLOSE, SRC.CLN_PAY_FREQUENCY, '1', SRC.CLN_FLAT_CONTRB_AMT , SRC.CLN_PCT_EMPL_CONTRBUTN, SRC.CLN_EMPLR_CONTRB_AMT, SRC.CLN_EMPLR_CONTRB_PCT, SRC.CLN_FUTURE_BORROWING , SRC.CLN_CARRYFORWARD_ER, SRC.CLN_SETID, SRC.CLN_BALANCE_ID, SRC.CLN_PLAN_CONTRIBUTION , SRC.CLN_BN_SPEND_ACCT_TYPE, SRC.CLN_FSA_MIN_CHECK_AMT, SRC.CLN_CURRENCY_CD, SRC.CLN_IGNORE_MIN_CHK_AMT , 0, SRC.CLN_MAX_ANNUAL_CONTRIB, SRC.CLN_BN_HSA_CATCHUP_AMT , SRC.CLN_BN_HSA_CATCHUP_AGE, SRC.CLN_FSA_CARRYOVER_LMT )
WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET TGT.SRVC_DT_FROM = :effdt , TGT.SRVC_DT_THRU = SRC.CLN_SRVC_DT_THRU , TGT.PLAN_YEAR = SRC.CLN_PLAN_YEAR , TGT.FSA_CLOSE = SRC.CLN_FSA_CLOSE , TGT.PAY_FREQUENCY = SRC.CLN_PAY_FREQUENCY , TGT.EMPLR_CONTRBUTN = '1' , TGT.FLAT_CONTRB_AMT = SRC.CLN_FLAT_CONTRB_AMT , TGT.PCT_EMPL_CONTRBUTN = SRC.CLN_PCT_EMPL_CONTRBUTN , TGT.EMPLR_CONTRB_AMT = SRC.CLN_EMPLR_CONTRB_AMT , TGT.EMPLR_CONTRB_PCT = SRC.CLN_EMPLR_CONTRB_PCT , TGT.FUTURE_BORROWING = SRC.CLN_FUTURE_BORROWING , TGT.CARRYFORWARD_ER = SRC.CLN_CARRYFORWARD_ER , TGT.SETID = SRC.CLN_SETID , TGT.BALANCE_ID = SRC.CLN_BALANCE_ID , TGT.PLAN_CONTRIBUTION = SRC.CLN_PLAN_CONTRIBUTION , TGT.BN_SPEND_ACCT_TYPE = SRC.CLN_BN_SPEND_ACCT_TYPE , TGT.FSA_MIN_CHECK_AMT = SRC.CLN_FSA_MIN_CHECK_AMT , TGT.CURRENCY_CD = SRC.CLN_CURRENCY_CD , TGT.IGNORE_MIN_CHK_AMT = SRC.CLN_IGNORE_MIN_CHK_AMT , TGT.MIN_ANNUAL_CONTRIB = 0 , TGT.MAX_ANNUAL_CONTRIB = SRC.CLN_MAX_ANNUAL_CONTRIB , TGT.BN_HSA_CATCHUP_AMT = SRC.CLN_BN_HSA_CATCHUP_AMT , TGT.BN_HSA_CATCHUP_AGE = SRC.CLN_BN_HSA_CATCHUP_AGE , TGT.FSA_CARRYOVER_LMT = SRC.CLN_FSA_CARRYOVER_LMT
DELETE FROM PS_HSA_CONTRIB_LMT WHERE PLAN_TYPE = '67' AND BENEFIT_PLAN = :newPlan AND EFFDT = :effdt

INSERT INTO PS_HSA_CONTRIB_LMT ( PLAN_TYPE , BENEFIT_PLAN , EFFDT , CNTRL_PLAN_TYPE , CNTRL_BENEFIT_PLAN , COVRG_CD , MAX_ANNUAL_CONTRIB , FLAT_CONTRB_AMT , EMPLR_CONTRB_PCT ) SELECT CLN.PLAN_TYPE , :newPlan , :effdt , CLN.CNTRL_PLAN_TYPE , CLN.CNTRL_BENEFIT_PLAN , CLN.COVRG_CD , CLN.MAX_ANNUAL_CONTRIB , CASE CLN.COVRG_CD WHEN '1' THEN :eeContrib ELSE :famContrib END AS FLAT_CONTRB_AMT , CLN.EMPLR_CONTRB_PCT FROM PS_HSA_CONTRIB_LMT CLN WHERE CLN.PLAN_TYPE = '67' AND CLN.BENEFIT_PLAN = :clonePlan AND CLN.EFFDT = ( SELECT MAX(EFFDT) FROM PS_HSA_CONTRIB_LMT F1 WHERE F1.PLAN_TYPE = CLN.PLAN_TYPE AND F1.BENEFIT_PLAN = CLN.BENEFIT_PLAN AND F1.EFFDT <= :effdt )

MERGE INTO PS_LIMIT_INCLD_TBL TGT USING ( SELECT LIM.EFFDT , '67' AS PLAN_TYPE , :newPlan AS BENEFIT_PLAN , ' ' AS DEDCD , 'N' AS DED_CLASS , 'HSA' AS LIMIT_TYPE FROM PS_LIMIT_TBL LIM WHERE LIM.LIMIT_TYPE = 'HSA' AND ( ( LIM.EFFDT > :effdt ) OR ( LIM.EFFDT = ( SELECT MAX(EFFDT) FROM PS_LIMIT_TBL L1 WHERE L1.LIMIT_TYPE = LIM.LIMIT_TYPE AND L1.EFFDT <= :effdt ) ) ) UNION SELECT LIM.EFFDT , '67' , :newPlan , ' ' , 'B' , 'HSA' FROM PS_LIMIT_TBL LIM WHERE LIM.LIMIT_TYPE = 'HSA' AND ( ( LIM.EFFDT > :effdt ) OR ( LIM.EFFDT = ( SELECT MAX(EFFDT) FROM PS_LIMIT_TBL L1 WHERE L1.LIMIT_TYPE = LIM.LIMIT_TYPE AND L1.EFFDT <= :effdt ) ) ) ) SRC
ON ( TGT.LIMIT_TYPE = SRC.LIMIT_TYPE AND TGT.EFFDT = SRC.EFFDT AND TGT.PLAN_TYPE = SRC.PLAN_TYPE AND TGT.BENEFIT_PLAN = SRC.BENEFIT_PLAN AND TGT.DEDCD = SRC.DEDCD AND TGT.DED_CLASS = SRC.DED_CLASS )
WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT ( TGT.EFFDT, TGT.PLAN_TYPE, TGT.BENEFIT_PLAN, TGT.DEDCD, TGT.DED_CLASS, TGT.LIMIT_TYPE ) VALUES ( SRC.EFFDT, SRC.PLAN_TYPE, SRC.BENEFIT_PLAN, SRC.DEDCD, SRC.DED_CLASS, SRC.LIMIT_TYPE )

MERGE INTO PS_BEN_DEFN_OPTN TGT USING ( SELECT ? BENEFIT_PROGRAM , ? EFFDT , ? PLAN_TYPE , CASE TO_NUMBER( ? ) WHEN 0 THEN ( SELECT MAX(OPTION_ID) FROM PS_BEN_DEFN_OPTN WHERE BENEFIT_PROGRAM = ? AND EFFDT = ? ) + 1 ELSE TO_NUMBER( ? ) END OPTION_ID , ? DISPLAY_OPT_SEQ , ? OPTION_TYPE , ? BENEFIT_PLAN , ? COVRG_CD , ? OPTION_CD , ? OPTION_LVL , ? DEDCD , ? DFLT_OPTION_IND , ? ELIG_RULES_ID , ? LOCATION_TBL_ID , ? CROSS_PLAN_TYPE , ? CROSS_BENEF_PLAN , ? COVERAGE_LIMIT_PCT , ? CROSS_PLN_DPND_CHK FROM DUAL ) SRC
ON ( TGT.BENEFIT_PROGRAM = SRC.BENEFIT_PROGRAM AND TGT.EFFDT = SRC.EFFDT AND TGT.PLAN_TYPE = SRC.PLAN_TYPE AND TGT.OPTION_ID = SRC.OPTION_ID )
WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT ( TGT.BENEFIT_PROGRAM, TGT.EFFDT, TGT.PLAN_TYPE, TGT.OPTION_ID, TGT.DISPLAY_OPT_SEQ, TGT.OPTION_TYPE , TGT.BENEFIT_PLAN, TGT.COVRG_CD, TGT.OPTION_CD, TGT.OPTION_LVL, TGT.DEDCD, TGT.DFLT_OPTION_IND , TGT.ELIG_RULES_ID, TGT.LOCATION_TBL_ID, TGT.CROSS_PLAN_TYPE, TGT.CROSS_BENEF_PLAN , TGT.COVERAGE_LIMIT_PCT, TGT.CROSS_PLN_DPND_CHK ) VALUES ( SRC.BENEFIT_PROGRAM, SRC.EFFDT, SRC.PLAN_TYPE, SRC.OPTION_ID, SRC.DISPLAY_OPT_SEQ, SRC.OPTION_TYPE , SRC.BENEFIT_PLAN, SRC.COVRG_CD, SRC.OPTION_CD, SRC.OPTION_LVL, SRC.DEDCD, SRC.DFLT_OPTION_IND , SRC.ELIG_RULES_ID, SRC.LOCATION_TBL_ID, SRC.CROSS_PLAN_TYPE, SRC.CROSS_BENEF_PLAN , SRC.COVERAGE_LIMIT_PCT, SRC.CROSS_PLN_DPND_CHK )
WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET DISPLAY_OPT_SEQ = SRC.DISPLAY_OPT_SEQ , OPTION_TYPE = SRC.OPTION_TYPE , BENEFIT_PLAN = SRC.BENEFIT_PLAN , COVRG_CD = SRC.COVRG_CD , OPTION_CD = SRC.OPTION_CD , OPTION_LVL = SRC.OPTION_LVL , DEDCD = SRC.DEDCD , DFLT_OPTION_IND = SRC.DFLT_OPTION_IND , ELIG_RULES_ID = SRC.ELIG_RULES_ID , LOCATION_TBL_ID = SRC.LOCATION_TBL_ID , CROSS_PLAN_TYPE = SRC.CROSS_PLAN_TYPE , CROSS_BENEF_PLAN = SRC.CROSS_BENEF_PLAN , COVERAGE_LIMIT_PCT = SRC.COVERAGE_LIMIT_PCT , CROSS_PLN_DPND_CHK = SRC.CROSS_PLN_DPND_CHK
SELECT * FROM PS_T2_SUP_LTD_AUTH WHERE COMPANY = :companyCode AND ROWNUM = 1 ORDER BY DATE_POSTED DESC

MERGE INTO PS_T2_SUP_LTD_AUTH SLA USING (SELECT :companyCode COMPANYCODE FROM DUAL) s ON (SLA.COMPANY = s.COMPANYCODE) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET SLA.EMPLID = :emplId, SLA.APPROVAL_FLAG = :approvalFlag, SLA.DATE_POSTED = :datePosted WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT (COMPANY, EMPLID, APPROVAL_FLAG, DATE_POSTED) VALUES (:companyCode, :emplId, :approvalFlag, :datePosted)
select NVL2(co.T2_COMP_TERM_DT, 'true' , 'false') isTermedCompany from ps_t2_clientoption co where co.company = :companyCode

select DECODE(UPPER(OP.T2_PRODUCT_LINE), 'DFTX', 'true' , 'false') IS_TEXAS_SITUS FROM ( SELECT * FROM PS_T2_CLOPTN_EFFDT CE1 WHERE CE1.COMPANY = :companyCode AND CE1.EFFDT = ( SELECT MAX(EFFDT) FROM PS_T2_CLOPTN_EFFDT CE2 WHERE CE2.COMPANY = CE1.COMPANY AND CE2.PF_CLIENT = CE1.PF_CLIENT AND CE2.EFFDT<= :effDate ) ) OP

INSERT INTO PS_T2_MEAS_STAB ( COMPANY, PF_CLIENT, T2_OE_QUARTER, START_DATE, EFFDT, T2_EMPL_CLASS_TYPE, T2_EMPL_CLASS_CODE, T2_CLASS_NAME, T2_MEASUREMENT, T2_STABILITY, T2_ADMIN_PERIOD ) VALUES ( :company, :pfClient, :oe_quarter, TO_DATE(:planStartDate,'DD-MON-YYYY'), TO_DATE(:effDt,'DD-MON-YYYY'), :t2EmployeeClassType, :t2EmployeeClassCode, :t2EmployeeClassName, :t2Measurement, :t2Stability, :t2AdminPeriod )
DELETE FROM PS_T2_MEAS_STAB WHERE COMPANY = :company

UPDATE PS_T2_CLOPTN_EFFDT SET T2_PLAN_DT_START = TO_DATE(:planStartDate, 'DD-MON-YYYY') , T2_OE_QUARTER = :oe_quarter , T2_OEQTR_EXCEPTION = :oe_quarter_exce , T2_SISTER_CLIENT = CASE WHEN :cmn_owner_company IS NOT NULL THEN :cmn_owner_company ELSE T2_SISTER_CLIENT END WHERE COMPANY = :company AND PF_CLIENT = :pfClient AND T2_PLAN_DT_START = TO_DATE(:oldPlanStartDate, 'DD-MON-YYYY')

UPDATE BD_COMPANIES@HPDB_HRDB SET T2_PLAN_DT_START = TO_DATE(:planStartDate, 'DD-MON-YYYY') , PROGRAMS_EFFDT = TO_DATE(:planStartDate, 'DD-MON-YYYY') WHERE COMPANY = :company AND T2_PLAN_DT_START = TO_DATE(:oldPlanStartDate, 'DD-MON-YYYY')
UPDATE PS_T2_CLOPTN_EFFDT SET T2_ACA_LARGE_EMPLR = :ale_status WHERE COMPANY = :company AND PF_CLIENT = :pfClient
